Painting the Mists.title: Clear Sky

Painting the Mists.description: Cha Ming and Huxian are back at the bottom of the food chain. Emperors and immortals would kill for their secrets....

Destiny Cycle.title: Forge of Destiny: Volume 2

Salvos.author: V.A. Lewis
Salvos.description: The Netherworld: it is a hellish landscape inhabited only by demons, creatures born from the dark abyss. It is also the only world Salvos knows....

A Thousand Li.title: A Thousand Li: The Second Sect: A Xianxia Cultivation Epic

Then, it’s time to face the challenges the planet has to offer, and by using the many rewards from the treasure hunt, Jake aims to improve his repertoire while getting some more levels under his belt....

The Primal Hunter.title: The Primal Hunter 10
The Primal Hunter.author: Zogarth
The Primal Hunter.description: Having evolved to C-grade successfully, Jake is ready to enter the most well-known World Wonder in the entire multiverse to get some sweet levels under his belt. However, Nevermore is far more than just an immense dungeon to power up in.

The Primal Hunter.title: The Primal Hunter 13
The Primal Hunter.author: Zogarth
The Primal Hunter.description: With Nevermore done and dusted, it’s back to Earth where the fight for the Milky Way Galaxy is about to begin... But first, a fun trip to the moon with Jake’s best-buddy space worm, Sandy.

Heaven's Laws.title: Prodigies
Heaven's Laws.author: Apollos Thorne
Heaven's Laws.description: Long Chao is the son of a hedge mage — a heretic cultivator. He doesn’t cultivate for power, but to satisfy his endless curiosity. One fateful day, Xiao Huifen, a girl aiming to be the youngest Sky Realm cultivator in the Monolith continent’s history, crashes into his life....

The System Apocalypse: Australia.title: Town Under
The System Apocalypse: Australia.author: Tao Wong, K. T. Hanna
The System Apocalypse: Australia.description: The System Apocalypse has come to Australia, altering native organisms and importing even more menacing creatures to the most dangerous continent on Earth. For Kira Kent, plant biologist, the System arrives while she's pulling an all nighter at work with her pair of kids in tow.

The System Apocalypse: Australia.title: The System Apocalypse: Australia Books 1-3
The System Apocalypse: Australia.author: Tao Wong, KT Hanna
The System Apocalypse: Australia.description: No more cute koala bears, bouncy kangaroos, or fuzzy wallabies. Now, everything is mutated and aggressive? Who made the spiders so big? The world's most dangerous continent just got a lot more dangerous, and no one, not even the alien Galactics who arrive, are ready for it....

The System Apocalypse: Australia.title: Flat Out
The System Apocalypse: Australia.author: Tao Wong, K. T. Hanna
The System Apocalypse: Australia.description: Two weeks into the System Apocalypse, and the transformations are just beginning. Mutated insects, carnivorous toads, and angry drop bears were not on the school curriculum, but when the apocalypse hits, you roll with it....

The System Apocalypse: Australia.title: Bloody Oath
The System Apocalypse: Australia.author: Tao Wong, KT Hanna
The System Apocalypse: Australia.description: Kira's worries are only just beginning. She has a newly minted alien alliance to nurture, a settlement to run, and Skills to master, all while wrangling her children in an apocalypse....

Year of the Sword.title: Lord January
Year of the Sword.author: Dakota Krout
Year of the Sword.description: Grant Leap is an orphaned, mortal farmhand in a world where cultivation methods and Weapons of Power are jealously guarded and only passed down among family....

Year of the Sword.title: Lady February
Year of the Sword.author: Dakota Krout
Year of the Sword.description: A lord according to the system, Grant Monday has arrived in February. This place is the absolute opposite of January, and his largest challenge isn’t hostile Wielders....

Holiday Dungeon Core.title: Christmas Core
Holiday Dungeon Core.author: Jonathan Brooks
Holiday Dungeon Core.description: A love of Christmas is translated into a unique dungeon experience. Elmer Robbins loved decorating for every holiday with his wife, Mary, by going all-out with décor at their cozy little house as well as filling his office with holiday cheer....

Holiday Dungeon Core.title: Holiday Dungeon Core: Novella 1-5
Holiday Dungeon Core.author: Jonathan Brooks
Holiday Dungeon Core.description: Elmer Robbins loved decorating for every holiday with his wife, Mary, by going all out with décor at their cozy little house as well as filling his office with holiday cheer....

Holiday Dungeon Core.title: Valentine Core
Holiday Dungeon Core.author: Jonathan Brooks
Holiday Dungeon Core.description: Elmer Robbins was turned into a dungeon core after an untimely death back on Earth, and he had a heck of time learning how to survive in the new, strange world of Bershia....

Holiday Dungeon Core.title: Easter Core
Holiday Dungeon Core.author: Jonathan Brooks
Holiday Dungeon Core.description: After Christmas and Valentine’s Day, Elmer is back for another holiday experience. Elmer Robbins has somehow managed to survive his new existence as a dungeon core, despite everything working against him. As he advances yet another level, he can feel the core barrier becoming thinner....

Holiday Dungeon Core.title: Independence Core
Holiday Dungeon Core.author: Jonathan Brooks
Holiday Dungeon Core.description: After a harrowing experience with a soul manipulator after he created his Easter section, Elmer Robbins is back and developing a brand-new area based on another holiday. The dungeon core decides to implement the holiday of Independence Day as his newest addition to his dungeon defenses....

Holiday Dungeon Core.title: Halloween Core
Holiday Dungeon Core.author: Jonathan Brooks
Holiday Dungeon Core.description: Elmer Robbins has survived thousands of Adventurers delving through his dungeon, but the holiday-obsessed Dungeon Core is in danger. The threat doesn’t stem from some powerful Adventurer or world-ending crisis set to destroy his Core, but from his own success....

The Tian Trilogy.title: Lost Soul: A LitRPG Cultivation Series
The Tian Trilogy.author: V.A. Lewis
The Tian Trilogy.description: Tian, a Cultivator at the precipice of ascension, is thwarted in her quest for immortality. Defeated, she escapes to another world with Levels, Classes, magic, and monsters. She becomes a Lost Soul. Her core begins to dwindle, but she does not abandon her goal....

The Tian Trilogy.title: Soul Seeker: A LitRPG Cultivation Series
The Tian Trilogy.author: V.A. Lewis
The Tian Trilogy.description: Utana has been liberated...but all is not over. Galgom still lives. A single copy of his Hivemind survived. Once he is captured, there is peace...for a moment.....

Apocalypse Earth Cultivator Series.title: Zanamus
Apocalypse Earth Cultivator Series.author: B B Orange-Block
Apocalypse Earth Cultivator Series.description: Lando’s romantic evening isn’t going to plan. During it, he’s received exclusive access to a secret update of his favorite virtual reality game. So now he has to slip away from his hot date and install the new version directly to his neuralink before the offer expires....

Dicken Around.title: Dicken Around
Dicken Around.author: Jonathan Smidt
Dicken Around.description: Alex can’t wait to dive into the latest cutting-edge VRMMORPG: Dungeon Core Online. It boasts an ever-changing, ever-growing dungeon with an AI so advanced, it feels practically human. Forming a two-man dungeon party with his best friend, Fel, Alex is keen to sample everything DCO has to offer....

Battle Mage Farmer.title: Domestication
Battle Mage Farmer.author: Seth Ring
Battle Mage Farmer.description: A world on the precipice of the apocalypse. A secret forged in the flames of war. A chance to start over. For John Sutton, only one of those three things matters. Retired from a decade of brutal war, he wants nothing more than a quiet pastoral life while he does his best to stem the steady...

Battle Mage Farmer.title: Cultivation
Battle Mage Farmer.author: Seth Ring
Battle Mage Farmer.description: Book 3 of the next great Fantasy LitRPG Series by Seth Ring, author of Nova Terra. Get your copy today and explore a world whose secrets have been buried under decades of war....

Battle Mage Farmer.title: Preservation [Dramatized Adaptation]
Battle Mage Farmer.author: Seth Ring
Battle Mage Farmer.description: Insane cult trying to undermine the stability of society? Powerful mage whose very presence unmakes the world? John doesn’t care. He’s getting married. After rescuing Katrine, sealing himself into a manaless state, and defending against the most dangerous beast tide the world has ever seen...

Battle Mage Farmer.title: Separation: A Fantasy LitRPG Adventure
Battle Mage Farmer.author: Seth Ring
Battle Mage Farmer.description: Urey Lotheric, Supreme Mage of the Cabal of the Broken Gate, has been vanquished, and the valley has been saved from certain destruction. But none of that will matter if John can’t find a way back to Candle Scholar Tower.

So I'm a Spider, So What? (light novel).title: So I'm a Spider, So What?, Vol. 1
So I'm a Spider, So What? (light novel).series: So I'm a Spider, So What? (light novel)
So I'm a Spider, So What? (light novel).author: Okina Baba, Tsukasa Kiryu, Jenny McKeon McKeon - translator
So I'm a Spider, So What? (light novel).description: I used to be a normal high school girl but in the blink of an eye, I woke up in a place I've never seen before and-and I was reborn as a spider?! How could something that's nothing more than a tiny spider (that's me) possibly survive in literally the worst dungeon ever? Are there no rules? There...

So I'm a Spider, So What? (light novel).title: So I'm a Spider, So What?, Vol. 16 (light novel)
So I'm a Spider, So What? (light novel).series: So I'm a Spider, So What? (light novel)
So I'm a Spider, So What? (light novel).author: Okina Baba, Tsukasa Kiryu, Jenny McKeon McKeon - translator
So I'm a Spider, So What? (light novel).description: THE PRICE WE PAY.Sacrifice the goddess to save humanity, or sacrifice humanity to save the goddess? …What kind of sadist would throw the entire world into chaos with an impossible choice like that?! D, obviously. The head honchos of the Word of God religionare doing all they can to tip the...

Beware of Chicken.title: Beware of Chicken: A Xianxia Cultivation Novel
Beware of Chicken.author: Casualfarmer
Beware of Chicken.description: Jin Rou wanted to be a cultivator. A man powerful enough to defy the heavens. A master of martial arts. A lord of spiritual power. Unfortunately for him, he died, and now I’m stuck in his body....

Beware of Chicken.title: Beware of Chicken 2: A Xianxia Cultivation Novel
Beware of Chicken.author: Casualfarmer
Beware of Chicken.description: Well, this year, after the Spring Planting season, I’m really gonna relax and put down roots. It’s the slow life for me. Sure, the talking animals and cultivators coming to live with me are a bit weird, but this year everything is gonna be basically normal....

Beware of Chicken.title: Beware of Chicken 3: A Xianxia Cultivation Novel
Beware of Chicken.author: Casualfarmer
Beware of Chicken.description: Jin Rou wanted to be a cultivator. A man powerful enough to defy the heavens. A master of martial arts. A lord of spiritual power. Unfortunately for him, he died, and now I’m stuck in his body....

Beware of Chicken.title: Beware of Chicken 4: A Xianxia Cultivation Novel
Beware of Chicken.author: Casualfarmer
Beware of Chicken.description: Out in the middle of nowhere, I've managed to escape a life of cultivation and politics. Until now, that is. I guess it was inevitable they caught up with me eventually. I haven't exactly been subtle. You know, what with the talking animals performing heroics all over the Azure Hills.

Beware of Chicken.title: Beware of Chicken 5: A Xianxia Cultivation Novel
Beware of Chicken.author: Casualfarmer
Beware of Chicken.description: Jin Rou wanted to be a cultivator. A man powerful enough to defy the heavens. A master of martial arts. A lord of spiritual power. Unfortunately for him, he died, and now I'm stuck in his body. But I think he'd like how things are turning out.

Cultivator vs. System.title: The First Step
Cultivator vs. System.author: Valerios
Cultivator vs. System.description: Long Fang is stranded in a foreign world where proper cultivation has been replaced by annoying blue screens. He is confused and alone...but not for long. Completely ignoring the System, he forms a wholesome sect of followers to spread cultivation across the wild world....

Cultivator vs. System.title: Cultivator vs. System: The Complete Series
Cultivator vs. System.author: Valerios
Cultivator vs. System.description: Long Fang is stranded in a foreign world where proper cultivation has been replaced by annoying blue screens. He is confused and alone...but not for long....

Cultivator vs. System.title: The Next Step
Cultivator vs. System.author: Valerios
Cultivator vs. System.description: After carving out a foothold in this odd new world, Long Fang must now defend it. Enemies swarm when the System calls for war, but cultivators thrive on the brink of disaster....

Cultivator vs. System.title: The Final Step
Cultivator vs. System.author: Valerios
Cultivator vs. System.description: War dawns on the Asuria continent, and Long Fang will participate. He will forge himself through blood and shed off immaturities. He will rise higher and faster than anyone—or at least try. In this war, there is no right or wrong, only victory or death....

The Wolf King's Lair.title: The Wolf King's Lair 1
The Wolf King's Lair.author: Devan Drake
The Wolf King's Lair.description: Dave Smith is having a bad day, week, month, maybe even year. Freshly unemployed, facing eviction, and now he's been transported to a fantasy world. A wish come true for many a geek, if only he hadn't died less than a day after he arrived....

The Wolf King's Lair.title: The Wolf King's Lair 2
The Wolf King's Lair.author: Devan Drake
The Wolf King's Lair.description: Daxas has survived his first few weeks as a Dungeon. He has successfully discovered several exploits in the system and has been thriving. He is advancing to the second rank, fought off an invasion of orcs and goblins, and, most importantly, now has a lovely wood elf companion....

The Wolf King's Lair.title: The Wolf King's Lair 3
The Wolf King's Lair.author: Devan Drake
The Wolf King's Lair.description: Daxas has reached rank eight. He has conquered and subsumed a second dungeon increasing his power and pulled one over the Divine Lords in the process. However, he is aware this will bring new difficulties to his door and the Divine Lords are unlikely to take their humiliation well....

The Wolf King's Lair.title: The Wolf King's Lair 4
The Wolf King's Lair.author: Devan Drake
The Wolf King's Lair.description: Daxas' trials continue. He has defeated those with the temerity to face him and claimed the dark elf Dungeon Mistress Jen'Zadeer Shadestar for his own. His guild, the Dark Moon Rising, continues to flourish despite its figurehead Chief Simeon Reedwhistle's reservations....

The Wolf King's Lair.title: The Wolf King's Lair 5
The Wolf King's Lair.author: Devan Drake
The Wolf King's Lair.description: There are others in the Proving Grounds, like the Silver Lady, Jezebel. She had her own plans, which don't align with Daxas'. Not to mention that the threat from without is undiminished. Timian, and others, are still gunning hard for Daxas. They want what he has....

The Wolf King's Lair.title: The Wolf King's Lair 6
The Wolf King's Lair.author: Devan Drake
The Wolf King's Lair.description: Jezebel and the elf guilds have been defeated. The elven goddess now resides in the Wolf King's lair, along with Daxas and the others. However, her attempts to destroy Daxas' dungeon and steal all the soul energy he had collected over time has not been without consequence.

The Path of Ascension.title: The Path of Ascension
The Path of Ascension.author: C. Mantis
The Path of Ascension.description: Matt plans to delve the rifts responsible for the monsters that destroyed his city and murdered his parents. But his dreams are crushed when his Tier 1 Talent is rated as detrimental and no guild or group will take him. Working at a nearby inn, he meets a mysterious and powerful couple....

The Path of Ascension.title: The Path of Ascension: Books 1-3.5
The Path of Ascension.author: C. Mantis
The Path of Ascension.description: Matt plans to delve the rifts responsible for the monsters that destroyed his city and murdered his parents. But his dreams are crushed when his Tier One Talent is rated as detrimental, and no guild or group will take him....

The Path of Ascension.title: The Path of Ascension Book 10.5
The Path of Ascension.author: C. Mantis
The Path of Ascension.description: Echos can come in as many flavors as there are sources. They are all unique, but few more so than an Ascension. Matt, Liz, and Aster are off to fight in a war their predecessors started two hundred years ago, but the Empire marches on, and so too do those whom the Ascenders affected.

The Path of Ascension.title: The Path of Ascension 11
The Path of Ascension.author: C. Mantis
The Path of Ascension.description: A century into the war, the Ascenders aren't the only ones who are tired. Fighting three against two the Empire, even with all of its advantages, can only fight to a slow and bloody retreat as more of its border worlds are occupied.

System Universe Series.title: System Change: A LitRPG Adventure
System Universe Series.author: SunriseCV
System Universe Series.description: Fight, survive, adapt, and rely only on yourself. That is Derek’s creed and what's got him through the System Integration on Earth. Everything changed when the System came....

System Universe Series.title: Torith
System Universe Series.author: SunriseCV
System Universe Series.description: It’s not easy being a System Traveler. Well, the traveling part is hard, at least. But once Derek got his feet under him, he hit the ground running, saving an entire area from a massive dungeon overflow in the process....

System Universe Series.title: System Interference
System Universe Series.author: SunriseCV
System Universe Series.description: After a successful auction, the young Prince Edgar requested Derek’s help on an issue that concerned the safety of the Kingdom of Cydaria. A new, level 250 raid dungeon appeared, and Edgar needed the kingdom’s elite to help clear it before the unstable dungeon overflowed, or even worse, broke.

System Universe Series.title: Indaria
System Universe Series.author: SunriseCV
System Universe Series.description: After some unsettling news brought to them by an unexpected messenger, Prince Edgar fled the Raid Dungeon to hurry back to his kingdom, leaving Derek as the impromptu leader.

System Universe Series.title: Requirements
System Universe Series.author: SunriseCV
System Universe Series.description: Derek has saved villages and maybe even cities from overflowing dungeons. He later helped with the capture of one of the most despicable noblemen in the entire kingdom.

System Universe Series.title: System Clash
System Universe Series.author: SunriseCV
System Universe Series.description: In preparation for things to come, Derek spent most of his time in Cydaria making it safe for all of his friends and companions. He saw Thomas off to the Academy, helped Brandi with materials for crafting, and more.

Virtuous Sons.title: Virtuous Sons
Virtuous Sons.author: Y.B. Striker
Virtuous Sons.description: Lio Aetos is the Young Aristocrat and heir apparent to a legendary Greek sect, a prodigious talent born and bred for glory. Solus is a slave, a disgraced patrician from the fallen city of Rome with nothing to his name....
Virtuous Sons.narrator: Justin Thomas James, Emma Kate Starling, Jeff Hays, Zachary Johnson

Highway Hero.title: Highway Hero
Highway Hero.author: Jack Bryce
Highway Hero.description: I was working a shift at the refinery when the asteroids first appeared. Before humanity could even respond, they struck and changed our world into a wasteland of ashes and dust. But they also changed me. I became a Prodigy, a powerful cultivator....

Highway Hero.title: Highway Hero: The Complete Series
Highway Hero.author: Jack Bryce
Highway Hero.description: Cole was working a shift at the refinery when the apocalypse came a-knocking. However, Earth wasn’t destroyed — no, the apocalypse changed our world. It changed Cole, too; he became a Prodigy, a powerful cultivator.

Highway Hero.title: Highway Hero 2
Highway Hero.author: Jack Bryce
Highway Hero.description: Low on supplies, low on ammo, and recovering from our last fight, me and my ragtag band of survivors have plenty of challenges ahead. But survival isn’t the only thing I’m concerned with; I want revenge on the man who betrayed us....

Wandering Cultivator of the Broken Empir.title: Wandering Cultivator of the Broken Empire, Book 1
Wandering Cultivator of the Broken Empir.series: Wandering Cultivator of the Broken Empire
Wandering Cultivator of the Broken Empir.author: Robyn Wideman, Scribes of Sulterra
Wandering Cultivator of the Broken Empir.description: Calin has a bright future as the top Alchemy student in the entire Academy, and the clans are lining up to woo him....

Tianyi.title: This Young Master Is Not Cannon Fodder
Tianyi.author: D.C. Haenlien
Tianyi.description: On the surface, Xi Tianyi was the only son of Sword Empress Xi of the Buzhou Immortal Sect, the number one expert in the Huang Realm. His birth was noble, his status exalted. But the truth was that Xi Tianyi was actually a reincarnated man from a world known as Earth....

Tianyi.title: This Young Master Has Enemies
Tianyi.author: D.C. Haenlien
Tianyi.description: Upon reaching the Core Formation Realm, Tianyi discovers a flaw in his cultivation method that is near impossible to remedy even with his almighty mother's aid. His only hope is to find a solution in the ruin of the Immortal Court....

Tianyi.title: This Young Master's Mother Is Mighty
Tianyi.author: D.C. Haenlien
Tianyi.description: After Tianyi successfully solving the problem with his self-created cultivation method, a full 10 years had passed, and it was time to visit the Northern Region once more....

Tianyi.title: This Clone Is the Protagonist's Master
Tianyi.author: D. C. Haenlien
Tianyi.description: There was once a man born with a noble pedigree and peerless talent. His name was Xi Tianyi, and he was a man destined for immortal ascension. This is not his story....

Final Core.title: Final Core: Volume 1
Final Core.author: D.M. Rhodes, Razzmatazz
Final Core.description: I died and was accidentally reborn as an [angelic monstrosity]. So now I'm building a holy dungeon-tower that is tall enough to reach the gods...so that I can complain about it! But the humans think that I am trying to destroy the world....

Final Core.title: Final Core: Volume 2
Final Core.author: D.M. Rhodes, Razzmatazz
Final Core.description: The Tower of Isaiah grows in might; Its master flourishes much the same. Adventurers flock from around the nation to be able to reap the seeds that Isaiah has sown in the world, earning themselves much glory and wealth and, in turn, earning the divine entity, Isaiah, much renown....

Final Core.title: Final Core: Volume 3
Final Core.author: Razzmatazz, D. M. Rhodes
Final Core.description: The Tower of Isaiah spires toward the heavens above, coming closer and closer by the day. The gargantuan construct that towers over the world pierces the clouds like a threatening spear, held aloft to any higher powers above who might be watching this new era of turmoil....

Traclaon Armageddon.title: Reborn Inception: A LitRPG Adventure
Traclaon Armageddon.author: Alex Kozlowski
Traclaon Armageddon.description: After experiencing a future where all of humanity’s planets and colonies had been purged, Eric refused to fall. And so, the Entity chose him to be humanity's last hope—to be Reborn....

Qi=MC^2.title: The First Law of Cultivation
Qi=MC^2.author: KrazeKode
Qi=MC^2.description: What happens when cultivation meets mad science? Lu Jie woke up in a world filled with scheming sects, arrogant young masters, and the mad chase for the immortal heavens. He wanted none of it, and soon finds himself beaten bloody in a spar he didn't remember and treated as less than worthless...

Qi=MC^2.title: The Second Law of Cultivation
Qi=MC^2.author: KrazeKode
Qi=MC^2.description: The First Law has been revealed. Having found the truth, Lu Jie is set out on a path against the very heavens. Now exiled from the sect and under the Lord of the Seventh Peak, he must branch out into his own, creating the foundations of a new era starting from Taizhou. But winter is fast...

Qi=MC^2.title: The Third Law of Cultivation
Qi=MC^2.author: KrazeKode
Qi=MC^2.description: With the arrival of winter, Lu Jie’s workload has continued to increase. Now in charge of an entire sect, and mired in politics, he’d been expecting constant pushback from demonic beasts and yet … the demons seem to have vanished without a trace.

Qi=MC^2.title: The Fourth Law of Cultivation
Qi=MC^2.author: KrazeKode
Qi=MC^2.description: War has come to the Azure-Jade Empire. With the emperor slain and the Azure Dragon vanished, the demonic forces have returned, overwhelming the empire on all fronts. Amidst the chaos, only one path remains to stop Yang Shen’s ascent: Lu Jie must journey to the Cradle of Dragons and seek the...

Qi=MC^2.title: The Fifth Law of Cultivation
Qi=MC^2.author: KrazeKode KrazeKode
Qi=MC^2.description: The end draws near, as a demon god stirs awake. Lu Jie died in the final battle, leaving a remnant divine tree that now holds back the Demon God from tearing through the world. But all is not yet over. Secrets lie in the realms between life and death, where the past touches the future, as the...

The Steampunk World of Gearnix.title: Reborn as a Baron Lord Omnibus
The Steampunk World of Gearnix.author: Han Yang
The Steampunk World of Gearnix.description: Bradley receives a second chance on a steampunk planet where the wondrous sights captivate, the gizmos fascinate, and it is all possible with steam. Attempting the wilds, Bradley experiences a dash of heart-pumping adventure that unlocks new opportunities and brings unwanted problems....

Rebels Path.title: Cruel Empire
Rebels Path.author: Robyn Wideman, JK Daniels
Rebels Path.description: In the Empire, cultivation is restricted. Weapons are forbidden. Tyranny reigns. When disaster strikes for Oren and his family, there is only one choice: flee the local magistrate and his arrogant son who wants to destroy their family....

Rebels Path.title: Southern Invasion
Rebels Path.author: Robyn Wideman, JK Daniels
Rebels Path.description: When the empire finally gets a foothold in the North, it intends to destroy all the clans and take their valuable resources for itself. Yet all is not lost. The clans of the North are spread apart and don't work well together....

Legend of Raven.title: Five Rings of Cultivation
Legend of Raven.author: Konstantin Zaitsev
Legend of Raven.description: Learn the nature of the Rings of Power in your soul, and the call of blood will lead you in the fights against even the most powerful of demons....

Road to Mastery.title: Road to Mastery
Road to Mastery.author: Valerios
Road to Mastery.description: Jack Rust was a disillusioned biologist with a PhD—almost. When an extraterrestrial AI calling itself the System invaded Earth and thrusts it into a world of aliens and violence, the least Jack hoped for was gaining access to magic....

Dragon Idol's Reincarnation Tale.title: Awakening: A LitRPG Adventure
Dragon Idol's Reincarnation Tale.author: AbyssRaven
Dragon Idol's Reincarnation Tale.description: If waking up in a new world isn't bad enough, Hestia starts her new life as a small, newborn dragon in a hostile forest filled with vicious monsters. With status screens obscuring her vision, her first task is to escape two hungry kobolds wanting some grilled lizard for breakfast....

Dragon Idol's Reincarnation Tale.title: Traitor Saintess
Dragon Idol's Reincarnation Tale.author: AbyssRaven
Dragon Idol's Reincarnation Tale.description: Book 6 in this LitRPG Series about an underdog rising up to be the idol her new world didn't know it needed. Hestia may start small, but one day her power will match her determination.

Gravity and Divinity System.title: Apocalypse Comedy
Gravity and Divinity System.author: Hunter Mythos
Gravity and Divinity System.description: A jokester crashes the System, angers the gods, and becomes more powerful with every climactic battle....

Gravity and Divinity System.title: Apocalypse Command
Gravity and Divinity System.author: Hunter Mythos
Gravity and Divinity System.description: A jokester gets serious and grows from strong to OP with Gravity Magic. But that's not enough. He takes control of the System. He gets command of the Champions....

Gravity and Divinity System.title: Apocalypse Crusade
Gravity and Divinity System.author: Hunter Mythos
Gravity and Divinity System.description: A jokester gets angry. He grows from OP to extremely OP with gravity magic. He needs more power to fight the System and the evil assassin leaders. He needs a crusade....

Gravity and Divinity System.title: Apocalypse Conquest
Gravity and Divinity System.author: Hunter Mythos
Gravity and Divinity System.description: The Commander of Champions thrives in this environment. His powers can only grow stronger from here....

Gravity and Divinity System.title: Apocalypse Challenge
Gravity and Divinity System.author: Hunter Mythos
Gravity and Divinity System.description: The biggest war the Earth has faced ended. It's time for Jay Luckrun to lead the fight against the Dungeon Goblins and stop them from invading their universe....

Gravity and Divinity System.title: Apocalypse Change
Gravity and Divinity System.author: Hunter Mythos
Gravity and Divinity System.description: When your greatest enemies are the end bosses of the apocalypse, why not become the ultimate boss yourself? Patriarch Jay Luckrun is one of the strongest dungeon crawlers in all of the Multiverse, but he's still not strong enough to overcome the greatest powers of the System.

Speedrunning the Multiverse Series.title: Speedrunning the Multiverse
Speedrunning the Multiverse Series.author: adastra339
Speedrunning the Multiverse Series.description: Already conquered the Multiverse, have you? Well, do it faster! Behold the Multiverse! Its countless realms overflow with terrific opportunities and terrible dangers—warring sects, priceless treasures, martial techniques, and all manner of horrible monsters abound. And Dorian has conquered...

Speedrunning the Multiverse Series.title: Speedrunning the Multiverse 4
Speedrunning the Multiverse Series.author: adastra339
Speedrunning the Multiverse Series.description: Dorian’s made it out of the Auction like a bandit, but he’s still got a tough road ahead. The megalomaniacal Jez has most of the Multiverse in his grasp.

System Orphans: Claire.title: Apocalypse Assassin
System Orphans: Claire.author: J.J. Thorn
System Orphans: Claire.description: Ten years ago, the world changed. The System brought dungeons and monsters to earth. Billions were lost. While most try to rebuild, Claire chooses to take revenge on the people who took advantage of orphans in the chaos—100 names, 100 targets....

System Orphans: Claire.title: Reaper's Madness
System Orphans: Claire.author: J.J. Thorn
System Orphans: Claire.description: Teleported somewhere against her will—twice—Claire must come to terms with the escalating challenges of a City grappling with the System and the advantages/disadvantages that can provide.

Path of the Berserker.title: Path of the Berserker: A Daopocalypse Progression Fantasy
Path of the Berserker.author: Rick Scott
Path of the Berserker.description: When the cultivators came to Earth, they destroyed our entire civilization in a matter of hours. Armies fell, cities burned, and that was before the moon turned red and filled our world with monsters. Now, over a decade later, what's left of humanity slaves under the heels of Qi-infused masters....

Path of the Berserker.title: Path of the Berserker 2: A Daopocalypse Progression Fantasy
Path of the Berserker.author: Rick Scott
Path of the Berserker.description: So it turns out overthrowing a 14,000-year-old cultivation empire is going to take longer than I expected, but I've made a great start. I've broken through to the Core Realm of my hidden Berserker art, established a new Terran Sect, and even discovered a tribe of lost Terrans out in the wild.

Path of the Berserker.title: Path of the Berserker 3: A Daopocalypse Progression Fantasy
Path of the Berserker.author: Rick Scott
Path of the Berserker.description: A world destroyed. An axe to grind. And a path to infinite power. Welcome to my reality.

Path of the Berserker.title: Path of the Berserker 4: A Daopocalypse Progression Fantasy
Path of the Berserker.author: Rick Scott
Path of the Berserker.description: School is out, but my education is just beginning. My trials at Du Gok Bhong Academy pushed me to my limits and then some, fueling my breakthrough into the Sacred Soul Realm.

Bonded Summoner.title: Champion's Trial
Bonded Summoner.author: JJ Bookerson
Bonded Summoner.description: When a God of War barged into his apartment, Jake had no idea what to expect... but it wasn't being forced into a never-ending war against evil invaders, or that the battle would strangely resemble the MMORPG games he loved....

Bonded Summoner.title: Bonded Summoner Omnibus: Books 1-3
Bonded Summoner.author: JJ Bookerson
Bonded Summoner.description: 3 volumes in a single offering! Delving dungeons by day, relaxing with cute monster girls at night.

Bonded Summoner.title: Fortress Assault
Bonded Summoner.author: JJ Bookerson
Bonded Summoner.description: Jake's monster girls just want to have fun, but success always brings new challenges. After his embarrassment in the Trials, an evil god wants vengeance, and he'll stop at nothing to get it....

Wish Upon the Stars.title: Wish Upon the Stars 1
Wish Upon the Stars.author: Malcolm Tent
Wish Upon the Stars.description: The Wish Curse Palace, the largest criminal organization in the multiverse, seeks its new successor. On Shane's eighteenth birthday, his dormant Wishmaster bloodline awakens, making him a potential heir to the organization's legacy....

Wish Upon the Stars.title: Wish Upon the Stars 2
Wish Upon the Stars.author: Malcolm Tent
Wish Upon the Stars.description: Fresh off his victory, Shane ventures to the capital city of Rajak, eyes set on the Academy—the planet's most elite training ground for heroes. But prestige and power come with their own set of challenges. Barely settling in, Shane receives a chilling message from the Heartrippers....

Wish Upon the Stars.title: Wish Upon the Stars 3
Wish Upon the Stars.author: Malcolm Tent
Wish Upon the Stars.description: In the treacherous corridors of the Wish Curse Palace, Shane's dual life intensifies.

Wish Upon the Stars.title: Wish Upon the Stars 4
Wish Upon the Stars.author: Malcolm Tent
Wish Upon the Stars.description: Shane's first test as a Wishmaster candidate has finally begun.

Wish Upon the Stars.title: Wish Upon the Stars 5
Wish Upon the Stars.author: Malcolm Tent
Wish Upon the Stars.description: Shane and Callie must push their training to the limit for the Moonsong Glade tournament. Victorious but weary after the battle for Starburst Pavilion, Shane and his team return home to Valen. It’s there they see just how far they’ve come since they first became Ascendants.

Wish Upon the Stars.title: Wish Upon the Stars 6
Wish Upon the Stars.author: Malcolm Tent
Wish Upon the Stars.description: But Shane and his team must first navigate a perilous tournament filled with fierce rivals and dangerous conspiracies. As alliances shift and threats emerge, Shane must learn to trust his instincts, leverage his Wish ability, and forge a path through the chaos if he wants to achieve his destiny.

Path of Lazy Immortal.title: Inheritance
Path of Lazy Immortal.author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
Path of Lazy Immortal.description: Gifted with knowledge of the future, Li Wei’s path should be an easy one, right? But when the future doesn’t behave as it’s supposed to, plans are derailed and things change....

Path of Lazy Immortal.title: Baptization
Path of Lazy Immortal.author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
Path of Lazy Immortal.description: Joining Divine Fragrance Palace has propelled Li Wei on the path of alchemy and the path of his Dao. However, one of the three prominent clans of the Divine Fragrance Palace is in marital relationship with Du clan that he had eliminated, and they don’t take a slap-in-the-face lightly....

Path of Lazy Immortal.title: Beast Origin Realm
Path of Lazy Immortal.author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
Path of Lazy Immortal.description: Li Wei’s battle with Wang Jiang has left him gravely injured and stranded in the Beast Origin Realm, a mysterious place that is as much a danger to him as it is a refuge. With Spirit Beasts clamoring for his blood and few allies he can count on, his only choice is to train, and train hard....

Path of Lazy Immortal.title: Five Firmament City
Path of Lazy Immortal.author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
Path of Lazy Immortal.description: After escaping the Beast Origin Realm, Li Wei enters Five Firmament City to participate in the Heavenly Firmament Sect’s disciple selection with the hope that following his previous life's path will bring him some peace. But Li Wei and peace are not compatible things.

Path of Lazy Immortal.title: War of Clans
Path of Lazy Immortal.author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
Path of Lazy Immortal.description: After the city-shaking battle, Li Wei has gained wings. Wings with which he can fly anywhere. Wings that the Wang clan have used to paint him as a devil....

Path of Lazy Immortal.title: Way of Sword
Path of Lazy Immortal.author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
Path of Lazy Immortal.description: Li Wei never sought riches nor beauties. All he wanted to do in this new life was to cultivate peacefully and save the friends he lost in his previous life. But history has repeated itself, and because of him, the Chen clan has suffered a tragic, early demise.

Path of Lazy Immortal.title: Ancient Vault
Path of Lazy Immortal.author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
Path of Lazy Immortal.description: Thrown into a world far away from his own city, Li Wei has no choice but to take help getting back to Five Firmament City from whomever he can find. And with his body cultivation sealed, he has more obstacles than before.

Path of Lazy Immortal.title: Ancient Constitution: A Wuxia/Xianxia Cultivation Novel
Path of Lazy Immortal.author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
Path of Lazy Immortal.description: Li Wei finds himself stuck in a cultivation bottleneck, due to complex rules of simultaneous qi and body cultivation. This predicament sets him on a challenging journey that will push him to his limits.

Path of Lazy Immortal.title: Ancient Decree: A Wuxia/Xianxia Cultivation Novel
Path of Lazy Immortal.author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
Path of Lazy Immortal.description: Li Wei's friend is in danger, and he is a man who never looks away from helping a friend. But he doesn't know that this call for help will lead him into a game played by players much higher than his level.

Path of Lazy Immortal.title: Finding Dao: A Wuxia/Xianxia Cultivation Novel
Path of Lazy Immortal.author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
Path of Lazy Immortal.description: His cultivation is broken. His soul fractured. And he is trapped—locked inside a realm ruled by an unseen force that plays with fate like a gameboard.

The Realmwalkers.title: Skythief
The Realmwalkers.author: Matthew Wolf
The Realmwalkers.description: Seekers control the elemental forces of the world and must climb the World Tree for ultimate power. Dren, a ragtag thief from a dystopian world, is dropped into a land teeming with gods, monsters, magical creatures, and more....

Rune Seeker.title: Rune Seeker
Rune Seeker.author: J.M. Clarke, C.J. Thompson
Rune Seeker.description: The Everfail will rise. His enemies will fall. Hiral is the Everfail, the weakest person on the flying island of Fallen Reach. He trains harder than any warrior. Studies longer than any scholar. But all his people are born with magic powered by the sun, flowing through tattoos on their bodies...

Rune Seeker.title: Rune Seeker 4
Rune Seeker.author: C.J. Thompson, J.M. Clarke
Rune Seeker.description: In the battle of a lifetime, Hiral has proven his greatness; the traitors of his people have been defeated and a Fallen was prevented from carving a bloody path through the world.

Apocalypse Revisited.title: System Fall
Apocalypse Revisited.author: Kaz Hunter
Apocalypse Revisited.description: Fueled by memories of a fallen world and revenge, Nick takes on a quest to take down the all-powerful [Admin]. Armed with nothing more than his grit, his experience, and an unyielding will, his every decision becomes a high-stakes gamble in a world changed by the coming of the system....

Apocalypse Revisited.title: System Fall Volume 2
Apocalypse Revisited.author: Kaz Hunter
Apocalypse Revisited.description: In a world upended by the whims of the [Admin], all of humanity has been forced into a brutal game of survival. Nick is more than just another man: he's a man who saw the ending and used a wish to travel back in time. His story has started over.

Apocalypse Revisited.title: System Fall Volume 3: A LitRPG Adventure
Apocalypse Revisited.author: Kaz Hunter
Apocalypse Revisited.description: Nick Vandal faces his greatest challenge yet in the Risen Tower, a place of trials and floors designed to test the survivors' limits. As Nick and his new companions battle through casino mazes—and relentless hordes—they uncover the truth behind the Admin's grand design.

The Infinity Construct.title: Upgraded: The Infinity Construct, Book 2
The Infinity Construct.author: Burkley Orion Smith
The Infinity Construct.description: With the future of Infinity and the soul of humanity on the line, Ash will do everything he can to become strong enough to reach the key buried within the deepest bowels of hell. The only problem is, the more powerful he becomes, the more power he's starting to crave....

The Infinity Construct.title: Uprising
The Infinity Construct.author: Burkley Orion Smith
The Infinity Construct.description: His heart is dead, The Emperor's mighty army roams the lands with impunity, and Sabashton's puny 'rebellion' is in jeopardy of ending before it even gets started.

System Apocalypse Omnibus.title: The System Apocalypse Books 1-3
System Apocalypse Omnibus.author: Tao Wong
System Apocalypse Omnibus.description: The end of the world with dragons and Levels The world ends in a slew of blue notification boxes, bringing with it a game-like existence including monsters and Classes. Now, John has to make his way from Kluane National Park in the Yukon to Whitehorse through monster infested forests. But...

System Apocalypse Omnibus.title: The System Apocalypse: Books 4-6
System Apocalypse Omnibus.author: Tao Wong
System Apocalypse Omnibus.description: It's been over a year since the System came to Earth, bringing blood and monsters in equal measure. Having left Whitehorse, John and his team travel down to British Columbia, running into new dangers from aliens and humans alike....

System Apocalypse Omnibus.title: The System Apocalypse, Books 7-9
System Apocalypse Omnibus.author: Tao Wong
System Apocalypse Omnibus.description: The Galactic capital of Irvina is a place of deep politics and old, entrenched power structures. If there’s one thing John doesn’t do, it’s injustice and bureaucracy....

The Fallen World.title: Dungeon Engineer
The Fallen World.author: Playwars aka Alex S. Weber
The Fallen World.description: They thought sacrificing her would further their own goals. Instead, they changed an engineer into the single most powerful fabricator in existence, a dungeon core....

A Cultivation Gamelit Novel.title: Path Of Time Deviant Book 1
A Cultivation Gamelit Novel.author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
A Cultivation Gamelit Novel.description: Allen Ming awakens in an unfamiliar realm, trapped within an unfamiliar form—feeble in body and spirit. Thrust into a world of cultivation, Allen Ming finds himself grappling with a reality of a wastrel body, and a world filled with danger and killing....

A Cultivation Gamelit Novel.title: Path of Time Deviant Omnibus: Books 1-4
A Cultivation Gamelit Novel.author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
A Cultivation Gamelit Novel.description: Allen Ming awakens in an unfamiliar realm, trapped within an unfamiliar form—feeble in body and spirit. Thrust into a world of cultivation, Allen Ming finds himself grappling with a reality of a wastrel body, and a world filled with danger and killing.

A Cultivation Gamelit Novel.title: Path of Time Deviant: Book 2
A Cultivation Gamelit Novel.author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
A Cultivation Gamelit Novel.description: Allen Ming has conquered the first hurdle by finding a cultivation path uniquely his own. Yet, the real challenges are only beginning. Tasked with the delicate mission of regaining his grandmother's trust and ensuring his friends' safety, his responsibilities are immense.

A Cultivation Gamelit Novel.title: Path of Time Deviant Book 3
A Cultivation Gamelit Novel.author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
A Cultivation Gamelit Novel.description: Ming's win turns into a nightmare when he's ripped from his world and thrown into the dark realm of the Netherworld. Stripped of his cultivation powers, he must navigate this dangerous landscape to survive and find his way back to his home world.

A Cultivation Gamelit Novel.title: Path of Time Deviant Book 4
A Cultivation Gamelit Novel.author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
A Cultivation Gamelit Novel.description: In the last installment of this arc, Allen Ming faces his ultimate challenge. Out of Netherworld, he finds his world in turmoil—his love Ru Fiona on the verge of death, and his friends doubting his resolve.

Rise of Kers.title: Dungeon in the Clouds
Rise of Kers.author: Daniel Weber
Rise of Kers.description: When Kers is reborn as a dungeon core, he finds himself stuck in the most improbable of places: a cloud....
Rise of Kers.narrator: Justin Thomas James, Dorrie Sacks, Jeff Hays, Annie Ellicott

Rise of Kers.title: Empire in the Clouds
Rise of Kers.author: Daniel Weber
Rise of Kers.description: Kers’ dungeon flew too high. Now he has the attention of a god. Therrill, the ruling deity of the planet whose very atmosphere Kers resides in, is on the warpath, hellbent on his destruction. Worse, his dungeon fairy, Selena, has been taken captive and stands accused of treason.
Rise of Kers.narrator: Justin Thomas James, Annie Ellicott, Jeff Hays, Dorrie Sacks

System Bound.title: Apocalypse Station Vol. 1: A LitRPG Adventure
System Bound.author: Kaz Hunter
System Bound.description: Asher's ordinary life is shattered when he is suddenly yanked from his daily commute and thrust into a brutal world of monstrous creatures, deadly traps, and the relentless games of the Nexus....

System Bound.title: Apocalypse Station Vol. 2: A LitRPG Adventure
System Bound.author: Kaz Hunter
System Bound.description: Asher's impossible journey continues as he dives deeper into the ruthless world of the Nexus in Apocalypse Station—Nexus Unveiled. His once ordinary life is now a distant memory, and the trials and battles of the deadly train station have honed his strength and wit....

Demon Core.title: Demon Core: A Dungeon-Core LitRPG
Demon Core.author: D. M. Rhodes, Razzmatazz
Demon Core.description: Shattered by tragedy, consumed with rage, a young man surrenders his soul for the power to destroy humanity in the first novel of this dark fantasy series....

Demon Core.title: Demon Core 2: A Dungeon-Core LitRPG
Demon Core.author: D. M. Rhodes, Razzmatazz
Demon Core.description: An army of darkness marches across the land, wrought by the fury of a demonic young man bent on vengeance, in the second book of this grimdark fantasy....

Climbing the Ranks.title: Climbing the Ranks
Climbing the Ranks.author: Tao Wong
Climbing the Ranks.description: When the Towers arrived, without warning, without communication of intent or indication of reasoning, chaos ensued....

Climbing the Ranks.title: Climbing the Ranks 2
Climbing the Ranks.author: Tao Wong
Climbing the Ranks.description: Arthur's cleared the first floor of the dungeon. More than that, with his new ally in Cassie Chin, he's got a real chance of building his Clan. The problem is, his alliance is contingent on them pushing ahead fast to allow the Chin to make full use of their Clan Halls.

Climbing the Ranks.title: Climbing the Ranks 3
Climbing the Ranks.author: Tao Wong
Climbing the Ranks.description: For Arthur, climbing the beginner Tower of Malaysia was a way out, a chance to escape the grinding poverty of a future with no jobs. It's a chance to make something of himself. Then he received a Clan seal, became a leader by accident, and most importantly, became responsible for others.

System Apocalypse: Kismet.title: Fool's Play
System Apocalypse: Kismet.author: Tao Wong, David R. Packer
System Apocalypse: Kismet.description: Not everyone falls during an apocalypse. Some rise to the occasion. For Fool and Jackal, the System Apocalypse was a chance to start again. A chance to rise, and be who they were meant to be....

System Apocalypse: Kismet.title: Fool's Bond
System Apocalypse: Kismet.author: Tao Wong, David R. Packer
System Apocalypse: Kismet.description: Fool and Jackal returned, triumphant from their latest mission. As a reward, they get to babysit a spoiled rich kid as he levels up and maybe becomes a valuable asset. An easy job, until the Armageddon cultists showed up.

System Apocalypse: Kismet.title: Fool's Last Dance
System Apocalypse: Kismet.author: Tao Wong, David R. Packer
System Apocalypse: Kismet.description: When the end comes for Fool and Jackal, they’re going out with style. Past plans set in motion ago are coming to a head faster than expected. The Foundation has sent Fool and Jackal to Vancouver on another easy, simple mission. It's anything but.

Silver Fox & The Western Hero.title: Silver Fox & The Western Hero: Warrior's Peril
Silver Fox & The Western Hero.author: M.H. Johnson
Silver Fox & The Western Hero.description: Alex had done it. Ascending farther than anyone had thought possible, earning a title as sacred as the right to rule within the Golden Realms. But there was no way his enemies would accept his ascension. Not after he had disrupted so many of their twisted plans....

Tree of Aeons.title: Tree of Aeons 4
Tree of Aeons.author: SpaizZzer
Tree of Aeons.description: Aeon attempts to find the origins of the demons, and ventures into the other realms through the void sea. Join Aeon and the Order as he builds an institution able to protect their own worlds, and take the fight back to the demon controlled worlds.

Tree of Aeons.title: Tree of Aeons 5: An Isekai LitRPG Adventure
Tree of Aeons.author: SpaizZzer
Tree of Aeons.description: Aeon and the Valthorns expand their reach to the neighboring worlds. They meet new people, new friends, new enemies, and encounter unusual races and creatures, and along the way, they accumulate more power, and build up their war potential.

Tree of Aeons.title: Tree of Aeons 6: An Isekai LitRPG Adventure
Tree of Aeons.author: SpaizZzer
Tree of Aeons.description: Aeon's expansion has finally attracted the attention of the demons, and they've sent a demonic comet headed towards Aeon's world. Aeon and the Order will now have to plan, build new weapons and tools, expand their forces, learn new powers, and equip themselves to deal with the massive comet that...

Tree of Aeons.title: Tree of Aeons 7: An Isekai LitRPG Adventure
Tree of Aeons.author: SpaizZzer
Tree of Aeons.description: Book 7 of an epic reincarnation/isekai LitRPG story about a man who becomes a tree, growing and progressing throughout the ages in an eternal conflict against a demon incursion.

Warped Earth.title: Apocalypse Cultivator: The Complete Series
Warped Earth.author: Jack Bryce
Warped Earth.description: The world is changing, and it needs a new Alpha. It needs me. I was doing well enough before the Apocalypse, but fast cars and penthouses mean nothing when the world changes into a wasteland filled with parasite-infested mutants....

Theos.title: Becoming a God Made Easy: A Cultivation-Esque LitRPG
Theos.author: Arthur Wordsmith
Theos.description: A young man's death is only the beginning when he elects to pursue divinity in a realm where gods and monsters are all too real....

Theos.title: The Games of Olympus: A Cultivation-Esque LitRPG
Theos.author: Arthur Wordsmith
Theos.description: In a mythical world full of deities and monsters, a young warrior proves his mettle in battle, forging his legend on a quest for godhood.

The Last Psion.title: Defunct: A Cultivation Saga
The Last Psion.author: Maxwell Farmer
The Last Psion.description: A young half-elf learns he's the secret heir of a murdered king and resolves to claim his father's magic and save his country in this progression fantasy....

The Last Psion.title: Ruby: A Cultivation Saga
The Last Psion.author: Maxwell Farmer
The Last Psion.description: Two friends—one an orc prince whose ancestral throne is threatened, the other an exiled half-elf—must fight to regain their families' power.

The Last Psion.title: Sapphire: A Cultivation Saga
The Last Psion.author: Maxwell Farmer
The Last Psion.description: Kiru the half-elf has traveled the length and breadth of Alterra—a world born from the ruins of Ragnarok and a long-gone Earth—searching for the lost treasures of his father, the slain King Ruken.

I'm Not the Hero.title: Secrets and Strife: An Isekai LitRPG
I'm Not the Hero.author: SourpatchHero, Tommy Kerper
I'm Not the Hero.description: The nonstop action and antics continue—and the hero-sidekick relationship is turned on its head—in the second installment of this thrilling fantasy series.

I'm Not the Hero.title: An Education in Magical Affairs: An Isekai LitRPG
I'm Not the Hero.author: SourpatchHero, Tommy Kerper
I'm Not the Hero.description: On Earth, the scrawny Orrin may have been a big nothing, but he had a bigger buddy in his athletic bestie, Daniel. They were inseparable, like two sides of the same coin. But when a tragic accident transported them to an RPG-like reality, that coin got seriously flipped.

I'm Not the Hero.title: A Hero's Choice: An Isekai LitRPG
I'm Not the Hero.author: Tommy Kerper, SourpatchHero
I'm Not the Hero.description: A former nobody is about to become a major somebody—and learn it's not all it's cracked up to be—in the fourth installment of this LitRPG fantasy adventure.

I'm Not the Hero.title: Crucible of Sundered Loyalties: An Isekai LitRPG
I'm Not the Hero.author: Tommy Kerper, SourpatchHero
I'm Not the Hero.description: In the fifth book of this fantasy adventure, the journey's not over just because a big boss battle is won.

Divine Progression Series.title: Truth Seeker
Divine Progression Series.author: Jake Brannigan
Divine Progression Series.description: After uncovering a conspiracy that shakes his beliefs to their foundation, Glenn Graybreaker chooses to become a Truth Seeker: an elite Blazer tasked with investigating crimes and solving mysteries that baffle others.

Divine Progression Series.title: Champion
Divine Progression Series.author: Jake Brannigan
Divine Progression Series.description: To save his best friend, he must defeat the best of the best. Despite his heroic efforts, Glenn Graybreaker’s only chance to resurrect his best friend is now to compete, and win, in the prestigious Sandsea Cup. If he and Becka can place highly in this tournament of duels, mazes, and monster...

Immortality Starts With Generosity.title: Immortality Starts with Generosity
Immortality Starts With Generosity.author: Plutus
Immortality Starts With Generosity.description: A lost soul from Earth transmigrates into a world of cultivation and finds himself in the body of a playboy noble who is wasting his life. Except Chen Haoran doesn't have any memories, can't let anyone know he's not the same person, and is immediately involved in a conspiracy....

Immortality Starts With Generosity.title: Immortality Starts with Generosity 3: A Cultivation Progression Fantasy
Immortality Starts With Generosity.author: Plutus
Immortality Starts With Generosity.description: The third installment of a Cultivation fantasy series with a unique progression system starring an MC who gains power through gifting things to others.

Unblood.title: Unblood Cultivator
Unblood.author: Scribes Of Sulterra
Unblood.description: Trapped in a hidden realm, Kiran and his sworn family must escape to save their world from destruction. The gods are watching him and his time twin Asher closely. With allies new and old, they must rise to the challenge, growing stronger to win a tournament where they are the underdogs....

Unintended Cultivator.title: Unintended Cultivator, Volume One
Unintended Cultivator.author: Eric Dontigney
Unintended Cultivator.description: Sen never dreamed of ascension. Such were the aspirations of the rich young nobles, not orphans like him, scraping together a meager living on the streets of Orchard’s Reach. However, when destiny takes an unexpected turn, Sen finds himself thrust into the role of a cultivator’s disciple....

Garden Core.title: Green Dungeon
Garden Core.author: M.E. Merrell
Garden Core.description: Master Gardener Jennifer Conners is transported to a magical world to rebuild a dungeon filled with fairies and nymphs. Unfortunately, a past enemy of the dungeon will stop at nothing to destroy her....

Garden Core.title: Blue World
Garden Core.author: M.E. Merrell
Garden Core.description: The Green Dungeon thrived. Despite the Council's attempt to destroy her, Jennifer Conners, a Blue World soul, remained a viable Dungeon Core in Green World.

All the Dust That Falls.title: All the Dust that Falls 3
All the Dust That Falls.author: zaifyr zaifyr
All the Dust That Falls.description: In the aftermath of a harrowing battle against a relentless undead horde, Spot, our valiant warrior, delves deeper into the shadows to cleanse the lingering corruption. Meanwhile, Bee maintains their hard-won peace at home. Yet, the order they seek remains elusive. Their recent display of power...

All the Dust That Falls.title: All the Dust That Falls Four
All the Dust That Falls.author: zaifyr zaifyr
All the Dust That Falls.description: Spot and his loyal followers have defended their castle from danger. However, there is no time to rest. With home safe and the Kingdom's army swept away, they must press forward if they want to secure their future, even if it means war. Accompanied by their friends and allies, Spot and Beatrice...

Edge Cases.title: The Meaning of Life: A LitRPG Adventure
Edge Cases.author: Silver Linings
Edge Cases.description: Monsters and mysteries challenge everything four friends think they know about their crumbling magical world as this fantasy-adventure series continues.

Edge Cases.title: The Heart of Divinity: A LitRPG Adventure
Edge Cases.author: Silver Linings
Edge Cases.description: Four friends must rise up against the end of all things in the final installment of this epic fantasy-adventure series.

Modern Patriarch.title: Modern Patriarch
Modern Patriarch.author: Daoist Enigma
Modern Patriarch.description: When Yao Shen, Patriarch of the Heavenly Sky Sect, ascends and regains memories of his past life on Planet Earth, he realizes that he can no longer allow himself to accept the cruel and violent ways of Eliria, the realm of cultivation.

Modern Patriarch.title: Modern Patriarch 2
Modern Patriarch.author: Daoist Enigma
Modern Patriarch.description: Yao Shen, Grand Patriarch of the Modern Sect, succeeds in his bold attempt to unify the Azlak Plains.

My Children from Another World.title: Dusk: A Slice-of-Life Reverse Isekai
My Children from Another World.author: Payton Fletcher, _Glasses
My Children from Another World.description: Having narrowly avoided death, hero Rakta Velbrun must now save his lands, friends, and children, in the thrilling conclusion to an emotional isekai series.

Dungeon Life.title: Dungeon Life 2: An Isekai LitRPG
Dungeon Life.author: Khenal
Dungeon Life.description: Not long ago, the dungeon known as Thedeim was a mere human. But after an up-close-and-personal meeting with a runaway semitruck—he found himself in a new world, reincarnated as a run-down old house that just barely qualified as a dungeon.

Dungeon Life.title: Dungeon Life 3: An Isekai LitRPG
Dungeon Life.author: Khenal
Dungeon Life.description: The thrilling isekai adventure series delves ever deeper as a sentient dungeon core—once human—continues to grow in size, scope . . . and danger.

Dungeon Life.title: Dungeon Life 4: An Isekai LitRPG
Dungeon Life.author: Khenal
Dungeon Life.description: First, a man became a dungeon core, then the dungeon became a hero, and now comes another incredible level, as this thrilling isekai adventure continues.

Battle Trucker.title: The End of the Trucking World: An Apocalypse LitRPG
Battle Trucker.author: Tom Goldstein
Battle Trucker.description: It's humans against monsters in a high-octane race for survival in the second installment of this apocalyptic pedal-to-the-metal LitRPG adventure.

Manabound.title: Reverberations: An Isekai Adventure
Manabound.author: Travis Albrecht
Manabound.description: Separated as they were transported to a dangerous mythical world, a mother and daughter wield magic, fight against tyranny, and quest to find each other.

Manabound.title: Upheaval: An Isekai Adventure
Manabound.author: Travis Albrecht
Manabound.description: Transported into a fantastical realm populated by myths and monsters, a mother and daughter learn to use magic—and sow the seeds of revolution.

Only Villains Do That.title: The Revolution Will Be Isekai'd: An Isekai Adventure
Only Villains Do That.author: D. D. Webb
Only Villains Do That.description: Not long ago, Seiji was an ill-tempered, misanthropic man at war with the world. But then he was transported to a strange, savage realm for the purpose of literally making war on the world. In this reality, he's an extremely reluctant evil overlord with a temperamental goddess patron to please.

Only Villains Do That.title: The Goblins Are Revolting: An Isekai Adventure
Only Villains Do That.author: D. D. Webb
Only Villains Do That.description: In the third book of this brutally funny portal fantasy from the author of the Gods Are Bastards, even the most hideous of creatures can have value—sort of.

Empress.title: By the Sword: A World Conquest Isekai
Empress.author: J. V. Simms
Empress.description: In this follow-up to the hit isekai, a villain continues to find her power—and develop her sadism—even as she's haunted by her ex-love.

Empress.title: Divine Right: A World Conquest Isekai
Empress.author: J. V. Simms
Empress.description: In the stunning third installment of this hit fantasy adventure, a villainous tyrant at the height of her power has only two weaknesses: arrogance and love.

Heavy Metal Mana.title: Heavy Metal Mana 1
Heavy Metal Mana.author: Ace Strutton
Heavy Metal Mana.description: I was shredding a monster guitar solo then died on stage in a freak accident. Reborn, I discovered I was a mage with the power to control metal and kick ass! The Goddess of Chaos has set me loose in the Shimmerlands, a magic world under threat by a total buzzkill named Lord Manageer.

Heavy Metal Mana.title: Heavy Metal Mana 3
Heavy Metal Mana.author: Ace Strutton
Heavy Metal Mana.description: With Lord Manageer on the run, Luis and his ladies are in motion to hit the enemy with maximum force—but a new threat is looming. The undead of The Necromancer. Luis and his band of feisty mages must defeat The Necromancer's forces while also engineering the downfall of Lord Manageer himself.

Reborn as a Demonic Tree.title: Reborn as a Demonic Tree 3
Reborn as a Demonic Tree.author: XKarnation
Reborn as a Demonic Tree.description: Ashfallen's pills are attracting the wrong attention. With the conclusion of the alchemy tournament sparking the flames of a civil war between two of the most powerful families in the Blood Lotus Sect, Ashlock and his sect find themselves swept up in the conflict. Eager to rapidly increase their...

Reborn as a Demonic Tree.title: Reborn as a Demonic Tree 4
Reborn as a Demonic Tree.author: XKarnation
Reborn as a Demonic Tree.description: Ashlock is now half a step into the Nascent Soul Realm. With the long-spanning battle against Nox drawing to a close and the ex-merchant turning over a new leaf, Ashlock and his sect are on the cusp of becoming a regional powerhouse feared by all. However, before they can dominate the world...

Reborn as a Demonic Tree.title: Reborn as a Demonic Tree 5: An Isekai LitRPG Adventure
Reborn as a Demonic Tree.author: XKarnation
Reborn as a Demonic Tree.description: Ashlock's ascension to the Nascent Soul Realm attracts all the wrong attention. It turns out a spirit tree calling down the wrath of heavens and forming an Inner World is quite the spectacle, so Vincent Nightrose—an ancient threat that has loomed over Ashlock and his sect for far too...

Reborn as a Demonic Tree.title: Reborn as a Demonic Tree 6
Reborn as a Demonic Tree.author: XKarnation
Reborn as a Demonic Tree.description: There is a newborn evil god—and his name is Ashlock.

A Fantasy LitRPG Adventure.title: Reborn Noble Publisher's Pack
A Fantasy LitRPG Adventure.author: Kaz Hunter
A Fantasy LitRPG Adventure.description: Jäger Paldane was destined to be a footnote in history about the disgrace of his noble house. But fate offered a dark bargain. Reborn into his past with knowledge of a grim future, he's granted a chance to rewrite destiny.

A Fantasy LitRPG Adventure.title: System Reborn Vol 3 & 4
A Fantasy LitRPG Adventure.author: Kaz Hunter
A Fantasy LitRPG Adventure.description: The echoes of betrayal still ring loud, but vengeance is within reach. The thirst for power grows. The call for allies intensifies. Reunited with his purpose, Sloan's ascent continues.

A Fantasy LitRPG Adventure.title: System Reborn Vol 5, 6, 7
A Fantasy LitRPG Adventure.author: Kaz Hunter
A Fantasy LitRPG Adventure.description: After saving the world and defeating his enemies, Sloan has gained an incredible title and unmatched power in the system. Enjoying a decade of peace, his calm life is suddenly disrupted, pushing him towards a new journey and a new mission.

Reborn.title: Reborn in Flames
Reborn.author: M. Sinclair
Reborn.description: My sadistic mother and god-fearing father believe I have the devil inside of me because I heal after their abuse. I accepted long ago I would die in the very place I'd been born without ever feeling the sun on my skin.

Reborn.title: Reborn
Reborn.author: Zoe Townley
Reborn.description: He remembers dying. He remembers darkness. And then…he woke up inside of an egg. Reborn as a dragon in a realm of magic and knights, this plucky fellow doesn’t appreciate his new murderous siblings....

Reborn.title: Reborn
Reborn.author: Zoe Townley
Reborn.description: Bound by a name, driven by a desire to become more, Cecily and Frost have survived their first battle and come out stronger for it. However, the bond they share comes with more than a way to communicate and a life long friendship; it comes with a death sentence....

Hell Difficulty Tutorial.title: Hell Difficulty Tutorial
Hell Difficulty Tutorial.author: Cerim
Hell Difficulty Tutorial.description: Nathaniel's bus ride was supposed to be just another boring commute. Wrong. Now, he, 23 fellow passengers, and a corgi named Biscuit, are stuck in a "Hell Difficulty" Tutorial, battling monsters and leveling up to survive.

Hell Difficulty Tutorial.title: Hell Difficulty Tutorial 5
Hell Difficulty Tutorial.author: Cerim
Hell Difficulty Tutorial.description: Five rules. Five ways to die. And one cockroach that just won't quit.

Arc.title: Arc the SS Tier Heroine 1
Arc.author: Azrie
Arc.description: Arc was an ordinary young woman from Earth when she was summoned to an icy hell where she fought for her survival in the name of training to become a hero.

Arc.title: Arc the SS Tier Heroine 2
Arc.author: Azrie
Arc.description: Having just dealt with the pesky Dragon of Frost, Arc declares herself the new ruler of the dragons to snuff all her problems at the core and seek the entrance to the Forgotten Places, the place where the corruption resides, all to grow stronger.

Arc.title: Arc the SS Tier Heroine Book 3: An OP MC Isekai LitRPG
Arc.author: Azrie
Arc.description: The world below, where the corruption resides, a graveyard of worlds; it has many names, but it's now known as the Forgotten Places...

Cosmic Games.title: Cosmic Games: An Isekai LitRPG
Cosmic Games.author: Wilbur Woods
Cosmic Games.description: Max Cromwell was only fifteen when his mother died of cancer. Angry and depressed, he spent the rest of his teenage years a rebellious troublemaker, neglecting school and playing video games. Having barely earned his high school diploma, he didn't even attempt applying to college.

Cosmic Games.title: Deathmatch
Cosmic Games.author: Wilbur Woods
Cosmic Games.description: To save Earth from extinction, a young warrior must evolve beyond his own humanity into something more powerful—and frightening—in this portal fantasy.

Cosmic Games.title: Celestials: An Isekai LitRPG
Cosmic Games.author: Wilbur Woods
Cosmic Games.description: Max became a living weapon to save humanity from an alien threat—only to discover the fate of the entire universe rests in his hands—in this portal fantasy.

Resistance Above Magic.title: Resistance Above Magic: A LitRPG Adventure
Resistance Above Magic.author: B.T. Narro
Resistance Above Magic.description: Determination is what made Levy a traveler, but only resistance will lead to new levels. Ancient powers are about to collide. The world is on the verge of changing, and all Levy wants is to start leveling.

Resistance Above Magic.title: Resistance Above Magic 3: A LitRPG Adventure
Resistance Above Magic.author: B.T. Narro
Resistance Above Magic.description: When Levy finds himself transported to an unknown place, discoveries of the past will soon shape the future—but it may not be the future that Levy was planning for.

The Exlian Syndrome Series.title: Advent
The Exlian Syndrome Series.author: Seth Ring
The Exlian Syndrome Series.description: From bestselling LitRPG author Seth Ring—creator of the Titan and Battle Mage Farmer series—Advent is the first in an epic new series of alien contact, fast-paced military action, and thrilling adventure that will leave listeners hungry for more.

The Exlian Syndrome Series.title: Apex: A Fantasy LitRPG Adventure
The Exlian Syndrome Series.author: Seth Ring
The Exlian Syndrome Series.description: From bestselling LitRPG author Seth Ring—creator of the Titan series and Battle Mage Farmer—comes Apex, the third book in the epic new series of alien contact, fast-paced military action, and thrilling adventure.

The Exlian Syndrome Series.title: Evolution
The Exlian Syndrome Series.author: Seth Ring
The Exlian Syndrome Series.description: From bestselling LitRPG author Seth Ring—creator of the Titan series and Battle Mage Farmer—comes the epic fourth installment in this thrilling series of alien contact, fast-paced military action, and superhuman adventure.

The Exlian Syndrome Series.title: Shattered Glory
The Exlian Syndrome Series.author: Seth Ring
The Exlian Syndrome Series.description: From bestselling LitRPG author Seth Ring—creator of the Titan and Battle Mage Farmer series—comes the next thrilling escapade in an epic series of alien contact, fast-paced military action, and superhuman adventure.

Odyssey of the Ethereal.title: The Tower of Moros: A Progression Fantasy
Odyssey of the Ethereal.author: Jamie Kojola
Odyssey of the Ethereal.description: Now that the Tower of Aetherius has been cleared, Aetheria, daughter of Aetherius and Nyx, has another tower to climb: the Tower of Moros, god of doom. Luckily, the Challenger of Aetherius is more powerful than ever....

Odyssey of the Ethereal.title: Despair's Demise: A Progression Fantasy
Odyssey of the Ethereal.author: Jamie Kojola
Odyssey of the Ethereal.description: With seven gods down, only the Overgod is left, in the last installment of this witty isekai adventure series.

The Connected System.title: Warbreaker's Risk
The Connected System.author: Troy Osgood
The Connected System.description: The Connected System has come to Earth and adapted humanity to be able to survive and try to Advance and Thrive in the Connection. With new Classes and Abilities; Lochlan Brady, his family and the rest of humanity will face challenges and threats from myths and beyond. Loch and his daughters...

The Connected System.title: Warbreaker's Rage
The Connected System.author: Troy Osgood
The Connected System.description: Lochlan Brady and his daughters have faced some of those dangers and worked to build a place where they and other survivors can start to rebuild civilization.

System Reborn.title: System Reborn Vol 1 & 2
System Reborn.author: Kaz Hunter
System Reborn.description: Ten years ago, deep within a rift, a choice was granted. Defeat the Demon King and end the apocalypse. Or take his power for themselves and keep the rifts open. Sloan chose an ending. His party turned against him. They killed him. They split his legacy and belongings amongst themselves.

Terminate the Other World!.title: Imperial Entanglements
Terminate the Other World!.author: Icalos
Terminate the Other World!.description: A lethal killing machine gets in touch with her feelings as this action-packed progression fantasy continues.

Terminate the Other World!.title: Heart of the Machine: A Humorous Isekai LitRPG
Terminate the Other World!.author: Icalos
Terminate the Other World!.description: The line between one cyborg's machinery and humanity grows perilously thin—and deadly—as this action-packed LitRPG adventure series continues.

Terminate the Other World!.title: The New Dawn: A Humorous Isekai LitRPG
Terminate the Other World!.author: Icalos
Terminate the Other World!.description: A one-woman war machine wreaks havoc while exploring her all-too-human heart in the final installment of this fight-filled LitRPG adventure series.

Magical Girl Undergrad.title: Oaths and Outfits: A Superhero Slice-of-Life LitRPG
Magical Girl Undergrad.author: Aest Belequa
Magical Girl Undergrad.description: There's one timeslot available for Magical Girls in the network's minor leagues, and Magical Girl Understudy Anika DuPont's alien producer wants Heroics 101 to fill it. But a rival superhero and his producer want the slot too.

Magical Girl Undergrad.title: The Last Power War: A Superhero Slice-of-Life LitRPG
Magical Girl Undergrad.author: Aest Belequa
Magical Girl Undergrad.description: With the final Power War at hand and human Extras in peril, Magical Girl Understudy must choose between her role . . . and her mission.

I Should Have Read the EULA.title: I Should Have Read the EULA 3
I Should Have Read the EULA.series: I Should Have Read the EULA
I Should Have Read the EULA.author: Keegan Connelly
I Should Have Read the EULA.description: After cleansing the Argent Spire and driving out the hellspawn attempting to establish a foothold in Lor, Sebastian was hoping for some time to rest and enjoy the good things in life. Unfortunately, time is in short supply, and there’s no rest for the wicked.

Bog Standard Isekai.title: Bog Standard Isekai: Scarred
Bog Standard Isekai.author: Miles English
Bog Standard Isekai.description: Mark’s new life begins in the worst possible place—a burned-out village haunted by undead. Each morning these ravenous creatures disappear, only to return at night, driven by a relentless hunger.

Bog Standard Isekai.title: Bog Standard Isekai: Illusionist
Bog Standard Isekai.author: Miles English
Bog Standard Isekai.description: Brin is scarred, but no longer alone. After giving up his evil Rare Class in exchange for the simple and common Glasser, he’s finally been accepted by the people of Hammon’s Bog. But acceptance doesn't guarantee safety.

Bog Standard Isekai.title: Bog Standard Isekai: Nightmares
Bog Standard Isekai.author: Miles English
Bog Standard Isekai.description: The battle of Hammon's Bog is over. The town is free, the undead destroyed, the Witches slain, and the surviving villagers are picking up the remains of their lives.

Bog Standard Isekai.title: Bog Standard Isekai: Benighted
Bog Standard Isekai.author: Miles English
Bog Standard Isekai.description: Brin has conquered the nightmares that once plagued him, and now his goal is to master the power of his class—illusion. With a new skill that lets him split his mind and juggle multiple thoughts, his imagination is the only limit.

Deadworld Isekai.title: Deadworld Isekai: A Sci-Fi LitRPG Adventure
Deadworld Isekai.author: R. C. Joshua
Deadworld Isekai.description: Matt's in the prime of his life. So when his doctor tells him he only has months to live, he figures it's just really bad luck. But it's about to get a whole lot worse. When Matt's Earthly form finally expires, a truck-avatar system gives him the opportunity to become a hero....

Deadworld Isekai.title: Deadworld Isekai 2: A Sci-Fi LitRPG Adventure
Deadworld Isekai.author: R. C. Joshua
Deadworld Isekai.description: The author of How to Survive at the End of the World continues this fast-paced isekai series about a dead man who somehow ends up in charge of a dead world.

Deadworld Isekai.title: Deadworld Isekai 3: A Sci-Fi LitRPG Adventure
Deadworld Isekai.author: R. C. Joshua
Deadworld Isekai.description: When Matt was first sent to Gaia—a lifeless garden planet that had been consumed by system meddling—his only goal was to stay alive. Through a combination of grit, ingenuity, and a lot of help from his guardian, Lucy, he's managed to not only survive the worst but also thrive.

Reborn as the Black Knight.title: Reborn as the Black Knight: Volume 2
Reborn as the Black Knight.author: D. M. Rhodes
Reborn as the Black Knight.description: I was reincarnated in a fantasy world as the manifestation of absolute void—the Black Knight—and my goal is to return the destitute, sickly youngest-born princess to her throne because it beats doing nothing.

Towers of Orion.title: Soul Knight
Towers of Orion.author: JJ Bookerson
Towers of Orion.description: Reborn in a crypt, Nick was given an ancient heritage and an important task: to become king, and make the Archaens rise again. Nick was now the last one, and he would need to find allies by forming Soul Pacts with both followers and wives.

Towers of Orion.title: Soul Knight 4
Towers of Orion.author: J J Bookerson
Towers of Orion.description: Having liberated Shadowvale and cleansed Silverbrook of bandits, Nick's heroic deeds have made Frosthaven a true beacon of hope. And somehow, far too much attention from a group of priestesses and a giantess who walks loudly and carries a big stick.

Sponsored Apocalypse.title: Sponsored Apocalypse 2
Sponsored Apocalypse.author: Blaise Corvin
Sponsored Apocalypse.description: Miles “Shrug” Lindstrom has endured the first few days of his new monster-infested world.
