He has become the Champion of a god, and managed to become one of the most powerful survivors in his area. However, a new quest to kill a giant—a boss monster—will be difficult if not impossible to accomplish.

Death: Genesis.title: Death: Genesis 7: An Isekai LitRPG
Death: Genesis.author: Nicholas Searcy
Death: Genesis.description: A young warrior risks his life and soul to develop his arcane knowledge—and destructive power—in this dark fantasy adventure.

Death: Genesis.title: Death: Genesis 8: An Isekai LitRPG
Death: Genesis.author: Nicholas Searcy
Death: Genesis.description: In pursuit of magical power, a young warrior finds himself waging war on behalf of a subjugated people—and becoming a king—in this dark-fantasy adventure.

Death: Genesis.title: Death: Genesis 9: An Isekai LitRPG
Death: Genesis.author: Nicholas Searcy
Death: Genesis.description: Joining a long lost companion, a young champion embarks on a quest that will increase his godlike power—and challenge his humanity—in this dark fantasy.

Death: Genesis.title: Death: Genesis 10: An Isekai LitRPG
Death: Genesis.author: Nicholas Searcy
Death: Genesis.description: A young champion declares war against a tyrannical empire, bringing him into conflict with the woman he once loved in this dark fantasy adventure.

Death: Genesis.title: Death: Genesis 11: An Isekai LitRPG
Death: Genesis.author: Nicholas Searcy
Death: Genesis.description: To ascend to godhood, Zeke must first descend into Hell—and face torment like never before—in the penultimate volume of this dark fantasy adventure series.

Death: Genesis.title: Death: Genesis 12: An Isekai LitRPG
Death: Genesis.author: Nicholas Searcy
Death: Genesis.description: At long last Zeke Blackwood has become a primordial. He wields mana powerful enough to combat the gods of the Ethereal Realm and prevent the destruction of the universe. The quest has taken many lifetimes.

The Tower Series.title: Challenger
The Tower Series.author: Seth Ring
The Tower Series.description: Challenger is the seventh installment in the bestselling Tower Series, a GameLit/LitRPG saga by Seth Ring, the acclaimed author of Battle Mage Farmer and The Titan series. Set in the vibrant world of Nova Terra, this series features the unforgettable character Thorn.

The Tower Series.title: Warborn
The Tower Series.author: Seth Ring
The Tower Series.description: Warborn is the ninth book in the Tower Series, a GameLit/LitRPG series from Seth Ring, bestselling author of Battle Mage Farmer and The Titan series, set in the world of Nova Terra and starring the unforgettable Thorn.

The Tower Series.title: Imperator
The Tower Series.author: Seth Ring
The Tower Series.description: From Seth Ring, bestselling author of Battle Mage Farmer and The Titan series, Imperator is the tenth book in the Tower Series, a GameLit/LitRPG series set in the world of Nova Terra and starring the unforgettable Thorn.

The Tower Series.title: Incorruptible
The Tower Series.author: Seth Ring
The Tower Series.description: Incorruptible is the eleventh book in the Tower Series, a GameLit/LitRPG series from Seth Ring, bestselling author of Battle Mage Farmer and The Titan series, set in the world of Nova Terra and starring the unforgettable Thorn.

Rogue Merchant.title: Rogue Merchant: Books 1-3
Rogue Merchant.author: Roman Prokofiev
Rogue Merchant.description: This 3-in-1 audiobook box set includes books one through three of the Rogue Merchant LitRPG series, where a common trader named Cat uses his quick wit and trading talents to wriggle out of trouble. Book 1: The Starlight Sword In the first book of this classic might-and-magic-style LitRPG series...

Rogue Merchant.title: Rogue Merchant: Books 4-7
Rogue Merchant.author: Roman Prokofiev
Rogue Merchant.description: This 4-in-1 audiobook box set includes books four through seven of the Rogue Merchant LitRPG series, following a trader named Cat on his journey to find the lost Keys to the Sphere of Words: Battle for the North, The Devil Archetype, The Dreamweaver, and The Starlight Fleet.

The Llama Glama Gang.title: Isekai Crafter
The Llama Glama Gang.author: Marshal Carper
The Llama Glama Gang.description: Stumbling upon a gate to a magical new world is a dream come true. At least, it should be. Marshal is a student who often retreats into manga to escape reality. What could he ask for but to be transported to a new fantasy world.

Mirror World Progression Saga.title: The Mirror World Progression Saga Omnibus: Books 1-3
Mirror World Progression Saga.author: Rain Harlow
Mirror World Progression Saga.description: Sammy struggled through college until she's magically transported to another realm. In this new world, she's been transformed into the wholly (holy?) different form of a goddess.

Mirror World Progression Saga.title: Goddess Rising
Mirror World Progression Saga.author: Rain Harlow
Mirror World Progression Saga.description: The Goddess rises up through the ashes of dead divinity to light a beacon for a world of ancient shadows. To conquer the reflections beyond, she must face the one that lies in the mirror.

Mirror World Progression Saga.title: Goddess Charging
Mirror World Progression Saga.author: Rain Harlow
Mirror World Progression Saga.description: Key allies rescued from the darkness, the Goddess of Mirrors and Fate turns to the bright, new future she dreams of. The road ahead is long, but she runs to it all the same.

Mirror World Progression Saga.title: Goddess Expansion
Mirror World Progression Saga.author: Rain Harlow
Mirror World Progression Saga.description: After the harrowing events of a fateful encounter with the very best of the Dominion wizards and psionicists, the Goddess Samantha and her realm must deal with the fallout. Souls, as always.

Mirror World Progression Saga.title: Goddess Alchemy
Mirror World Progression Saga.author: Rain Harlow
Mirror World Progression Saga.description: The heart of a war-like people claimed by a new Face of the Goddess after her heroic, brutal slaying of a corrupted legend, the Goddess moves to press her advantage. War is coming.

Mirror World Progression Saga.title: Goddess Soaring
Mirror World Progression Saga.author: Rain Harlow
Mirror World Progression Saga.description: A tower shall rise. It has countless times before. This must be the last, never to fall, persisting forever… The ambitions of The Goddess ascend ever higher — she has her new Heaven, but its purpose remains to take the world.

The Divine Elements.title: The Blood Legacy
The Divine Elements.author: Daman
The Divine Elements.description: Calron is turning eight soon... will he awaken as an accursed Lightning Cultivator or does fate have something else in store for him?

The Divine Elements.title: Divine Elements Omnibus: Books 1-5: An OP MC Xianxia
The Divine Elements.author: Daman
The Divine Elements.description: Books 1-5 in the Divine Elements an OP MC Xianxia series are now available in this special omnibus bundle, filled with action, adventure, and epic cultivation!

The Divine Elements.title: The Desolate Mountains
The Divine Elements.author: Daman
The Divine Elements.description: Continue Calron's gripping journey as he confronts his haunting past, unravels enigmatic secrets within, and fights his inner demons as his true heritage is revealed. Could he still maintain his sanity after finding out?

The Divine Elements.title: Scion of Raizel
The Divine Elements.author: Daman
The Divine Elements.description: After finding out that there might be other members of his family out in the world, Calron sets out to seek his long-lost blood clan and finally discover the truth about his mysterious ancestor and their overbearing bloodline....

The Divine Elements.title: Rebellion of Darklings
The Divine Elements.author: Daman
The Divine Elements.description: With the threat of another Divine Element Cultivator and the looming presence of a Shadow Immortal, Calron must prepare an army if he's to survive the future. His Cultivation will not be enough as he enters the political sea of the royal court with sharks swimming all around him.

The Divine Elements.title: Path Walker
The Divine Elements.author: Daman
The Divine Elements.description: Calron has an important decision to make. The choice he makes will put him at direct odds with the Gods and the Primordials. The more he learns about his new Path Walker abilities, the more Calron begins to question the motives of the original four Titans.

Rogue Ascension.title: Rogue Ascension 5: A Progression LitRPG
Rogue Ascension.author: Hunter Mythos
Rogue Ascension.description: Joey Eclipse is the #1 beginner with a list of achievements that's hard to believe. All while in an apocalypse where the multiverse integrates whole universes and initiates countless humans to its game-like realms of limitless magic.

Rogue Ascension.title: Rogue Ascension 6: A Progression LitRPG
Rogue Ascension.author: Hunter Mythos
Rogue Ascension.description: As the Greatest Beginner, Joey Eclipse had the best First Ascension anyone at Level 100 could hope for. This is after an apocalypse where the multiverse integrates whole universes and initiates countless humans to its game-like realms of limitless magic.

Rogue Ascension.title: Rogue Ascension 7: A Progression LitRPG
Rogue Ascension.author: Hunter Mythos
Rogue Ascension.description: [Last Time in Multiverse Z!] A Shade Dragon Rogue and his battle partner wife slayed a demonic kill squad on their way to face an Unbeatable Demon Princess!

Rogue Ascension.title: Rogue Ascension 8: A Progression LitRPG
Rogue Ascension.author: Hunter Mythos
Rogue Ascension.description: [Last Time in Multiverse Z!] The Multiverse Crawlers slayed three major Demon Rulers back to back after paying a heavy price.

A Gamer's Guide to Beating the Tutorial.title: Step 2: Lust: A LitRPG Adventure
A Gamer's Guide to Beating the Tutorial.series: A Gamer's Guide to Beating the Tutorial
A Gamer's Guide to Beating the Tutorial.author: Palt
A Gamer's Guide to Beating the Tutorial.description: Unlike the challenges Lo Fennrick has faced so far, the one that lies ahead can't be solved with brute force and manslaughter, in this dark fantasy LitRPG.

System Apocalypse: Liberty.title: Head of the Class
System Apocalypse: Liberty.author: Tao Wong, Jason J. Willis
System Apocalypse: Liberty.description: Caleb Hanson assumed the most exciting part of his field trip scouting in Northern Minnesota would be a rare bird sighting. Instead, he was abducted by hive-minded hexapods and forced to be their children's teacher. Not the worst way to ride out the end of the world.

Beastborne.title: Tower of Blight
Beastborne.author: James T. Callum
Beastborne.description: Though the Abyss beckons to Hal, an old foe resurfaces. Poisoning his home, the Shadesblight cannot be ignored. The Tower of Blight will corrupt the entirety of the Shiverglades if Hal does not stop it.

Iron Tyrant.title: Chain of Feathers
Iron Tyrant.author: Seth Ring
Iron Tyrant.description: Cast into a brutal military camp by his once loving master, Mateo feels like the last six wonderful years of his life have been a lie. With the mysteries surrounding him growing, Mateo knows that his only option is to become one of the supernaturally powerful Duelists.

Iron Tyrant.title: Falling Gold
Iron Tyrant.author: Seth Ring
Iron Tyrant.description: Torn apart, both body and soul, and bound to the figure and memories of the Fifth Prince of the Empire of Kell, Mateo has been thrust into the center of a political maelstrom.

A Student Wants to Live.title: A Student Wants to Live: Books 4-6
A Student Wants to Live.author: Boris Romanovsky
A Student Wants to Live.description: This 3-in-1 audiobook box set includes books four through six of A Student Wants to Live, a post-apocalyptic LitRPG series featuring Andrew First, a college student turned clan leader: The War of the Clans, Level Run, and Blood Emperor.

The System School.title: System School: The Complete Series
The System School.author: Kos Play
The System School.description: Melvin Murphy is your average everyday teen... until he finds the System. Melvin has normal problems. High School. Tests. Trying to find a girlfriend (and failing... miserably). But one day he awakens with access to a System that governs all magic.

This Academy Extra.title: How I, a Normal High School Student, Went to Royal Academy and Avoided Being Trapped in Hiatus Vol. 6: A LitRPG Adventure
This Academy Extra.author: Kal Griffith
This Academy Extra.description: In the sixth volume of This Academy Extra, Samson has to step into a role he never expected. He's no longer just a character in My Royal Academia; he's become its protector, guarding the author's original vision from the looming threat of syndication and destructive monetization.

Ends of Magic.title: Assassin
Ends of Magic.author: Alexander Olson
Ends of Magic.description: Nathan and his companions are free. For now. They're trapped inside the fortress-city of Halsmet, and every mage of Giantsrest is hunting for them. Luckily enough, they've been found by Faline, the shapeshifting leader of the Assassins of Gemore.

Ends of Magic.title: Anarchist
Ends of Magic.author: Alexander Olson
Ends of Magic.description: With an army marching on the liberated city of Halsmet, Nathan and his allies are prepared to fight to the death. Giantsrest may have overwhelming magical might, helmed by the nearly immortal archmage Badud—but Nathan has a few tricks of his own.

Ends of Magic.title: Aspirant
Ends of Magic.author: Alexander Olson
Ends of Magic.description: The Ascendent Academy has fallen, but Nathan's journey is just beginning. He has a mission—to journey across Davrar to find Sarya Pamaris, a friendly Questor who can begin to answer his questions. Hopefully she will reveal to him the secrets of the Endings, and how to stop them.

Arcane Veterinarian.title: Arcane Veterinarian
Arcane Veterinarian.author: Michael James Ploof
Arcane Veterinarian.description: After passing his veterinary exam, Ethan is whisked away to an alternate medieval Earth by a sorcerer in need of a veterinarian. He soon comes in possession of Dali, an arcane intelligence of untold power whose sole purpose is to help its master become the greatest....

Armed and Armored.title: Armed and Armored 1
Armed and Armored.author: DB King, Nick Law
Armed and Armored.description: A life spent honing his skills and serving his country hasn’t turned out exactly how Nathaniel Abrams planned, but it’s attracted the attention of the Tower.

Nameless Sovereign.title: Nameless Sovereign
Nameless Sovereign.author: Nameless Author
Nameless Sovereign.description: The guards say there are no children in the Moonstone Mines, a place walked only by men condemned to slavery and death. An unyielding curse ensures none can depart its dark depths. And yet, a child named Red awakens in the mines with no memory.

Nameless Sovereign.title: Nameless Sovereign 2
Nameless Sovereign.author: Nameless Author
Nameless Sovereign.description: The cultivator’s path is a double-edged sword. Around every corner hides death – and opportunity. Life in the Water Dragon Sect isn’t easy for Red. He must master his Crimson Sense, exploring the limits of his new power and its mysterious nature.

Nameless Sovereign.title: Nameless Sovereign 3
Nameless Sovereign.author: Nameless Author
Nameless Sovereign.description: Red has never been closer to the power of a true cultivator.

Nameless Sovereign.title: Nameless Sovereign 4
Nameless Sovereign.author: Nameless Author
Nameless Sovereign.description: Necromancers, demons, and ghosts—steeped in the forbidden arts, Red risks losing himself to the darkness he seeks to control. His efforts to protect his companions have come at a price and he finds himself entangled in a dangerous game with forces beyond his comprehension.

Nameless Sovereign.title: Nameless Sovereign 5: A Cultivation Progression Fantasy
Nameless Sovereign.author: Nameless Author
Nameless Sovereign.description: Fresh off completing a crucial step in his cultivation, Red now prepares himself for a battle against his fate.

Player Manager.title: Player Manager 4: A Sports Progression Fantasy
Player Manager.author: Ted Steel
Player Manager.description: Footie's number-one fanatic continues his climb to become number-one manager in the fourth installment of this fast-paced, electrifying LitRPG series.

Player Manager.title: Player Manager 5: A Sports Progression Fantasy
Player Manager.author: Ted Steel
Player Manager.description: A one-time football fanatic continues his fight to become an all-time legend of the game in the fifth book of this hard-hitting, humorous sports LitRPG.

Player Manager.title: Player Manager 6: A Sports Progression Fantasy
Player Manager.author: Ted Steel
Player Manager.description: Recovered from a near-fatal assault and rearmed with his embedded football scouting skills, former nobody Max Best has led his Chester men's team up in the rankings and ratings both on the pitch and in the front office. But there's no rest to be had with what's ahead: the FA Cup.

Imperial Initiative.title: Viridian Gate Online: The Artificer
Imperial Initiative.author: S. R. Witt, James A. Hunter
Imperial Initiative.description: October, 2042. In two weeks, the world will die, murdered by a nine-mile-wide, extinction-level asteroid. And Robert Osmark—billionaire and savvy tech-—couldn't be readier for the fiery apocalypse.

The Soulbound Saga.title: The Tainted Khan
The Soulbound Saga.author: Taran Matharu
The Soulbound Saga.description: The next installment in New York Times bestselling author Taran Matharu’s Soulbound Saga--a thrilling cultivation and progression epic fantasy series--continuing the harrowing journey of Jai as he navigates returning to his own people, growing in his magic and as a warrior, fending off attacks...

Dungeons Just Wanna Have Fun.title: Damsels Just Wanna Run: An Isekai LitRPG
Dungeons Just Wanna Have Fun.author: Christopher Hall, Maxlex
Dungeons Just Wanna Have Fun.description: Traveling to distant, exotic lands and meeting interesting, exciting people is all part of Kelsey's gig as a dungeon. And if she has to kill someone, well . . . they probably had it coming. Ever at her—or at least her avatar's—side is the dependable Anton.

Dungeons Just Wanna Have Fun.title: Ladies Just Wanna Get Guns: An Isekai LitRPG
Dungeons Just Wanna Have Fun.author: Christopher Hall, Maxlex
Dungeons Just Wanna Have Fun.description: A dungeon named Kelsey and a beautiful baroness on a covert mission join forces in this LitRPG fantasy that's full of adventurers, assassins, and ammo.

The Last Dragon Rider.title: Fall of the Last Dragon Rider: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
The Last Dragon Rider.author: Shawn Wilson
The Last Dragon Rider.description: From the author of Ultimate Level 1: Kaen attempts to save those he loves from a relentless enemy and faces his final test as a legendary Dragon Rider.

Ikarion Isekai Anime Series.title: Ikarion Quest
Ikarion Isekai Anime Series.author: Ethan Freckleton
Ikarion Isekai Anime Series.description: The novel continues the exploits of Tito, an anonymous Imago slummer who was mysteriously transported through the Ikarion VR MMO game into the real fantasy world of Ikaris as his alter ego identity, Card the Hedge Merchant.

The Big Bad Wolf.title: The Big Bad Wolf
The Big Bad Wolf.author: 13 Pitch Black Cats
The Big Bad Wolf.description: When a mysterious entity grants a man who died a chance to be a hero in another life in a fantasy world, he cannot believe his luck. The one condition: he must fight the demon king if he shows up during his new iteration.

The Village.title: Rabbits
The Village.author: Dmitry Dornichev, Alexey Kovtunov, Sofia Gutkin - translator
The Village.description: People awake in a strange place with no idea of who or where they are. There is only a bizarre message carved into a metal obelisk and the growing awareness that every single living creature in this new world is a deadly threat.

The Village.title: Goblins: Keep Out!
The Village.author: Alexey Kovtunov, Dmitry Dornichev, Sofia Gutkin - translator
The Village.description: It turns out that this world is far from simple. The sharp-toothed rabbits around the village were thought to be the greatest enemy at first. But then came the squirrels . . . The humans dealt with them too and things seemed to be going well until—surprise!—the wolves appeared.

Black Market.title: Black Market
Black Market.author: M. G. Driver
Black Market.description: Kyle Hawthorn never bows to anyone, not even in death. And he certainly isn't going to after being reincarnated into the vice city of Raktor. Most would rather spend eternity in purgatory than be reborn into this living hell—but not Kyle. Hell is exactly where he wants to rule.

Phantasm.title: The Great Wild: An Isekai LitRPG
Phantasm.author: Christopher Hall, Maxlex
Phantasm.description: A Worldwalker in the Great Game, Kandis Hammond has built her character on charisma, social skills, and illusion magic, garnering her many roles in the town of Talnier, specifically secretary of the Town Council, member of the Adventurers' Guild, and head of the local bank.

Phantasm.title: Dungeon Prime: An Isekai LitRPG
Phantasm.author: Christopher Hall, Maxlex
Phantasm.description: A twisted artificial intelligence wreaks havoc for a team of adventurers in the fifth installment of this LitRPG adventure series perfect for fans of D&D.

Rise of the Living Forge.title: Rise of the Living Forge
Rise of the Living Forge.author: Actus
Rise of the Living Forge.description: Ever since Arwin was summoned as a child, all he has known is war. And now, to claim the demon queen's life and end the war, he has to sacrifice himself. But, as he deals the final blow, the Hero of Mankind is betrayed.

Rise of the Living Forge.title: Rise of the Living Forge 2
Rise of the Living Forge.author: Actus
Rise of the Living Forge.description: Book 2 in the next epic LitRPG Saga from Actus, bestselling author of Return of the Runebound Professor.

Quest and Conquer.title: Quest and Conquer Omnibus: Books 1-3
Quest and Conquer.author: Kaz Velveto
Quest and Conquer.description: My name is Remy Aaron, and a sexy witch summoned a meteor from outer space to blow up my car while I was driving home from work. Unfortunately, the new world I respawned in is a monster-infested battleground between the Deep Ones and the Outer Gods.

Quest and Conquer.title: Quest and Conquer 2
Quest and Conquer.author: Kaz Velveto
Quest and Conquer.description: My name is Remy Aaron, and a sexy witch summoned a meteor from outer space to blow up my car while I was driving home from work. Unfortunately, the new world I respawned in is a monster-infested battleground between the Deep Ones and the Outer Gods.

Quest and Conquer.title: Quest and Conquer 3
Quest and Conquer.author: Kaz Velveto
Quest and Conquer.description: My name is Remy Aaron, and a sexy witch summoned a meteor from outer space to blow up my car while I was driving home from work.

The Iron Guild.title: Inferno Forgemaster
The Iron Guild.author: Matt Pivots
The Iron Guild.description: In the aftermath of the explosive events of Enchanted Forge, Erevan finds himself thrust into his first official mission for the Thieves Guild as he adjusts to life outside of the Altherian prison.

Sky Lord.title: Sky Lord
Sky Lord.author: Jack Bryce
Sky Lord.description: Magic is real—all the myths and legends of mankind come from a place that actually exists. And Jonathan is about to go there…

Sky Lord.title: Sky Lord 2
Sky Lord.author: Jack Bryce
Sky Lord.description: With lovely companions at his side and an airship under his command, things are looking up for Jonathan! But there is more adventure to be had in the world of Skyhall.

Sky Lord.title: Sky Lord 3
Sky Lord.author: Jack Bryce
Sky Lord.description: Jonathan faces his greatest and final test—the battle against the corrupted god Sun God, Balor.

Outworlder's Blood.title: The Shatterplate War: The Splintered Five Saga
Outworlder's Blood.author: WillPowah
Outworlder's Blood.description: As the Lord of a town and a Class Line Progenitor, Kay is becoming a powerhouse. There's one problem, he's also a tier-five vampire.

Outworlder's Blood.title: The Devouring Tide
Outworlder's Blood.author: WillPowah
Outworlder's Blood.description: Just when Kay thought he could relax, a new wave of terror crashes in. Eldritch horrors are emerging worldwide, and now the Seramist Isles are under threat.

Outworlder's Blood.title: Blood of the Void
Outworlder's Blood.author: WillPowah
Outworlder's Blood.description: After defeating the eldritch nanomachine tide and saving the Seramist Isles, Kay’s worries aren’t over. His triumphant return home to a flourishing kingdom is cut short by the hordes of vampyr swarming into his territory from the ravaged wasteland.

Victor of Tucson.title: Earthshaker: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
Victor of Tucson.author: Plum Parrot
Victor of Tucson.description: Every hero must eventually face the fact that each victory only leads to another battle in this fantasy adventure perfect for fans of Dungeon Crawler Carl.

Victor of Tucson.title: Sojourner: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
Victor of Tucson.author: Plum Parrot
Victor of Tucson.description: A skilled hero with more kills than he can count discovers not all power has limits—but it sure has a price—as this action-packed series continues.

Victor of Tucson.title: Champion: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
Victor of Tucson.author: Plum Parrot
Victor of Tucson.description: Being a hero has its perks, but living for the fight means one must be ready to die for it, in the ninth book of this action-packed LitRPG fantasy series.

Victor of Tucson.title: Void Forged: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
Victor of Tucson.author: Plum Parrot
Victor of Tucson.description: Victor Sandoval—aka Lord Victor, Duke of Iron Mountain—has continued to expand his legendary status fighting for the kingdom of Gloria in the world of Rhun, where savage duels between champions are the ultimate deciders of fate. But his trials in the arena pale in comparison to what comes next.

Victor of Tucson.title: World Walker: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
Victor of Tucson.author: Plum Parrot
Victor of Tucson.description: Once, Victor Sandoval was just a boy from Tucson. Now, he's a powerful titan of war. On the world of Dark Ember, humanity has fallen under the evil dominion of vampire lords—masters of death magic.

Dungeon Core TV.title: Parental Guidance Suggested
Dungeon Core TV.author: Michael Todd, Michael Anderle
Dungeon Core TV.description: From dungeon depths to the spotlight's glare, Luther Miller's rise as the league's new hero is as perilous as it is meteoric. Rookie sensation Luther Miller is disrupting the World Dungeon Exploration Association, vaulting from obscurity to stardom after his staggering win in the Ultimate Four.

Dungeon Core TV.title: Not Suitable for All Audiences
Dungeon Core TV.author: Michael Todd, Michael Anderle
Dungeon Core TV.description: Powerful heroes attract loyal friends and lethal enemies. Luther formed a permanent party, defeated corrupt officials and forged alliances with new aliens, all while avoiding the attention of the Voltaxians. Everything is going perfectly. Fame, glory, and money are all his. When a man has been...

My Werewolf System.title: The Howlers Rise: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
My Werewolf System.author: JKSManga
My Werewolf System.description: A teen lycanthrope learns that being a leader means much more than just being a killer as the action-packed LitRPG fantasy series continues . . .

My Werewolf System.title: Werewolf Standoff!: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
My Werewolf System.author: JKSManga
My Werewolf System.description: A lycan-powered punk with a heart of gold finds himself under attack by a lethal new breed of enemy as this thrilling LitRPG fantasy series continues.

My Werewolf System.title: The Hunter's Call: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
My Werewolf System.author: JKSManga
My Werewolf System.description: Gary Dem and his Howlers are running wild these days: claiming territory, making money, and preparing to hit the big time. Howler heavyweight Innu has been called to a gathering of the Altered Hunters Association and is chosen to go on a year-long, cross-country monster-hunting trip.

Nocturne.title: Umbral Savage
Nocturne.author: JD Glasscock
Nocturne.description: A man who was forced to become an Assassin is interrupted just as he was to kill the last impediment to get to the Senator who sent him down the path. Earth has been chosen for Integration into the Multi-Versal System and reality itself will shift to a post apocalyptic scenario.

Nocturne.title: Erebus
Nocturne.author: JD Glasscock
Nocturne.description: They have survived the Tutorial and now enter their new home, the merged world of Erebus. The Multi-Versal System is still an asshole, still focused on blood and carnage, murder and treachery.

Nocturne.title: Nocturne, Book 4: Sanguine Necropolis
Nocturne.author: JD Glasscock
Nocturne.description: Gideon has healed himself and escaped the assassination attempt by the System itself. He came out of it still Copper while all the movers and players were Iron with the System's last ditch effort to see him dead with time dilation tricks.

Nocturne.title: Mors Immatura
Nocturne.author: JD Glasscock
Nocturne.description: The Second Challenge is pushing them to the brink of losing all they hold dear, Dungeons, and they must be conquered or they all will unleash their denizens across the entire World of Erebus.

The Stargazer's War.title: To Catch a Falling Leaf
The Stargazer's War.author: J. P. Valentine
The Stargazer's War.description: With Fyrion a distant speck behind us and the resources of the Dragon’s Right Eye out of reach, there’s only one place in the system we can go to gather the materials we need to advance to bronze.

Kaito, Seriously? Another Series?.title: Kaito, Seriously? Another World?
Kaito, Seriously? Another Series?.author: Lazybaker
Kaito, Seriously? Another Series?.description: After too many lifetimes to count slaying demons and grinding levels, prophesied hero Kaito finally tells destiny where to shove it. He's done. When dimensional portal number 17 drops him in front of a king begging him to vanquish the looming Dark Army, he does what any retired adventurer would do.

Warriors of Valhalla.title: Warriors of Valhalla Omnibus Books 1-3
Warriors of Valhalla.author: Tim Steiner
Warriors of Valhalla.description: Blake never expected to meet beautiful women while studying archaeology — let alone a stunning Valkyrie. Dying was a bit of a bummer, but the chance to see Asgard with his own eyes was well worth it.

Warriors of Valhalla.title: Fimbulwinter: A Norse LitRPG Progression Fantasy
Warriors of Valhalla.author: Tim Steiner
Warriors of Valhalla.description: Blake returns to Asgard, brimming with newfound strength and memories of the comrades he lost. But Odin gives him a big task: stop Loki and Hrymr before they cause more trouble on Midgard.

Archmage Reborn.title: Reincarnated to Spellcraft
Archmage Reborn.author: DB King
Archmage Reborn.description: Betrayed and banished by the capricious Elemental Gods who gave him his magic, Saul awakens in a new body, a new time, and a new life. One he never wanted. Saul was at the peak of his power.

Magic Kingdom at War.title: Magic Kingdom at War Complete Series Box Set
Magic Kingdom at War.author: Tao Wong
Magic Kingdom at War.description: You'd think being isekai'd to a new existence would be fun, especially when you find out you're the lord of a new kingdom. Except this kingdom is at war, and the stakes are the fate of humanity.

Magic Kingdom at War.title: Magic Kingdom at War, Volume 8
Magic Kingdom at War.author: Tao Wong
Magic Kingdom at War.description: Matt has beaten another enemy Lord, acquired even more towns. He’s establishing a foothold in this crazy afterlife of his, doing battle on multiple fronts and winning. But victory isn’t always guaranteed, there’s always a price to be paid when you face another on the field of battle.

Magic Kingdom at War.title: Magic Kingdom at War, Volume 11
Magic Kingdom at War.author: Tao Wong
Magic Kingdom at War.description: With multiple enemy lords on each front, Matt has quite the challenge before him. Even with the multiple cities he's conquered, balancing the need for more units, future updates and traitorous lords is straining his patience and knowledge. Now, the enemy armies are coming, on all sides.

Magic Kingdom at War.title: Magic Kingdom at War, Volume 12
Magic Kingdom at War.author: Tao Wong
Magic Kingdom at War.description: There are no victors in war. That's the refrain that goes through Matt Fang's mind. With losses mounting, not just among his units but his Heroes too, Matt is struggling with confidence and the mounting pressure. That's, of course, when a ship is sighted on the horizon; opening up a whole new front.

Newly Summoned Demoness.title: A War in the Depths: A Progression Fantasy LitRPG
Newly Summoned Demoness.author: Erios909
Newly Summoned Demoness.description: Elania has grown accustomed to life in the Underground City State of Neftasu, sharing a home with Yolani inside the refurbished Aetherhart's Artifice. But not all is as calm as appears on the surface.

Newly Summoned Demoness.title: The City of Spires
Newly Summoned Demoness.author: Erios909
Newly Summoned Demoness.description: THE CITYSTATE OF NEFTASU HAS FALLEN. CELESTIALS CROSS THE SURFACE OF ELADU ONCE MORE. With the help of an Arch-Seraph and a Miracle, Elania and her friends have escaped the fall of Neftasu, and the first destruction of a Celestial Engine in millennia.

Earthen Contenders.title: Earthen Contenders Collection, Books 1-3
Earthen Contenders.author: Jonathan Brooks
Earthen Contenders.description: Against his will, Thaden was transported elsewhere in a big flash of light along with millions of other Humans from Earth, to a place where they would train to become Contenders in a whole new world.

Earthen Contenders.title: Undisguised Healer
Earthen Contenders.author: Jonathan Brooks
Earthen Contenders.description: Even though he never intended it to happen, the events that occurred in the city of Forgestone have set Thaden on a course to fix the problems that he inadvertently caused.

Earthen Contenders.title: Unaffiliated Healer
Earthen Contenders.author: Jonathan Brooks
Earthen Contenders.description: After resolving all the pending SPECIAL Quests that had been plaguing him, Thaden is finally ready to evolve his Class, where he can then continue to Level-up past his current limit.

Earthen Contenders.title: Unrestrained Healer
Earthen Contenders.author: Jonathan Brooks
Earthen Contenders.description: After barely surviving an attack by an Adversarial entity, Thaden helps pick up the pieces of the Guild he’d previously joined.

Earthen Contenders.title: Unbelievable Healer
Earthen Contenders.author: Jonathan Brooks
Earthen Contenders.description: After inadvertently triggering the start of Developmental Phase 4 with the destruction of The Citadel, Thaden learns from his squirrel companion, Sadia, what the Wildlands has in store for him and the other Contenders.

Sylver Seeker.title: Sylver Seeker, Books 1-4: A LitRPG Adventure
Sylver Seeker.author: Kennit Kenway
Sylver Seeker.description: After fulfilling the duty all Arch Necromancers are tasked with, the last thing Sylver Sezari expected was to be reborn. He was usually the one reanimating dead things, after all. How ironic. But reborn he was.

Sylver Seeker.title: Sylver Seeker 5
Sylver Seeker.author: Kennit Kenway
Sylver Seeker.description: No one leaves a negotiation happy. But wounded pride aside, Sylver was overjoyed with how everything turned out.

Death of the Party.title: Rites and Wrongs: A Zombie Villainess LitRPG
Death of the Party.author: Kleggt
Death of the Party.description: In the thrilling third installment of this LitRPG adventure series, a Monster/Player mashup must ask herself: Can a glitched System ever really be fixed?

Overpowered Wizard.title: Overpowered Wizard
Overpowered Wizard.author: Hunter Mythos
Overpowered Wizard.description: Zarian Darkrun, a Marine Corps Veteran, is tired of being a homeless reject and ends his earthly ties. He opens a portal in a busy mall and sends himself, some koi fish, and nine other Floridians into another world. Welcome to the Infinita Star System, a universe of epic fantasy and game-like magic.

Overpowered Wizard.title: Overpowered Wizard 2: A Progression LitRPG Epic
Overpowered Wizard.author: Hunter Mythos
Overpowered Wizard.description: What if a Florida Man is a threat to the System, Universe, and Beyond?

Overpowered Wizard.title: Overpowered Wizard 3
Overpowered Wizard.author: Hunter Mythos
Overpowered Wizard.description: What if a Florida Man fights in a Multiverse Tournament?

Dungeon Runner.title: Dungeon Runner 1
Dungeon Runner.author: Dustin Tigner
Dungeon Runner.description: In a virtual fantasy world made real, perilous dungeons hold untold loot. Can he exploit them for coin and save a destitute orphanage?

Dungeon Runner.title: Dungeon Runner 2
Dungeon Runner.author: Dustin Tigner
Dungeon Runner.description: The orphanage and kids are safe. They have food! And now, the only important question everyone is asking—most notably, Triton—is who’s the fastest Runner?

Dungeon Runner.title: Dungeon Runner 3
Dungeon Runner.author: Dustin Tigner
Dungeon Runner.description: What does one do when they “get the girl”? It all still feels very surreal to Entin. He’s just thrilled that Eizel—now permanently Aymie Avys—likes him. Why not a quest date? A quest that starts simple then pulls them into new places and introduces new friends, like a fish Naufling...

Magical Fusion.title: Magical Fusion Collection: Books 5-8
Magical Fusion.author: Jonathan Brooks
Magical Fusion.description: The Kingdom has changed more in his absence than he thought possible…

Magical Fusion.title: Corrupted SufFusion
Magical Fusion.author: Jonathan Brooks
Magical Fusion.description: After the frightening experience involved in closing the northwestern Calamity and rescuing his friend, Larek and his companions discover that not everyone is happy about what they accomplished.

Pandora Unchained.title: Pandora Unchained 2
Pandora Unchained.author: Patrick Laplante
Pandora Unchained.description: Sorin has defied the odds and regained his cultivation. His health has been restored, and his adventuring team is gaining momentum. Armed with his clan’s forbidden research notes, Sorin travels to Delphi where he intends to investigate his parents’ death.

Hunting and Herbalism.title: Hunting and Herbalism 2: A Druid LitRPG
Hunting and Herbalism.author: Leif Roder, Synonymoose
Hunting and Herbalism.description: Dragged into hell by a ritual gone wrong, Zalia must escape before the souls of the damned and their demonic keepers locate her.

Hunting and Herbalism.title: Hunting and Herbalism 4: A Druid LitRPG
Hunting and Herbalism.author: Leif Roder, Synonymoose
Hunting and Herbalism.description: Zalia has destroyed hellish forces in an attempt to bring peace to Endaria—yet a more nebulous enemy now rears its head . . .

Hunting and Herbalism.title: Hunting and Herbalism 5: A Druid LitRPG
Hunting and Herbalism.author: Leif Roder, Synonymoose
Hunting and Herbalism.description: Set on destroying the hellish realm of Cormaine once and for all, Zalia seeks the ultimate healing cure—and reveals Endaria's greatest evil in the process.

Mark of the Crijik Series.title: Mark of the Crijik 5: The Ascension
Mark of the Crijik Series.author: ThinkTwice
Mark of the Crijik Series.description: Andross Silver’s secret has been revealed to the world. An eighth Marked one, born before his predecessor has passed away.

Provenance: A Cultivation Story.title: Wind's Embrace
Provenance: A Cultivation Story.author: Evan Parrott
Provenance: A Cultivation Story.description: Provenance is a world built on dreams. Sleeper’s Sand, the energy of a cultivator, saturates the known world. It lives in the ground and the air, animals can feel it and seek it, and Dreamers bend it to their will.

Fight. Level. Survive..title: Fight. Level. Survive.
Fight. Level. Survive..author: xrmaze
Fight. Level. Survive..description: When Mason wakes up naked and alone in a whole new world, everything changes. Lying there with blades of blue grass stabbing him in his ass, he has no idea just how chaotic his life is about to become.

Fight. Level. Survive..title: Fight. Level. Survive. 2
Fight. Level. Survive..author: xrmaze
Fight. Level. Survive..description: Mason thought he was getting the hang of this whole “trapped in another world” thing, kill monsters, level up and try not to die. Simple, right? Wrong. Now, he’s dealing with cultists, a prophecy, and a whole lot of people (and monsters) who want him dead.

Fight. Level. Survive..title: Fight. Level. Survive. 3
Fight. Level. Survive..author: xrmaze
Fight. Level. Survive..description: Captured and Alone. Can Mason do what he must in order to escape and survive?

MagiCraft Master.title: MagiCraft Master: A Mass Isekai LitRPG
MagiCraft Master.author: Wilbur Woods
MagiCraft Master.description: A young artist implanted with a sophisticated AI becomes humanity's champion on another world in this thrilling science-fiction fantasy-adventure series.

MagiCraft Master.title: MagiCraft Master 2: A Mass Isekai LitRPG
MagiCraft Master.author: Wilbur Woods
MagiCraft Master.description: Fighting for the fate of humanity on an alien world, a young man and his AI implant learn how to master magic, in this progression sci-fi/fantasy mashup.

MagiCraft Master.title: MagiCraft Master 3: A Mass Isekai LitRPG
MagiCraft Master.author: Wilbur Woods
MagiCraft Master.description: A young warrior infused with AI technology and magical powers must stop an eldritch god from unleashing an apocalypse in this science-fiction fantasy.

Glass Kanin.title: Glass Kanin: An Isekai LitRPG Adventure
Glass Kanin.author: Kia Leep
Glass Kanin.description: As a rising actor, Kanin's body is his career. His identity. His life. All that is taken from him when he dies and is reborn as a bottle of ink. Now living as the heart of a magical glass servant, Kanin's new purpose is to perform a senile wizard's yard work.

Demonic Magician.title: Peak Performance: An Isekai LitRPG
Demonic Magician.author: Kleggt
Demonic Magician.description: A new magician is on the scene, and he's got demons in tow, in this adventure-filled portal fantasy that's perfect for fans of role-playing games.

Demonic Magician.title: Staged and Scripted: An Isekai LitRPG
Demonic Magician.author: Kleggt
Demonic Magician.description: In the second installment of this adventure-filled fantasy, your local magician and his party are set to dazzle once again—with a devilish twist.

Demonic Magician.title: Last Curtain Call: An Isekai LitRPG
Demonic Magician.author: Kleggt
Demonic Magician.description: In the explosive finale of this adventure-filled fantasy, your local demonic magician takes his final bow—and a broken System draws its last breath.

Draka.title: Shadows of Mallin: An Isekai Progression Fantasy
Draka.author: AvaritiaBona
Draka.description: An otherworlder transported into a dragon's body must grow her skills, build her hoard, and forge friendships in the first book of a charming isekai series.

Draka.title: Shadows of Karakan: An Isekai Progression Fantasy
Draka.author: AvaritiaBona
Draka.description: A human magically reborn into a dragon's body navigates friendships, alliances, and feuding gangs in the second book of this charming isekai series.

Draka.title: Shadows of Gold: An Isekai Progression Fantasy
Draka.author: AvaritiaBona
Draka.description: An otherworlder in the body of a dragon must employ all her cunning to play a dangerous political game in the third book of this charming isekai series.

God Game.title: God Game 1
God Game.author: T.E. Bakutis
God Game.description: Every thirty years, an ancient god hosts a very dangerous game.

God Game.title: God Game 2
God Game.author: T.E. Bakutis
God Game.description: Juliet Cooper’s life isn’t exciting, but it’s secure. She works at a sandwich shop, babysits her little brother, and helps her parents out with the bills. She also has no idea she used to be dead.

God Game.title: God Game 3: A Gamelit Thriller
God Game.author: T.E. Bakutis
God Game.description: After surviving two death games, they’ve finally earned a vacation. Ryler Copeland and Juliet Cooper might not be mortal any longer, but they’re still madly in love, even if they can only see each other once every few months.

Enora Online.title: Enora Online Boxed Set, Volumes 4-7: A LitRPG GameLit Fantasy Adventure
Enora Online.author: Arlo Adams
Enora Online.description: Follow G3m1n1 Fowler and his band of companions all the way to the final confrontation that will change the face of Enora Online.

Enora Online.title: Rebellion
Enora Online.author: Arlo Adams
Enora Online.description: The first shots in the Ruballian civil war have been fired. Nodes vital to the king, captured. Sieges commenced. Unseen forces operate in the shadows to meet their own objectives while the elven queen sits in a Brusarian prison.

Isekai Assassin.title: Isekai Assassin: The Complete Series
Isekai Assassin.author: Grayson Sinclair
Isekai Assassin.description: Contains volumes 1–4 of Isekai Assassin, a fast-paced story set in a Gamelit dark fantasy world written by the bestselling author of the Wyvern Academy series.

Corpo Age.title: Corpo Age
Corpo Age.author: RandomBlueCat
Corpo Age.description: Rollo believed that money ruled the world. Then his world came crashing down. Now, Rollo finds himself in a dystopian, corporate-ruled world where where greed and exploitation are the norm.

Super Genetics.title: System Awakening
Super Genetics.author: Sean Dunning
Super Genetics.description: The heroes Terry Fairway once idolized have turned against him, hunting him down at every turn. His grandfather, the ruthless S-ranked necromancer who rules the city, watches from his throne as the people starve and suffer.

Super Genetics.title: System Summoning: A Post-Apocalyptic LitRPG Progression
Super Genetics.author: Sean Dunning
Super Genetics.description: The vampires that once haunted Wichita are gone, reduced to ash. But Terry’s real war is only beginning. Topeka is burning, caught in the ruthless crossfire of S-ranked tyrants locked in a game of conquest. While the city suffers, the supers wage war.

Super Genetics.title: System Incursion: A Post-Apocalyptic LitRPG Progression
Super Genetics.author: Sean Dunning
Super Genetics.description: Terry Fairway came back from the Underworld stronger, faster—changed. But the power he won came at a cost. He saved a world. He might have damned his own.

The Forerunner.title: The Forerunner
The Forerunner.author: James Clay
The Forerunner.description: Zed is a washed-up MMA fighter that is starting to realize that there isn't much of a future ahead of him.

Savage Awakening.title: Savage Awakening 4
Savage Awakening.author: Adastra339
Savage Awakening.description: After his Superdungeon run, Zane Walker is ranked the most promising prospect in the Dragonspire Galaxy. With the eyes of the world on him and lucrative training offers from two Great Factions, he’s got a target on his back.

Savage Awakening.title: Savage Awakening 7
Savage Awakening.author: Adastra339
Savage Awakening.description: Zane championed Earth to victory in the Beginning of the End. Now the final war looms, and he has just 100 years to power himself up to become an elite of all of Dragonspire.

The Last Portal Jumper.title: The Last Portal Jumper: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy Series
The Last Portal Jumper.author: Konstantin Zubov, Celia Alexandra Gonzalez -translator
The Last Portal Jumper.description: When I died and became a portal jumper, the system glitched. Did that bother me? Not a bit. After all, I'd dreamed of traveling to a different world all my life! The system malfunction turned out to only benefit me. I didn't just lose nothing; I also gained something really cool.

The Last Portal Jumper.title: The Last Portal Jumper: Book 2
The Last Portal Jumper.author: Konstantin Zubov, Celia Alexandra Gonzalez - translator
The Last Portal Jumper.description: Alone in a strange world of dungeons, quests, combat academies, guild wars, tournaments, and learning magic . . . It's all so wonderful! Of course, the hordes of orcs approaching the Empire's borders are a bit unsettling. As is the mysterious organization crippling it from within. But what if...

The Last Portal Jumper.title: The Last Portal Jumper, Book 3: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy Series
The Last Portal Jumper.author: Konstantin Zubov, Celia Alexandra Gonzalez - translator
The Last Portal Jumper.description: To continue training at the guild in the capital, or pack it in and get out before the orcs take the city by siege? For answers to this and other questions, check out the latest issue of "F—k If I Know" magazine! And it sure would be nice if the greenskins were the only threat. In any case...

The Last Portal Jumper.title: The Last Portal Jumper: Book 4
The Last Portal Jumper.author: Konstantin Zubov, Celia Alexandra Gonzalez - translator
The Last Portal Jumper.description: I'm getting stronger, and my confidence has always been good. And I'm not the only one who can see it. The system is pushing me more and more into the thick of things, and a question is becoming more and more critical....

Apocalypse Arena.title: Apocalypse Arena 1: Mortal Gauntlet
Apocalypse Arena.author: J Pal
Apocalypse Arena.description: The stronger his opponent, the harder he hits. Saving an innocent from a drug-crazed superhuman should've left Nil broken. Instead, it wins him the Nexus' attention.

1% Lifesteal.title: 1% Lifesteal
1% Lifesteal.author: Robert Blaise
1% Lifesteal.description: Freddy Stern, a twenty-one-year-old cashier, has lived a plain, albeit harsh life. Having been orphaned—twice—he's spent the last ten years working and staying out of trouble. His only aspiration is to save enough money to become an archhuman.

1% Lifesteal.title: 1% Lifesteal, Volume 4
1% Lifesteal.author: Robert Blaise
1% Lifesteal.description: After the banishment of its abusive rulers, Repentawa will need more protection than ever before. Especially with the calamity heading towards the Northern Belt.

Way of the Immortals.title: Way of the Immortals: The Complete 4-Book Series
Way of the Immortals.author: Harmon Cooper
Way of the Immortals.description: When Nick Barnette is pulled through a mysterious portal into the Kingdom of Lhasa, his life becomes a fight for survival. Separated from his friends and hunted by powerful forces, Nick discovers he’s been gifted a strange ability—the power to slow time.

Blossoming Path.title: Blossoming Path: A Xianxia LitRPG
Blossoming Path.author: Carlos Calma
Blossoming Path.description: When a mysterious force opens the world to ascension, a young herbalist must cultivate his skills, meanwhile discovering traces of a lost civilization.

Blossoming Path.title: Blossoming Path 3: A Xianxia LitRPG
Blossoming Path.author: Carlos Calma
Blossoming Path.description: With sects clashing all around him and a power struggle brewing, Kai must rely on his determination and growing skills to protect the people he loves.

Blossoming Path.title: Blossoming Path 4: A Xianxia LitRPG
Blossoming Path.author: Carlos Calma
Blossoming Path.description: Gentle Wind Village endures even as gathering threats endanger its peace, and Kai must learn what it truly means to stand between the mortal and the divine.

Blossoming Path.title: Blossoming Path 5: A Xianxia LitRPG
Blossoming Path.author: Carlos Calma
Blossoming Path.description: Refugees have arrived from a neighboring village carrying stories of devastation. What first appears to be demonic remnants soon reveals itself as something far worse: the Amethyst Plague, a mysterious affliction that erodes qi and turns cultivation into a curse.

Isekai Hero.title: Rise of the Isekai Hero: A LitRPG Fantasy
Isekai Hero.author: Jason Marino
Isekai Hero.description: One minute, Kaelan’s a marketing exec with a dreary life. The next, he’s summoned by a gorgeous priestess into a world of swords, magic, and a warlord out for his blood. He’s not sure it’s an improvement until he learns the rewards are most certainly worth the risks.

Isekai Hero.title: Rise of the Isekai Hero Omnibus: Books 1-3
Isekai Hero.author: Jason Marino
Isekai Hero.description: One minute, Kaelan’s a marketing exec with a dreary life. The next, he’s summoned by a gorgeous priestess into a world of swords, magic, and a warlord out for his blood.

Isekai Hero.title: Rise of the Isekai Hero 2
Isekai Hero.author: Jason Marino
Isekai Hero.description: Kaelan returns with a Rune Sage class, an assassin-in-training and a seasoned paladin at his side. Drakos is still at large, Morvak looms on the horizon, the pyramid is packed with lethal traps, and a legendary artifact could tip the scales. Welcome back to Valorah—where the stakes are divine.

Isekai Hero.title: Rise of the Isekai Hero 3
Isekai Hero.author: Jason Marino
Isekai Hero.description: Elara is missing, Morvak’s invasion is imminent, and Kaelan is once again questioning his life choices. What was supposed to be a stealthy in-and-out mission quickly turns into a rescue operation—with a side of war, betrayal, and unexpected alliances.

The Lost Bloodline.title: The Lost Bloodline
The Lost Bloodline.author: M. Tress
The Lost Bloodline.description: Keeping his head up and moving forward was what Koda Burke was best at. After having to emancipate himself as a teen and find his own way at a young age, it became part of who he was. The most important part, or so he thought.

The Lost Bloodline.title: The Lost Bloodline 2
The Lost Bloodline.author: M. Tress
The Lost Bloodline.description: Drawn to another world at the behest of a goddess without hope, thrown into conflict to protect a people on the brink of destruction, and drawn into a conflict millennia old, Koda Burke should have been upset at the very least.

The Lost Bloodline.title: The Lost Bloodline 3
The Lost Bloodline.author: M. Tress
The Lost Bloodline.description: A town rescued from its fate. Duty is done and his home is now safe from the threat of the Crooked. Koda Burke was ready for a rest from the breakneck pace he’d endured since arriving on this new world.

The Lost Bloodline.title: The Lost Bloodline 4: An Isekai Epic
The Lost Bloodline.author: M. Tress
The Lost Bloodline.description: With winter settling over the land, now is the time to warm the hearth and spend time with family. However, the duties of a champion never truly end to his people.

The Lost Bloodline.title: The Lost Bloodline 5
The Lost Bloodline.author: M. Tress
The Lost Bloodline.description: Winter has passed and the world returns to life once more. Spring brings with it new life, new opportunity, and new problems.

Stellar Frontier.title: Terminus
Stellar Frontier.author: Jason Cheek
Stellar Frontier.description: Stellar Frontier is the newest sensational hit that has taken the world by storm. It's the first fully immersive virtual reality Sci-Fi MMORPG on the market.

Healer's Way.title: The Healer's Way: Book 8
Healer's Way.author: Alexey Kovtunov, Oleg Sapphire, Jennifer E. Sunseri - translator
Healer's Way.description: The threats I've been facing in this world, well, it's like playing whack-a-mole. The local aristocrats are still conspiring to put roadblocks in the path of the ever more powerful Bulatov Family. And then I have the offworlders from another world—they haven't gone anywhere, either.

Healer's Way.title: The Healer's Way, Book 14
Healer's Way.author: Oleg Sapphire, Alexey Kovtunov, Jennifer E. Sunseri - translator
Healer's Way.description: Why, oh why, are so many loath to have dealings with Healers? In other worlds, at least, everyone knows how powerful Healers of his rank are. But why is it no one realizes how great Healers are at negotiating and concluding contracts? And, moreover, they're fabulous managers. Although that might...

Healer's Way.title: The Healer's Way, Book 15
Healer's Way.author: Oleg Sapphire, Alexey Kovtunov, Jennifer E. Sunseri - translator
Healer's Way.description: Events are intensifying around Mikhail Bulatov. The emperor is starting to wonder how he could be just an ordinary Healer, and he's even considering entrusting him with a matter of special importance.

The Silent Archmage.title: The Silent Archmage
The Silent Archmage.author: Ghost Flower
The Silent Archmage.description: Magic, danger, and epic fantasy collide in this spellbinding first book of the Silent Archmage series, where an archmage seeking peace enrolls in a magic academy, only to be swept into a treacherous magical adventure. Syl, an archmage who tirelessly fought the monsters spilling from the magical...

The Silent Archmage.title: The Seventh Sinner
The Silent Archmage.author: Ghost Flower
The Silent Archmage.description: The second thrilling installment in the epic Silent Archmage fantasy series unveils a tale of magic, war, and a kingdom on the brink of destruction. War is coming. The kingdom is not ready…but Syl is. Syl’s first semester at the Aurian Magical Institute has been more eventful than he hoped...

The Silent Archmage.title: Ghost in the Machine
The Silent Archmage.author: Ghost Flower
The Silent Archmage.description: The new book in a spellbinding sci-fi/fantasy series about an archmage happy to enroll in a magical university and find freedom from battle, until the battle comes looking for him anyway... The moon is falling. War is coming. The time for action is now. Cascadia and Auria have felled each other...

Magus Reborn.title: Magus Reborn
Magus Reborn.author: Extra26, T.C. Liyanage
Magus Reborn.description: Kai of the Sorcerer's Tower was one of the last Mages left, barely surviving in a world contaminated with dead mana and ruled by creatures of the dark.

Magus Reborn.title: Magus Reborn 3
Magus Reborn.author: Extra26, T.C. Liyanage
Magus Reborn.description: Kai had defeated the beast wave and had been promoted to Count. But problems don't seem to end for him.

Taming Destiny.title: Leap: An Isekai LitRPG
Taming Destiny.author: S. L. Winter
Taming Destiny.description: A desperate man is thrust into an unforgiving wilderness, where survival must be earned and every choice has a cost, in this slow-burn LitRPG adventure.

Taming Destiny.title: Growth: An Isekai LitRPG
Taming Destiny.author: S. L. Winter
Taming Destiny.description: A man must determine who he wants to be as he faces new threats and battles prehistoric killing machines in the second book of this gripping portal fantasy.

Taming Destiny.title: Shaping: An Isekai LitRPG
Taming Destiny.author: S. L. Winter
Taming Destiny.description: In this gripping portal fantasy, a man must gather his strength to battle old foes and meet the demanding challenges of the wilderness he now calls home.

Amber the Cursed Berserker.title: Amber the Cursed Berserker: Book 1
Amber the Cursed Berserker.author: V.A. Lewis, Azrie
Amber the Cursed Berserker.description: Without any warning, Amber is transported from her dingy student apartment to a fantastical realm with magic, monsters, and a universal System. However, even though she is forcibly ripped from her home and thrust into a dangerous new life, for the first time ever, she finally feels free.

Amber the Cursed Berserker.title: Amber the Cursed Berserker: Book 2
Amber the Cursed Berserker.author: V.A. Lewis, Azrie
Amber the Cursed Berserker.description: The path to godhood has been revealed.

Amber the Cursed Berserker.title: Amber the Cursed Berserker: Book 3
Amber the Cursed Berserker.author: V.A. Lewis, Azrie
Amber the Cursed Berserker.description: Vir is in chaos, and soon Amber will be at the center of it all.

Scathing Reviewer.title: Scathing Reviewer: A Satirical LitRPG Progression Fantasy
Scathing Reviewer.author: BananaDragon
Scathing Reviewer.description: When a despised isekai author's novel comes to life, she's challenged by opponents far more sinister than any demon or god: her past critics—and karma.

Scathing Reviewer.title: The Major Arcana: A Satirical LitRPG Progression Fantasy
Scathing Reviewer.author: BananaDragon
Scathing Reviewer.description: After her novel takes over the world, an author must prevent a devastating apocalypse from descending; at least she knows what happens next.

Lord of The System.title: Lord of the System, Book 3: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy Series
Lord of The System.author: Furious Miki, Alex Toxic, Reuben Woolley - translator
Lord of The System.description: The System said: "everything the sun touches is yours!" Lord Leo's a simple guy, so he took the System's word for it. It's not for nothing that Major is running drills with the new recruits, Third is sharpening his trusty sapper shovel, and boar-riding Peter is digging the earth with a honed hoof.

Lord of The System.title: Lord of the System
Lord of The System.author: Alex Toxic, Furious Miki, Reuben Woolley - Translator - translator
Lord of The System.description: A revolution is afoot in Sparta! And not just any revolution: an industrial revolution. Water wheels and mechanical hammers have come to replace primitive labor. That means more ploughs in the fields and more arms for the soldiers. After all, the enemy grows by the day, too...

Lord of The System.title: Lord of the System, Book 7
Lord of The System.author: Alex Toxic, Furious Miki, Reuben Woolley - translator
Lord of The System.description: Babylon has spent a long time spitting down at everyone else from its impregnable walls. It's boasted of the power of its army, the wealth of its treasuries, and the splendor of its beauties. Will it be able to withstand the Barbarian Lord?

Chronicles of the Isekai’d Hexinblade.title: Conscripted
Chronicles of the Isekai’d Hexinblade.author: Patrick Underwood
Chronicles of the Isekai’d Hexinblade.description: Have you ever come across those stories with heroes who knew just how to get things done? The ones who were masters in five different martial arts, and knew ten ways to skin a bear after killing it with their bare hands? Yeah, that wasn’t me.

Chronicles of the Isekai’d Hexinblade.title: Hexinblade Academy
Chronicles of the Isekai’d Hexinblade.author: Patrick Underwood
Chronicles of the Isekai’d Hexinblade.description: Cal has somehow managed to survive his first weekend in a strange new world he knows next to nothing about. He has surrounded himself with a small cast of extraordinary women, a few friends, even a handful of adversaries. Hell, he even passed his first Core-trial!

A LitRPG Offworlder Saga: The Weak to St.title: The Legend of Kazro - Transcendent
A LitRPG Offworlder Saga: The Weak to St.series: A LitRPG Offworlder Saga: The Weak to Strong Hero Who Levels Up Quickly
A LitRPG Offworlder Saga: The Weak to St.author: D. R. R. Hatch
A LitRPG Offworlder Saga: The Weak to St.description: Kazro never asked for the quest. With nothing but a broken interface and dogged determination, he sets out to deliver a ceremonial scythe to a princess he’s never met. But when he glimpses her in the crowd, a jolt of familiarity strikes like thunder.

Wild Era.title: Wild Era: A LitRPG Progression Epic
Wild Era.author: David North
Wild Era.description: For 5,000 years, the Wild Era of humanity has reigned supreme, where strength and magic are the source of everything. Kelin Wildfire, once called the Lord of Wildfire and the Archmage of Souls, was mysteriously killed on a battlefield of the Chaos War.

Wild Era.title: Wild Era 2
Wild Era.author: David North
Wild Era.description: The Lord of Wildfire has been reborn, but the Wild Era is full of dangers and his strength needs to rise. He has disrupted the plans of Baron Verasun and the Sarathian Empire, creating enemies both near and far, while the enemies who killed him in his first life are still out there.

Wild Era.title: Wild Era 3
Wild Era.author: David North
Wild Era.description: Kelin Wildfire's new life is blazing with potential and he has a lofty goal: to become the Sovereign of Souls and the Lord of Reincarnation.

Unwilling Eldritch Horror of Fortune.title: Unwilling Eldritch Horror of Fortune: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
Unwilling Eldritch Horror of Fortune.author: Tismon
Unwilling Eldritch Horror of Fortune.description: In the first book of this Lovecraftian dark fantasy, an ordinary man finds himself in extraordinary circumstances—and responsible for the fate of humanity.

Unwilling Eldritch Horror of Fortune.title: Unwilling Eldritch Horror of Fortune 2: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
Unwilling Eldritch Horror of Fortune.author: Tismon
Unwilling Eldritch Horror of Fortune.description: A reluctant hero faces mythical monsters and cursed ghosts as he quests to save humanity from cosmic horrors in this Lovecraftian dark fantasy series.

Unwilling Eldritch Horror of Fortune.title: Unwilling Eldritch Horror of Fortune 3: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
Unwilling Eldritch Horror of Fortune.author: Tismon
Unwilling Eldritch Horror of Fortune.description: In the third book of this Lovecraftian dark fantasy, a man must battle more cosmic horrors and solve the multidimensional conflicts plaguing their world.

Resurrection! A Ridiculous Vampire Iseka.title: Resurrection!: A Ridiculous Vampire Isekai, Book 1
Resurrection! A Ridiculous Vampire Iseka.author: Randall Tatum
Resurrection! A Ridiculous Vampire Iseka.description: A young businessman dies, and in the process of crossing over, his soul accidentally drifts where it doesn’t belong. The new body he’s acquired? A 3,000-year-old vampire, charmingly named Vampir.

Cultivation Nerd.title: Cultivation Nerd
Cultivation Nerd.author: HolyMouse
Cultivation Nerd.description: To defy the Heavens, he must earn his masters in magic. For Liu Feng, death isn't the end. Now, he's stuck in a new world with magic that clearly doesn't obey the laws of physics, surrounded by arrogant young masters who seek to advance their power by any means necessary.

Cultivation Nerd.title: Cultivation Nerd 2
Cultivation Nerd.author: HolyMouse
Cultivation Nerd.description: Winter has arrived, bringing inevitable disaster to the Blazing Sun Sect.

Isekai Exorcist.title: Isekai Exorcist
Isekai Exorcist.author: Dosei
Isekai Exorcist.description: After flunking the entrance exam to his dream university, Temaru Ryūta is left behind by all his friends and becomes a shut-in while preparing for next year's exams.

Isekai Exorcist.title: Isekai Exorcist 2
Isekai Exorcist.author: Dosei
Isekai Exorcist.description: Following Ryūta's escape from the clutches of a Summoner with grand plans, he makes his way to the city of Helmstatter to reunite with his friends, but not before getting embroiled in the troubles of an elfin enclave.

World's Strongest Warrior.title: How I Became the World's Strongest Warrior By Using Basic Attacks
World's Strongest Warrior.author: Kenny King
World's Strongest Warrior.description: A hilarious and addictive first book by Kenny King, a cultivation fantasy/system optimization series—perfect for fans of Beware of Chicken and He Who Fights With Monsters—where an underpowered hero must level up in a strange fantasy world through sheer determination and endless persistence...

World's Strongest Warrior.title: How I Became The World's Strongest Warrior By Using Basic Attacks: Volume 3
World's Strongest Warrior.author: Kenny King
World's Strongest Warrior.description: The third book in the hit LitRPG series, perfect for fans of Beware of Chicken and Dungeon Crawler Carl, where Chuck, an ordinary man thrust into a world full of magic and monsters, finds that gods and demons stand in the way of his deadliest challenge yet...reaching the elusive level 50. The...

World's Strongest Warrior.title: How I Became the World's Strongest Warrior By Using Basic Attacks: Volume 4
World's Strongest Warrior.author: Kenny King
World's Strongest Warrior.description: Chuck Taylor has crushed gods, broken the Tower, and solo’d nightmares that exist outside reality itself. But numbers don’t lie, and level 58 is still 28 billion experience points away. After helping his friends shatter their level caps and destroy the Devourer (again), Chuck sets his sights...

World's Strongest Warrior.title: How I Became the World's Strongest Warrior By Using Basic Attacks: Volume 5
World's Strongest Warrior.author: Kenny King
World's Strongest Warrior.description: The new book in the witty, action-packed WORLD'S STRONGEST WARRIOR LitRPG series, perfect for fans of DUNGEON CRAWLER CARL and HE WHO FIGHTS WITH MONSTERS, where Chuck encounters an undead nightmare and must do what he does best - cleave through them all one by one. Chuck Taylor didn’t ask to...

Aetherforged.title: Rebirth: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
Aetherforged.author: Luke Chmilenko, Harmon Cooper
Aetherforged.description: The discovery of an enchanted heirloom sends a poor farm boy on a journey to master magic and vanquish evil in this epic LitRPG fantasy series.

Aetherforged.title: Demonstorm: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
Aetherforged.author: Luke Chmilenko, Harmon Cooper
Aetherforged.description: The full power of his mythic ancestry propels a young archmage to new heights in the second installment of this epic LitRPG fantasy adventure.

Author's Nightmare.title: Author's Nightmare: A Grimdark Isekai LitRPG
Author's Nightmare.author: Ian B. Urns, A. C. Erinle
Author's Nightmare.description: When three friends find themselves in the grimdark fantasy world of their novel, they must grind, battle, and barter to survive the deadly landscape.

Author's Nightmare.title: Author's Nightmare 2: A Grimdark Isekai LitRPG
Author's Nightmare.author: Ian B. Urns, A. C. Erinle
Author's Nightmare.description: Having secured a foothold—and a reputation for questing—in the fantasy world of their imaginations, three friends aim to champion the kingdom's tournament.

Author's Nightmare.title: Author's Nightmare 3: A Grimdark Isekai LitRPG
Author's Nightmare.author: Ian B. Urns, A. C. Erinle
Author's Nightmare.description: From politics to deception to war, Redacle is facing grave danger—and the friends who created it are the only ones who can save it—in this dark fantasy.

Cherno Caster.title: Cherno Caster 2
Cherno Caster.author: Akaso
Cherno Caster.description: You can strip Brunhilde Krahe of her cybernetics. Tear her from the Megacity. Hurl her across worlds. But you cannot change what she is. A crusader will always remain a crusader.

My Demonic Farm Series.title: My Demonic Farm Book 2: A Progression Fantasy LitRPG
My Demonic Farm Series.author: WhisperingSnow
My Demonic Farm Series.description: Theo barely survived the deadly poison that nearly claimed his life, but survival is only the beginning of his journey. As he recovers, a new fire ignites within him, pushing him to leave Ashenvale village and forge a new path.

My Demonic Farm Series.title: My Demonic Farm, Book 3
My Demonic Farm Series.author: WhisperingSnow
My Demonic Farm Series.description: After narrowly escaping death, Theo finds himself at the prestigious Phoenixwing Academy, saved by a mysterious woman and Rowan. His world is expanding in ways he never imagined.

Dual Class.title: Dual Class
Dual Class.author: Arthur Inverse
Dual Class.description: What's a city boy to do when he wakes up with a mysterious system glowing before his eyes? As the system forces worlds to merge, Drake confronts his past and new reality, where sharp wit and brutal killings go hand in hand.

Dual Class.title: Dual Class 3
Dual Class.author: Arthur Inverse
Dual Class.description: Drake has entered a transformed Earth, one reshaped by the System and teeming with deadly opportunity. But survival now means more than just leveling up. As a marked Forerunner, he’s caught the attention of ancient Primordials who see him as both threat and entertainment.

Demonic Sect Elder.title: Demonic Sect Elder Cultivates Righteous Disciples: An Isekai LitRPG
Demonic Sect Elder.author: Kalzara
Demonic Sect Elder.description: Before meeting his pathetic and all-too-predictable demise in the middle of a pie-eating contest, Zack was living the high life: schlubbing around his parents' basement, subsisting on pizza, video games, computer screens, and web novels. He had it all . . . while still being a big, fat nothing.

Demonic Sect Elder.title: Demonic Sect Elder and the Sealed Realm: An Isekai LitRPG
Demonic Sect Elder.author: Kalzara
Demonic Sect Elder.description: In the second book of this hilarious xianxia series, a loser turned martial arts master embraces his badass role . . . until he screws it up . . . as usual.

Demonic Sect Elder.title: Demonic Sect Elder and the Great War: An Isekai LitRPG
Demonic Sect Elder.author: Kalzara
Demonic Sect Elder.description: A total nobody who became a somebody is quickly realizing he can still become a dead body in the third installment of this battle-packed xianxia series.

Creature Farm.title: Isekai Farming
Creature Farm.author: Tristan Rye
Creature Farm.description: Each day, Owen rises with the sun. Creatures cheer as he shovels food into the trough. Enchanted plants dance and sway while he waters their stalks. This is a strange, wild world. A place where mushrooms can sprout sentience. A place where forest slimes make the best pets. It’s cozy. Simple.

Creature Farm.title: Village Building
Creature Farm.author: Tristan Rye
Creature Farm.description: Owen gazes at his newest asset—an underground slime habitat. Here, he’ll raise baby forest slimes and harvest goo to be sold at market. It’s one of many new investments. As the farm expands, so do his opportunities.

Parnival Wonderland.title: Isekai Park
Parnival Wonderland.author: Mike Caliban, Wolfe Locke
Parnival Wonderland.description: In the otherworld realm of Parknival Wonderland begins the story of a boy who loves a girl. Meet Grey, a former baker turned magical park manager, and Billie, a curious and innocent dungeon spirit who dreams of being human.

Path of Violence.title: Path of Violence: A LitRPG Apocalypse
Path of Violence.author: James Cook
Path of Violence.description: When the world ends, some men find redemption in the ashes. Aiden Wyatt was a drug dealer, a thief, and a lost cause—until the System descended on Earth. Now, in a world where stats mean survival and monsters roam the wilderness, Aiden’s criminal past is his greatest weapon.

Awakening the Angel System.title: Awakening the Angel System: Apocalypse
Awakening the Angel System.author: Dungeon Ducky
Awakening the Angel System.description: King Jack. The title was still foreign to Jack who had no love for the empire or the throne. But, with his loved ones secured and his daughter safe, Jack now has the opportunity to do one thing he never thought he could do. Be a father.

Wayward.title: Wayward: Running: An Isekai LitRPG
Wayward.author: T. A. Star
Wayward.description: For as long as she can remember, Phoenix Fraser has been stuck. Stuck in the wrong body, losing both friends and family, and no future to plan for.

Wayward.title: Wayward: Fighting: An Isekai LitRPG
Wayward.author: T. A. Star
Wayward.description: A teen transported to a world of magic and mayhem must navigate new alliances, strange abilities, and found family in the second book of this LitRPG series.

Wayward.title: Wayward: Falling: An Isekai LitRPG
Wayward.author: T. A. Star
Wayward.description: Phoenix faces her greatest threat yet, all the while juggling dresses and dancing, monsters and maniacal politicians, in the third book of this LitRPG series.

Virtual Deviation.title: Virtual Deviation
Virtual Deviation.author: AL Traversky
Virtual Deviation.description: After a bad breakup with his ex-girlfriend, a vacation on a quiet Island is supposed to help Neil recover and relax. But without warning, he finds his whole life reset. It's either an apocalypse across the whole of planet earth, or some kind of new, evil system.

Virtual Deviation.title: Virtual Deviation 2
Virtual Deviation.author: AL Traversky
Virtual Deviation.description: First 36 hours of the apocalypse completed. How much worse can a life reset alongside your ex and her hostile new boyfriend get? Neil and his small party have survived the initial cull on the vacation island. They've made enough early progression to fight off the first wave of mutated creatures.

The Amatherean Tales.title: One Flew over the Dragon's Nest: An Isekai LitRPG
The Amatherean Tales.author: Bosloe
The Amatherean Tales.description: In this portal fantasy, an accountant reincarnated as a fae assassin must battle, barter, and grind to survive in a world filled with magical dangers.

The Amatherean Tales.title: A Clockwork Ogre: An Isekai LitRPG
The Amatherean Tales.author: Bosloe
The Amatherean Tales.description: An unlikely hero is embroiled in village politics, a fantastical war, and an orphan's vengeful quest in the second book of this portal fantasy series.

The Amatherean Tales.title: Tailor on the Roof: An Isekai LitRPG
The Amatherean Tales.author: Bosloe
The Amatherean Tales.description: Asterfal is a city of staggering contrasts: high glamour and abject destitution, corrupt politicians and an exploited working class, ostentatious greed and quiet suffering. SJ arrives set to be inaugurated into the city's council as the ambassador of Killic.

Order & Chaos.title: Arcane Knight Omnibus: Books 4-6
Order & Chaos.author: Timothy McGowen
Order & Chaos.description: Caldor has survived the War, but the scars it left behind run deep. Though he managed to save many lives, he lost friends in the process of it all. Forces have been set into motion that won't wait and soon Caldor finds himself back in the Southlands to help his mentor and friend Warrick.

New Arcadia.title: New Arcadia: Judgment Day
New Arcadia.author: Eric Jason Martin
New Arcadia.description: In a grim, not-so-distant future, humanity is in crisis. A deadly pandemic has confined billions to their homes, leaving society completely isolated in their homes and utterly dependent on the mega-global Chum Corporation.
New Arcadia.narrator: Eric Jason Martin, Robert Patrick, Matthew Mercer, Erika Ishii, Sam Riegel, Dave Fennoy, Marin Ireland, January LaVoy

The New Dark Lord.title: The New Dark Lord: An Isekai Progression Fantasy
The New Dark Lord.author: Ian B. Urns, A. C. Erinle
The New Dark Lord.description: In the first installment of this epic of magic and battle, a powerful necromancer comes to the aid of a nation in peril—but is he a savior or a threat?

The New Dark Lord.title: The New Dark Lord 2: An Isekai Progression Fantasy
The New Dark Lord.author: Ian B. Urns, A. C. Erinle
The New Dark Lord.description: The dark caster, Silenos, has conquered a kingdom and installed a princess as his puppet—but will an unseen force prove more powerful than his magic?

Shadowborn Exile.title: Shadowborn Exile: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
Shadowborn Exile.author: Harmon Cooper
Shadowborn Exile.description: A powerful shadow warrior ventures deep into darkness to save his home in this action-packed progression fantasy from the author of the Pilgrim series.

Shadowborn Exile.title: Shadowborn Exile 2: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
Shadowborn Exile.author: Harmon Cooper
Shadowborn Exile.description: Darkness presses in from lower tiers of the Spiralrealm, and for Attica, survival is no longer enough, in the second book of this thrilling progression-fantasy epic.

Cinnamon Bun.title: Cinnamon Bun Volume 7: A Wholesome LitRPG
Cinnamon Bun.author: RavensDagger
