Cinnamon Bun.description: Dungeon explorers! Pirate thwarters! Wedding guests? More adventures await Broccoli Bunch and friends in the seventh book of this cozy fantasy adventure.

Apocalypse Rebirth.title: Apocalypse Rebirth: A LitRPG Adventure
Apocalypse Rebirth.author: Yorth
Apocalypse Rebirth.description: Thorian Steelblade stood on the edge of victory, ready to carve his family's name into history. But treachery struck from within, and in his final act of defiance, he unleashed a devastating self-destruction spell. Yet death did not claim him.

Youngest Son of the Black-Hearted.title: Youngest Son of the Black-Hearted
Youngest Son of the Black-Hearted.author: Alvin Atwater
Youngest Son of the Black-Hearted.description: Am I the villain in a different coat of paint or just the bane of a corrupted empire? I wonder... Around age twenty-seven, they finally caught me off guard.

Youngest Son of the Black-Hearted.title: Malicious Influence
Youngest Son of the Black-Hearted.author: Alvin Atwater
Youngest Son of the Black-Hearted.description: It seems like popularity and enemies in the empire are increasing much too fast... Seventh Thunder Lord, Chen Thunder, has undeniably left his mark on the empire. However, suspicions linger that there may be a mastermind behind the former Chosen One's attack. Could it be true?

Fantasy World of Dorbin.title: Arena Manager
Fantasy World of Dorbin.author: Chad Opo
Fantasy World of Dorbin.description: Frank lived for his three sons, busting his back to see they thrived in comfort. His good for nothing wife, she made him the happiest man in the world when she finally agreed to his divorce terms. His glorious day turned to ruin when an explosion hurls him through an unformed portal connection.

Fantasy World of Dorbin.title: Arena Manager Boxset
Fantasy World of Dorbin.author: Chad Opo
Fantasy World of Dorbin.description: Frank lived for his three sons, busting his back to see they thrived in comfort. His good for nothing wife, she made him the happiest man in the world when she finally agreed to his divorce terms. His glorious day turned to ruin when an explosion hurls him through an unformed portal connection.

Fantasy World of Dorbin.title: Mercenary Manager
Fantasy World of Dorbin.author: Chad Opo
Fantasy World of Dorbin.description: Nothing is perfect on Dorbin. Frank knowns the planet is rife with issues that only exacerbate his problems. After being run ragged all over Lornshire, he's eager to find a nice home.

Fantasy World of Dorbin.title: Castle Manager
Fantasy World of Dorbin.author: Chad Opo
Fantasy World of Dorbin.description: A home. Finally a home. Frank finds stability, eager to convert Team Zeppelin into a mighty empire who welcomes all. Those damn manipulators interfere and change everything. Suddenly, Frank becomes a Castle Manager, and so the adventure continues.

The Fantasy World of Nordan.title: Isekai Magus
The Fantasy World of Nordan.author: Han Yang
The Fantasy World of Nordan.description: Damien was a simple man, cruising on the highway of life. A goddess of temptation lures him into a deal he scoffs at. To him, superstition is for the foolish. Small problem: she's real, her ritual works, and Damien is magically teleported into a strange new realm.
The Fantasy World of Nordan.narrator: Landon Reid, Erin Bateman, Marissa Parness, Alex Perone

The Fantasy World of Nordan.title: Isekai Magus Omnibus
The Fantasy World of Nordan.author: Han Yang
The Fantasy World of Nordan.description: Damien was a simple man, cruising on the highway of life. A goddess of temptation lures him into a deal he scoffs at. To him, superstition is for the foolish. Small problem: she's real, her ritual works, and Damien is magically teleported into a strange new realm.
The Fantasy World of Nordan.narrator: Landon Reid, Erin Bateman, Marissa Parness, Alex Perone

The Fantasy World of Nordan.title: Isekai Magus 2
The Fantasy World of Nordan.author: Han Yang
The Fantasy World of Nordan.description: Join Tribe Moonguard as they continue to improve, adjust, and grow on their epic journey. Damien is no longer the lost and confused Earthling. His magical progression provide powers greater than he ever envisioned and he now commands an expanding army.

The Fantasy World of Nordan.title: Isekai Magus 3
The Fantasy World of Nordan.author: Han Yang
The Fantasy World of Nordan.description: Join Tribe Moonguard as they strive to gain levels, repair their castle city, and fight off endless hordes.

The Fantasy World of Nordan.title: Isekai Magus 4
The Fantasy World of Nordan.author: Han Yang
The Fantasy World of Nordan.description: A year has passed since Damien’s forces triumphed over their mortal enemies. Though the land seems peaceful, a demonic presence lies in wait just below the surface.

Monster Girl Tamer.title: I'm an Isekai Hero! Of Course I'm Fighting a Demon Lord: A LitRPG Fantasy Adventure
Monster Girl Tamer.author: Edie Skye, H.P. Holo
Monster Girl Tamer.description: It’s been three months since Axel Hunter Radcliff fell through a magic portal into another world of dangerous monsters. Hailing from a family of Chosen Ones, he’s trained his whole life to be a hero. He just didn’t expect destiny to involve taming monster girls into semi-civilized adventurers.

The Crafter.title: The Crafter 2: The Enchanted City
The Crafter.author: Dan Sugralinov
The Crafter.description: Trapped in a deadly game, sixth-grader Kenny and his friends must survive a cursed wilderness where danger lurks behind every tree.

A Budding Scientist in a Fantasy World.title: The Broken System: An Isekai LitRPG
A Budding Scientist in a Fantasy World.series: A Budding Scientist in a Fantasy World
A Budding Scientist in a Fantasy World.author: Acaswell
A Budding Scientist in a Fantasy World.description: Amid a total System collapse, a courageous young woman must work quickly to find the cause, as this wildly inventive fantasy adventure continues.

Path of Dragons.title: Shadow of the Hunter: An Apocalypse LitRPG
Path of Dragons.author: Nicholas Searcy
Path of Dragons.description: On the path to salvation, power is earned in blood and every choice comes with a cost, in this heart-pounding epic from the author of Death: Genesis.

Path of Dragons.title: A Druid's Wrath: An Apocalypse LitRPG
Path of Dragons.author: Nicholas Searcy
Path of Dragons.description: Grief, vengeance, and redemption collide as Elijah's journey reaches new depths in the fourth book of this LitRPG epic from the author of Death: Genesis.

Symphony.title: Displacement: A Sci-Fi LitRPG Adventure
Symphony.author: J. D. Mullenary Sr.
Symphony.description: In this portal fantasy, a former teacher must learn to become a god to survive the Creator Wars and build a harmonious world amidst the stirrings of war.

Symphony.title: Strandbinder: A Sci-Fi LitRPG Adventure
Symphony.author: J. D. Mullenary Sr.
Symphony.description: In this portal fantasy, a freshly crowned god explores the omniverse and discovers there's more to the world he created than he's been led to believe.

Rise of a Manor Lord.title: Rise of a Manor Lord 2
Rise of a Manor Lord.author: T.E. Bakutis
Rise of a Manor Lord.description: Drake has secured his manor and his people’s loyalty. Now, it’s time to go on offense. Confronted with a mandatory summons from the capital city, Drake reluctantly takes his new manor on the road.

Cultivation Is a Game.title: Cultivation Is a Game: A Xianxia LitRPG
Cultivation Is a Game.author: Kalzara
Cultivation Is a Game.description: A xianxia fan finds himself swept into a system-run world—and he's about to learn there's a rather harsh difference between fantasy and reality....

Cultivation Is a Game.title: Cultivation Is a Game 2: A Xianxia LitRPG
Cultivation Is a Game.author: Kalzara
Cultivation Is a Game.description: In the second installment of this xianxia series, Kai's gaining power and attracting attention, but can he keep juggling the lies without dropping the act?

Cultivation Is a Game.title: Cultivation Is a Game 3: A Xianxia LitRPG
Cultivation Is a Game.author: Kalzara
Cultivation Is a Game.description: Kai's growing in power and skill, but his grand ambitions face grim reality, in the thrilling third installment of this xianxia adventure series.

How to Succeed in Monster Farming After.title: How to Succeed in Monster Farming After Getting Rejected by the Hero Guild
How to Succeed in Monster Farming After.series: How to Succeed in Monster Farming After Getting Rejected by the Hero Guild
How to Succeed in Monster Farming After.author: Kenny King
How to Succeed in Monster Farming After.description: The first book in an action-packed, witty LitRPG series about a regular giu given a farm to cultivate when the world told him he would never be a hero. But when he proves more resourceful than anyone expected, he draws the attention of some very dangerous monsters to his farm… Nick was just...

How to Succeed in Monster Farming After.title: How to Succeed in Monster Farming After Getting Rejected by the Hero Guild 2
How to Succeed in Monster Farming After.series: How to Succeed in Monster Farming After Getting Rejected by the Hero Guild
How to Succeed in Monster Farming After.author: Kenny King
How to Succeed in Monster Farming After.description: The second book in an action-packed, epic, and hilarious LitRPG fantasy series about an underdog who was never supposed to be a hero—but when he’s forced to manage a cursed magical farm, he proves himself far more resilient (and luckier) than any monster—or god—expected. Nicholas Parker...

How to Succeed in Monster Farming After.title: How to Succeed in Monster Farming After Getting Rejected by the Hero Guild 3
How to Succeed in Monster Farming After.series: How to Succeed in Monster Farming After Getting Rejected by the Hero Guild
How to Succeed in Monster Farming After.author: Kenny King
How to Succeed in Monster Farming After.description: A ticking clock. A dying world. One man’s impossible promise. Nick wanted peace, just a quiet farm, a thriving crew, and a future with Syllia. But when dimensional contagion strikes, infecting her and everyone who’s lived too close to his cursed reality, peace dies screaming. Now, with only...

Elysium's Multiverse.title: Into Darkness: An Apocalypse LitRPG
Elysium's Multiverse.author: Ranyhin1
Elysium's Multiverse.description: In the seventh installment of this apocalyptic adventure, a vampire must battle merciless scions to achieve honor as he descends farther into the abyss.

Elysium's Multiverse.title: World War: An Apocalypse LitRPG
Elysium's Multiverse.author: Ranyhin1
Elysium's Multiverse.description: The balance of Panu is tested by otherworldly forces who seek to bring its vampiric ruler to his knees in the eighth book of this apocalyptic adventure.

Time Loop Progression Fantasy.title: Offworlder: Ten Lives Left
Time Loop Progression Fantasy.author: D. R. R. Hatch
Time Loop Progression Fantasy.description: Zale is horrified. He’s in a completely new body on an entirely different planet, and wants nothing else but to return home. But his hopes are shattered when his only way back becomes the focal point for a deadly cultist—one who calls down a flaming storm of death.

Alpha Agent: A Progression Cyberpunk Lit.title: Alpha Agent
Alpha Agent: A Progression Cyberpunk Lit.series: Alpha Agent: A Progression Cyberpunk LitRPG
Alpha Agent: A Progression Cyberpunk Lit.author: Kevin Do
Alpha Agent: A Progression Cyberpunk Lit.description: Dan Erikson lay cold and alone, bleeding to death. After a disastrous gang fight, Dan’s life has run its course on the crime-ridden streets of New York. But the mysterious Alpha Corporation intervenes and drags him from the brink of death.

Alpha Agent: A Progression Cyberpunk Lit.title: Alpha Agent 2: A Cyberpunk LitRPG - Weak to Strong Progression Fantasy
Alpha Agent: A Progression Cyberpunk Lit.series: Alpha Agent: A Progression Cyberpunk LitRPG
Alpha Agent: A Progression Cyberpunk Lit.author: Kevin Do
Alpha Agent: A Progression Cyberpunk Lit.description: Kodak-Cresh has stolen the Arctic serums. Can the Alpha Corp pull off the miracle heist?

Stray Cat Strut.title: Stray Cat Strut 7: A Cyberpunk LitRPG
Stray Cat Strut.author: RavensDagger
Stray Cat Strut.description: Cyborg samurai Catherine LeBlanc pulls out the big guns—literally—when aliens unleash an apocalyptic weapon in the seventh book of this cyberpunk adventure.

Stray Cat Strut.title: Stray Cat Strut 8: A Cyberpunk LitRPG
Stray Cat Strut.author: RavensDagger
Stray Cat Strut.description: It's back to school for Cat Leblanc, where the cyborg samurai gets high marks in ultraviolence against both gangsters and aliens, in this cyberpunk adventure.

The Twelve Apocalypses.title: The Twelve Apocalypses, Book 1
The Twelve Apocalypses.author: AT Valentine
The Twelve Apocalypses.description: The universe is big, and Hayden's about to invade it. Being drafted into a demon army wasn't on Hayden's bucket list. But when his soul is shoved into a human soldier on the eve of a new invasion, it’s not exactly like he can appeal the decision.

An Unprecedented Prospect.title: An Unprecedented Prospect Omnibus: Books 1-3
An Unprecedented Prospect.author: Rise!, Sebastian Guzman
An Unprecedented Prospect.description: An Unprecedented Prospect Omnibus tells the story of Blair Blackenskiff as he dives into a new world and the fierce competition he was dropped into. The challenges, the allies, the enemies, the mysteries—Blair will get a taste of them in this Isekai Gamelit adventure.

Heroes of the Final Frontier.title: Heroes of the Final Frontier 8
Heroes of the Final Frontier.author: Dem Mikhailov, Mikhail Yagupov - translator
Heroes of the Final Frontier.description: The Brotherhood of the Path, a tight-knit and determined group of five players, finds themselves in one of Waldyra's secret corners. And they find game's rules and laws to be entirely different here in the Forgotten Lands. This is the domain of old-school hardcore eventually deemed too brutal...

Totally Spiritual.title: Totally Spiritual 2: An Urban Fantasy LitRPG
Totally Spiritual.author: Quinn Rivers
Totally Spiritual.description: Hunted by two powerful organizations, a spunky boy risks it all to expand his mystifying new magic as malevolent forces threaten to destroy everything.

Mycology.title: Sidekicks and Sidequests: A LitRPG Adventure
Mycology.author: Sir Nil
Mycology.description: An apathetic introvert accidentally finds himself on the cusp of friendship, heroism, and doom in the third book of this epic fantasy-adventure series.

Rebuild the World.title: Rebuild the World: Alaska
Rebuild the World.author: Justin Marks
Rebuild the World.description: Devin moved to a small island town in Alaska for a fresh start. Now, his quiet life has turned into a fight for survival against plunging temperatures and an extraterrestrial invasion.

Retrogression Keeper.title: The Lone Keeper
Retrogression Keeper.author: Jonathan Brooks
Retrogression Keeper.description: What happens when a new Keeper recruit inadvertently eliminates not only the other recruits, but all of the teachers, as well? At first, when Bax suddenly found himself transported from Earth to an organization of powerful, universe-spanning races, he was thoroughly confused.

Retrogression Keeper.title: The Alternate Keeper
Retrogression Keeper.author: Jonathan Brooks
Retrogression Keeper.description: The Lone Keeper has an entire world to protect, but that world is about to get a whole lot bigger…

Soulbound Contractor.title: Soul Card
Soulbound Contractor.author: WillPowah
Soulbound Contractor.description: All he wanted was a fresh start. Now he’ll have to fight to keep it. Dryth is an outcast—unwanted by his family and ostracized by his peers. His only dream? To get his Soul Card and vanish somewhere far from home. But, as always, nothing goes according to plan.

Black Rain.title: Black Rain: An Isekai LitRPG Adventure
Black Rain.author: Roland Carlsson
Black Rain.description: The black rain is coming. After a millennium of slumber, the old Gods have awakened.

In My Defense.title: Turret Mage: An Isekai LitRPG
In My Defense.author: J. Drude
In My Defense.description: A teenage mechanic must battle nightmarish creatures and create formidable weapons to defend his new home from dark forces in this thrilling portal fantasy. When Ryan Kotes awakens on an alien planet, his mind is a complete mess.

In My Defense.title: Machine Mage: An Isekai LitRPG
In My Defense.author: J. Drude
In My Defense.description: Coming off his first victory over the Scourge, Ryan Kotes is a bona fide hero to the people of Eclipse. But the war is far from over. The zombifying infection is still festering throughout Ralqir, and Ryan won't quit until he beats every last bit of it to a pulp.

My Magus Academy is Run By Players!?.title: My Magus Academy Is Run By Players!? 2
My Magus Academy is Run By Players!?.series: My Magus Academy is Run By Players!?
My Magus Academy is Run By Players!?.author: Astralium
My Magus Academy is Run By Players!?.description: The game’s getting real, and the Headmaster’s past Is coming back to haunt him.

Undersea Reincarnation.title: Undersea Reincarnation
Undersea Reincarnation.author: CalCroissant
Undersea Reincarnation.description: Follow Henry, a small Trickster Octopus trying to survive in a vast and unfamiliar ocean.

Undersea Reincarnation.title: Undersea Reincarnation 2
Undersea Reincarnation.author: CalCroissant
Undersea Reincarnation.description: Henry and Maurice have finally reached the Great Current, a deadly stretch of ocean where only the strong survive. They expected monsters. Endless battles. A brutal climb toward power. What they didn’t expect… was civilization.

Legend of the Spear Saint.title: New Beginnings: An Isekai LitRPG
Legend of the Spear Saint.author: A. T. Valentine
Legend of the Spear Saint.description: Every epic foe sees a hero or two rise to save the day, protect the helpless, and vanquish evil; unfortunately, there are three heroes this time....

Legend of the Spear Saint.title: Shattered Light: An Isekai LitRPG
Legend of the Spear Saint.author: A. T. Valentine
Legend of the Spear Saint.description: When he's sent at the king's command to the demon-razed frontier, Rowan is no longer just a spare hero—and it'll take all that he knows and more to survive.

Legend of the Spear Saint.title: The Heroes: An Isekai LitRPG
Legend of the Spear Saint.author: A. T. Valentine
Legend of the Spear Saint.description: Rowan wasn't supposed to be a hero, but after becoming one by leading his people to victory against a demonic enemy . . . now he's really got problems.

Dark Matter Ascension.title: Dark Matter Ascension: Book 4
Dark Matter Ascension.author: SerasStreams
Dark Matter Ascension.description: Jace Seren has achieved what no others have before: become a Tier 10 Ascendant within The Cosmic System. As part of this achievement, he is now permanently infused with it and can never lose the phenomenal powers he has gained.

Dark Matter Ascension.title: Dark Matter Ascension: Book 5
Dark Matter Ascension.author: SerasStreams
Dark Matter Ascension.description: Jace Seren, Tier 10 Ascendant, the only person who wields both Dark Matter and Void through The Cosmic System, delved into the Astral Verge. A journey outside of his Universe that took him through the realm wrought from the shared dreams and nightmares of all Universes.

Depthless Hunger.title: Depthless Hunger
Depthless Hunger.author: Sarah Lin, Cognosticon
Depthless Hunger.description: Kai is the hardest working warrior in his generation... and the unluckiest. In a world where most people receive magical skills, classes, or cultivation, Kai has nothing but his wits and his strength. His only choice will be to forge a new path against fate, no matter where it takes him.

Depthless Hunger.title: Depthless Hunger 2
Depthless Hunger.author: Sarah Lin
Depthless Hunger.description: Having witnessed gods fighting during the great incursion, Kai and Zae Zin Nim travel across the continent, hungry to attain those reaches of power. Their search leads them to the riches of Krysal, whose crystal cities tell stories of well-fed citizens... and strength that can be bought.

Skill Eater.title: Skill Eater 2
Skill Eater.author: Magnus Grey
Skill Eater.description: While Edge was returning from his latest adventure, Puppet Town received a quest from the System that would either help the settlement survive or seal its fate.

Skill Eater.title: Skill Eater 3
Skill Eater.author: Magnus Grey
Skill Eater.description: Edge has conquered the Savage Garden and claimed the core manufactory for Puppet Town, but the conflict with the Crimson Claws has entered a deadly new stage.

Slumrat Rising.title: His Own Man: A Cyberpunk LitRPG
Slumrat Rising.author: Warby Picus
Slumrat Rising.description: While others just want to come out on top in an apocalypse, Truth hopes to take down an evil god, in the epic final installment of this urban fantasy series.

The Corrupted Campaign.title: An Undead Glitch
The Corrupted Campaign.author: Chris Philbrook
The Corrupted Campaign.description: Seth Willard is broke, sick, and running out of time. A single dad drowning under bills and a cancer diagnosis, his last chance comes from a desperate gamble: taking a job as an NPC in a real world, fully immersive zombie survival experience.

Butcher of Gadobhra.title: Rise of the Fearless Leader
Butcher of Gadobhra.author: Walrus King
Butcher of Gadobhra.description: They were told to stay out of the ten-day war, but their side lost in the first hour. Their future is at stake, so now the Butcher and the other workers have to do the impossible: Win a war without anyone know they are fighting.

Warborn Prime Novel Series.title: Warborn, Book One: Crucible
Warborn Prime Novel Series.author: JD Glasscock
Warborn Prime Novel Series.description: The Crucible of War—A floating asteroid the size of a small planet carving its way through the universe. Eight Cities, a million participants, death, blood, carnage, control.

Warborn Prime Novel Series.title: Blood City (Warborn, Part 1)
Warborn Prime Novel Series.author: JD Glasscock
Warborn Prime Novel Series.description: The Crucible of War -- A floating asteroid the size of a small planet carving its way through the universe. Eight Cities, a million participants, death, blood, carnage, control. The Crucible is televised across the cosmos and provides entertainment for the The Great Galactic Empire and its Citizens.

Warborn Prime Novel Series.title: Painted Red (Warborn, Part 2)
Warborn Prime Novel Series.author: JD Glasscock
Warborn Prime Novel Series.description: Jeb has been chosen as a Contestant for the Crucible of War and he refuses to leave his two-year old Cane Corso, Bose, behind. Whatever they face, they will face together. They were supposed to go to a Tutorial where everything would be challenging but fair.

Warborn Prime Novel Series.title: Hard Roads (Warborn, Part 3)
Warborn Prime Novel Series.author: JD Glasscock
Warborn Prime Novel Series.description: Jeb, Bose and Bogie fell a bit short at getting through the warren that is the Skull and Bones Territory, an avalanche of Greenskins on their tails. Within a stone's throw to the safe haven that is the Emporium they are cornered.

Warborn Prime Novel Series.title: Warborn, Part 4: The Emporium
Warborn Prime Novel Series.author: JD Glasscock
Warborn Prime Novel Series.description: They've made it through the Iron Dungeon but not without a heavy cost, mentally and spiritually, for Jeb.

Nightmare Realm Summoner.title: Nightmare Realm Summoner 2
Nightmare Realm Summoner.author: Actus
Nightmare Realm Summoner.description: The Apocalypse is the most fun Alex has had in his entire life. He’s having a grand time fighting every challenge the System throws at him—and making up a few of his own along the way. His antics have earned him a few friends…and a hell of a lot more enemies.

Isekai Gem Mage.title: Ruby Mage
Isekai Gem Mage.author: Dan Raxor
Isekai Gem Mage.description: Using a special ruby, Trevor discovers a fantasy world where powerful men obtain foxy ladies swish their tails, and magic is real. An awesome kicker—he's a ruby mage capable of turning his foes to cinder.

Isekai Gem Mage.title: Ruby Mage Omnibus
Isekai Gem Mage.author: Dan Raxor
Isekai Gem Mage.description: Using a special ruby, Trevor discovers a fantasy world where powerful men obtain foxy ladies swish their tails, and magic is real. An awesome kicker—he's a ruby mage capable of turning his foes to cinder.

Isekai Gem Mage.title: Ruby Mage 2
Isekai Gem Mage.author: Dan Raxor
Isekai Gem Mage.description: Trevor finds himself in a battle of survival mixed with conquest. His growing team of beauties not only dares to persist, but thrive. Join Trevor as he excels as the Ruby Mage!

Isekai Gem Mage.title: Ruby Mage 3
Isekai Gem Mage.author: Dan Raxor
Isekai Gem Mage.description: Trevor is the fabled Ruby Mage, a true master of the flame. His home, his people, his family; they mean everything to him. When a powerful dragon threatens everything he's built, he'll stop at nothing to defeat his enemy.

Transcending Levels.title: Mayor of Mythos
Transcending Levels.author: Han Yang
Transcending Levels.description: Right as the world comes to an end, Devon is presented with an opportunity to escape Earth's demise. A most unusual benefactor grants him an opportunity at a new life in a land of magical cards, mythical creatures, and unique pedestals to manage his progress.

Transcending Levels.title: Mayor of Mythos 2
Transcending Levels.author: Han Yang, Ike Summers
Transcending Levels.description: Despite all the odds, Devon has conquered his way into a stronghold on Mythos. Hard work, luck, and determination have built him a home. But will the magic, cards, and friends Devon’s made be enough to stop the enemies of humanity and the ongoing threats?

Terra Mythica.title: Beyond the Veil: A LitRPG Adventure
Terra Mythica.author: Fobywoby, John Stax
Terra Mythica.description: Jace was never supposed to enter Terra Mythica—let alone become the chosen of Hades, lead a one-man underworld club, or moonlight as an exorcist for possessed teens with god-complexes. But after months trapped in this so-called game, the boundary between code and cosmos has shattered.

Machinist of Mana.title: Machinist of Mana: A Progression Fantasy
Machinist of Mana.author: Wandering Agent
Machinist of Mana.description: A shortcut through the woods transports a machinist to a new world in the first installment of this steampunk portal fantasy by the author of Melody of Mana.

Machinist of Mana.title: Machinist of Mana 2: A Progression Fantasy
Machinist of Mana.author: Wandering Agent
Machinist of Mana.description: An otherworlder navigates courtly customs, magical machinations, and entangled alliances in the second book of this captivating steampunk isekai series.

Wolf of the Blood Moon.title: The Demonic War: A Blood Magic Lycanthrope LitRPG
Wolf of the Blood Moon.author: Shane Purdy
Wolf of the Blood Moon.description: After growing far stronger throughout her time on Tartarus, Scarlet is finally ready to move on. To return to Earth. And to finally join the war between the humans and demons. But first she has to figure out how to return home. And to do that, she may have to take up a Demon Lord's offer.

The Aetherborn.title: The Aetherborn 1
The Aetherborn.author: Deadalus
The Aetherborn.description: Thorne’s world is thrown into chaos when he uncovers the truth about his heritage. He is an Aetherborn, tied to an ancient power that others would kill to control.

Rise of the Devourer.title: Dragon's Heart
Rise of the Devourer.author: KrazeKode
Rise of the Devourer.description: The tournament awaits, holding great rewards and secrets behind it.

Regressor Sect Master.title: Regressor Sect Master
Regressor Sect Master.author: Spaizzzer
Regressor Sect Master.description: His end is the start of a new path. Tundra Fox, a cultivator of immense power and Sect Master of the Verdant Snow Sect, faces an eldritch god from beyond and dies. But that's only where his story begins.

Regressor Sect Master.title: Regressor Sect Master 2: A Xianxia Progression Fantasy
Regressor Sect Master.author: Spaizzzer
Regressor Sect Master.description: Book two of this new Xianxia Fantasy series by Spaizzzer, the best-selling author of Tree of Aeons.

That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime.title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime, Vol. 7 (light novel)
That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime.series: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime
That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime.author: Fuse, Mitz Mitz Vah, Kevin Gifford - translator
That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime.description: A gutsy glob in crisis!News of the demon lord Clayman’s defeat by Rimuru shakes the Holy Empire of Lubelius to its core—especially since the chief knight of the nation’s Imperial Guard and captain of the Crusader forces, Hinata Sakaguchi, launched a bold attack on Rimuru not long ago...

Fleabag.title: Fleabag 2: A Monster Evolution LitRPG
Fleabag.author: SomeoneToForget
Fleabag.description: Evolving with human traits that conflict with its animal nature, a wolf is stalked by those seeking to capture and control it, in this grimdark fantasy.

Fleabag.title: Fleabag 3: A Monster Evolution LitRPG
Fleabag.author: SomeoneToForget
Fleabag.description: It's been nearly a millennium since wolves prowled the earth. They're only spoken of as mythical destroyers of life. But one solitary wolf, born a simple, primal beast, is becoming the very monster of legend feared by both humans and otherworldly creatures.

RE: Maelstrom.title: Time Breaker
RE: Maelstrom.author: Aster Loka
RE: Maelstrom.description: Once upon a time, a mageblade-in-training lost his best friend. His soul refused to let her go, and his unformed soulspell developed the ability to revert the timeline to the week before her death. It wasn't enough. No matter what he did, said, or tried, her death was set in stone.

Elemental Mastery.title: Tempest
Elemental Mastery.author: DB King
Elemental Mastery.description: For all his 21 years, Zephyr has been a cultivator of the Carefree Path and a martial artist. He always assumed he would take the vows and become a monk, but his plans are thrown to the wind when he receives a letter from the Grand Sage to attend the Schools of Elemental Magic.

Elemental Mastery.title: Inferno
Elemental Mastery.author: DB King
Elemental Mastery.description: After completing his first year at the Tempest School, Zephyr ventures into the realms protected by the Phoenix Knights. There, he will learn Inferno magic and delve deeper into the mystery of his origins. Joined by Nella and Vincent, he will discover what it truly means to be Caruthas reborn.

Crafter's Fate.title: Crafter's Fate 1: A LitRPG Adventure
Crafter's Fate.author: DB King
Crafter's Fate.description: Those granted Fates from the Gods can become so much more than human…they are the Fated. Alastair is one such Fated. Gifted with the Crafter Class after his village is decimated, he can now create priceless enchanted gear.

Crafter's Fate.title: Crafter's Fate 2
Crafter's Fate.author: DB King
Crafter's Fate.description: Alastair and Damon venture out of the Middle Kingdom. As always, they seek to gather the finest materials to craft items worthy of the gods. Their journey brings with it great dangers, and they uncover secrets beneath the earth that speak of humanity's origins in this world.

Unranked Ascension.title: Unranked Ascension 1: A LitRPG Apocalypse
Unranked Ascension.author: Perry Okeefe
Unranked Ascension.description: Humanity's guardian is dead, monsters roam freely, and only those who grow stronger will survive.

The Hero Slayers.title: The Hero Slayers Tempt Fate: A LitRPG Adventure
The Hero Slayers.author: O. S. Marrow
The Hero Slayers.description: When their latest hunt reveals a world-threatening infestation, the Slayers are forced to team up with their rivals, in the third book of this fantasy adventure.

The Hero Slayers.title: The Hero Slayers Die Trying: A LitRPG Adventure
The Hero Slayers.author: O. S. Marrow
The Hero Slayers.description: With more at stake than ever, the Slayers wage a fearless war to rid the world of the Council for good, in the last book of the thrilling fantasy adventure.

Apocalypse Knights.title: Apocalypse Knights 2
Apocalypse Knights.author: DB King
Apocalypse Knights.description: After venturing into the Forlorn Dungeon, Maximo Strident has obtained the Arcanist class and become a Knight-Errant. Now, he knows what lays within the strange dungeon: the future. The Apocalypse.

Apocalypse Knights.title: Apocalypse Knights 3
Apocalypse Knights.author: DB King
Apocalypse Knights.description: Maximo Strident and the Apocalypse Knights venture deeper into the Apocalypse Horizon. More and more dungeons appear, and it quickly becomes apparent that their previous methods might not cut it.

Apocalypse Reaver.title: Apocalypse Reaver 2: A Dark Fantasy LitRPG Adventure
Apocalypse Reaver.author: TobascoAsako
Apocalypse Reaver.description: Gilgamesh is no longer a slave, but freedom comes with a price. Still adapting to the savage world of Gesthe, he is tasked with escorting a secretive half-elf to Al-Lazar, the City of Dust.

Apocalypse Reaver.title: Apocalypse Reaver 3: A Dark Fantasy LitRPG Adventure
Apocalypse Reaver.author: TobascoAsako
Apocalypse Reaver.description: Gilgamesh has finally reached Al-Lazar, the legendary City of Dust. But what he finds is not salvation. It's rot wrapped in gold, and his companions are already coming apart at the seams.

Lost Souls and a Demoness.title: Lost Souls and a Demoness 2
Lost Souls and a Demoness.author: N. C. Lux
Lost Souls and a Demoness.description: The clock is ticking for Earth, and in more ways than one. Dangerous monsters are pouring out of the Labyrinth, dimensional events scour resources from the land, and beneath it all, demonic plots begin to bear fruit.

All His Angels Are Starving.title: All Our Worlds Are Crashing: A Survival Horror LitRPG
All His Angels Are Starving.author: Tess C. Foxes
All His Angels Are Starving.description: A high school student turned unlikely hero embarks on a brutal quest to save humanity from vengeful angels in the last book of this dark LitRPG series.

Incursion.title: Incursion II
Incursion.author: Dennis Vanderkerken
Incursion.description: Dii Van Damme is eight feet tall, built like a siege engine, and powered by stolen cosmic glitches. With a talking ferret, a janitor’s badge, and the mysterious BlackBox, he’s survived Eldritch Realms and weaponized the chaotic system known as Wrong Warp.

Incursion.title: Incursion III: A LitRPG Adventure
Incursion.author: Dennis Vanderkerken
Incursion.description: As a Titan of a human being, Dii Van Damme embodies this idea. Having mastered the fundamentals of his Stolen Cosmic Power, his expanding arsenal now enables him to transition seamlessly from defense to offense. If enemies from other Realms attack him where he lives, then he can do the same.

The Science of Cultivation.title: The Science of Cultivation
The Science of Cultivation.author: randombluecat
The Science of Cultivation.description: Reincarnated into a world of cultivation, Scientist Langley Seiker no longer has to dream about immortality. It's now possible. Except for the fact that he has no talent.

The Lone Wanderer.title: Phantom of the Haunted Bog
The Lone Wanderer.author: K. Georgiades aka PathOfPen
The Lone Wanderer.description: A world-shaking discovery. Elixirs coveted by gods. A frantic escape.

The Lone Wanderer.title: Shadow of the Holy Child
The Lone Wanderer.author: K. Georgiades aka PathofPen
The Lone Wanderer.description: Percy has finally fought his way free from his family's province, seizing a cache of elixirs and putting his next promotion within reach. That is, if he can get a chance to cleanse his cores while evading practically the entire population of the planet.

Fifth Era Apocalypse.title: Catastrophe at the Collapsing College: A LitRPG Adventure
Fifth Era Apocalypse.author: Ryan Rimmel
Fifth Era Apocalypse.description: One bad roll catapulted them into a new world and now they have to deal with the greatest danger of all... higher education.

Somebody Stop Her.title: Somebody Stop Them: A Superhero/Apocalypse LitRPG
Somebody Stop Her.author: Vitaly S. Alexius
Somebody Stop Her.description: In the final installment of this witty LitRPG series, Martin consolidates allies, confronts cryptids, and amasses power in his quest for annihilation.

The Virtual Realms Series.title: Locked In: A Gamelit Fantasy
The Virtual Realms Series.author: M. J. Lau
The Virtual Realms Series.description: Everett Starner is a nobody. He doesn't play sports. He's not smart enough to stand out in school. He's not really good at anything except video games, which would be fine ... if they didn't randomly trigger his epilepsy.

The Traveller's Trilogy.title: Traveller's Trial
The Traveller's Trilogy.author: Chikao J
The Traveller's Trilogy.description: Koji Athame left his house for the first time in five years today. When what was supposed to be a quick trip to visit his parents, turns into a deadly crash. Koji finds himself waking up in a realm of danger and wonder beyond his wildest imagination.

Oppose the System.title: Oppose the System 2
Oppose the System.author: System Lad
Oppose the System.description: Most will die. Some will survive. A small few will thrive. My party and I cleared the dungeon in Griffith Park, got a ton of loot, and saved the safe zone.

Dark Healer.title: The Dark Healer: Book 10
Dark Healer.author: Alex Toxic, Nadya Lee, Dan Veksler - translator
Dark Healer.description: The past never dies, it only lies in wait. The necromancers are awakening an ancient power. The lines between different epochs are blurring. While his enemies weave their deceitful web, Maximilian Richter invokes an ally who remembers a pre-abomination world.

Dark Healer.title: The Dark Healer, Book 11
Dark Healer.author: Alex Toxic, Nadya Lee, Dan Veksler - translator
Dark Healer.description: The Great Princes' magical games conceal a hidden dimension. Abomination foci turn out to be not merely sources of blight, but portals through which creatures from another world pass.

Dark Healer.title: The Dark Healer, Book 12
Dark Healer.author: Alex Toxic, Nadya Lee, Dan Veksler - translator
Dark Healer.description: Scoundrels are always afraid of the truth. It reveals their true colors, which are otherwise concealed beneath a veneer of decency.

Dark Healer.title: The Dark Healer, Book 13
Dark Healer.author: Alex Toxic, Nadya Lee, Dan Veksler - translator
Dark Healer.description: Magical battles alone will not rid the world of Abomination. The necromancer prince Maximilian Richter sets out in search of knowledge that will help create new magical technologies.

Dark Healer.title: The Dark Healer, Book 14
Dark Healer.author: Alex Toxic, Nadya Lee, Dan Veksler - translator
Dark Healer.description: Mages live longer than regular people. Some of them live a thousand years before they even start to grow up. Otherwise, they'd know fighting necromancers was futile. We do not fear death; for us, it's all in a day's work.

Ancient Being Predecessor of the Primord.title: Ancient Being Predecessor of the Primordial Era
Ancient Being Predecessor of the Primord.series: Ancient Being Predecessor of the Primordial Era
Ancient Being Predecessor of the Primord.author: Z. Robert Nights
Ancient Being Predecessor of the Primord.description: Being mistaken for an Ancient Predecessor usually results in heavenly benefits. Not for James Anderson. After being thrown into an isolated training realm, he is quick to figure out that there is no tutorial. No guidance. No ancient being to fully unlock his system.

Oops! All Yandere!.title: Oops! All Yandere!
Oops! All Yandere!.author: Leon West
Oops! All Yandere!.description: Saving the world would be a lot easier if Kevin's destined partners would stop trying to murder each other.

You Are Summoned.title: You Are Summoned 4
You Are Summoned.author: Dean Henegar
You Are Summoned.description: Things are heating up on Earth, and Rico is doing his best to keep a lid on the chaos. But it’s not easy to help deal with the threats at home when you’re randomly summoned away at a moment’s notice.

You Are Summoned.title: You Are Summoned 5
You Are Summoned.author: Dean Henegar
You Are Summoned.description: Earth continues to struggle as the system infuses our world with mana. Creatures and those seeking power lurk on the fringes and it’s up to Rico and the other summoned beings to hold back the tide.

You Are Summoned.title: You Are Summoned 6
You Are Summoned.author: Dean Henegar
You Are Summoned.description: Being summoned to protect a burger joint from a monster, teach a class at the magic academy, or dealing with film critic cats, is something Rico is almost used to at this point.

Leveling Up the World.title: Leveling Up the World 10: A LitRPG Adventure
Leveling Up the World.author: L. Eclaire
Leveling Up the World.description: The epic culmination of a unique spin on Isekai LitRPG filled with countless pocket-realms to explore. A zero-to-hero, slow-build Progression Fantasy you won’t be able to put down.

Isekai Terry.title: Tropes of Doom
Isekai Terry.author: Eric Dontigney
Isekai Terry.description: Introverted computer programmer Terry Williams’ life is not exciting. It never has been, and he is A-OK with that. So, the last thing he expects on a hiking trail at the park is for Truck-kun to roar up and vehicular homicide him straight into another world.

Gladesbale Grove.title: Gladesbale Grove
Gladesbale Grove.author: Edwin M. Griffiths
Gladesbale Grove.description: Being a cog in the machine of an uncaring corporation has dulled Shawn's desire to see his dreams come true. He has accepted that he will never be a park ranger, fire watch, or anything fun. Instead, he works his keyboard to clean up other people's messes.

Imperial Summoner.title: Mage Academy 6
Imperial Summoner.author: Kal Griffith
Imperial Summoner.description: Ten years after saving the Empire, Ascended Mage Danny Youngblood faces a different kind of battle. His revolutionary teaching methods have made him enemies among the traditional mages at the Imperial Academy.

Second Chance Swordsman.title: Second Chance Swordsman 5
Second Chance Swordsman.author: Jakob Tanner
Second Chance Swordsman.description: It’s been three and a half years since Sam went back in time, and a new historical tragedy approaches. A powerful telepathic Traveler has kidnapped the queen of Sam’s nation and is holding an entire desert capital under his mental control.

Rules of Biomancy.title: Rules of Biomancy
Rules of Biomancy.author: NJ Buller
Rules of Biomancy.description: For almost half a century, Elijah had kept his Core sealed. It allowed him to stay in the shadows, to run his little alchemy shop on the outskirts of the slums without fear, but it also limited him. It made him weak.

Rise of The Infernal Paladin - A LitRPG.title: Infernal Liberation
Rise of The Infernal Paladin - A LitRPG.series: Rise of The Infernal Paladin - A LitRPG Apocalypse Adventure
Rise of The Infernal Paladin - A LitRPG.author: Emrys Ambrosius, L.R. Monroe
Rise of The Infernal Paladin - A LitRPG.description: If you crave LitRPGs with dark revenge, relentless action, and gripping character evolution, Rise of the Infernal Paladin will take you on an unforgettable ride. For fans of Diablo, Dresden Files, and the darker side of LitRPG.

The Undying Immortal System.title: Nine Rivers Sect
The Undying Immortal System.author: Greg Tolley
The Undying Immortal System.description: He returns again. The past still hurts. But his path continues into a new tomorrow. Su Fang has clawed his way through countless time loops and claimed the spatial fire seed. But behind him lies years of failures, regrets, and unpaid debts.

Arcanist in Another World.title: Arcanist in Another World
Arcanist in Another World.author: Bleeding Tears
Arcanist in Another World.description: Valens is the youngest Life Archmagus the Empire has ever seen. His mastery over Resonance allows him to hear the frequencies of the world and correct them, healing even the deepest wounds.

Fluff Series.title: Fluff 3: A Wholesome LitRPG
Fluff Series.author: RavensDagger
Fluff Series.description: A supervillain plans to dethrone the local criminals and become the new kingpin of an otherwise peaceful city in this fantasy superhero series.

My Big Goblin Space Program.title: My Big Goblin Space Program 2: An Astronaut Reincarnation LitRPG
My Big Goblin Space Program.author: Scott Warren
My Big Goblin Space Program.description: Chris thought he had it all. But then his dreams of space travel ended in the worst way possible, and he was reincarnated as the goblin king of Rava. Now he leads a loyal-but-pathetic gang of blue-furred boneheads.

Soul Canvas.title: Talent Killer
Soul Canvas.author: KamikazePotato
Soul Canvas.description: The shadow of betrayal lurks in every corner. Adam has taken control as the new Lord of Penumbria, defeated two fearsomely strong Ghosts, and stolen multiple abilities using his new Talent.

The Boundless Expanse.title: Cultivating Infinity: A LitRPG Apocalypse
The Boundless Expanse.author: DabossUnberogen
The Boundless Expanse.description: One day, Sam was flipping burgers. Next, he was leveling up to survive. Stuck in a dead-end job with no future, Sam longed for something more: power, purpose, a reason to keep going. The System gave him all of that and more... at a devastating cost.

Corrupted Cardsmith.title: Corrupted Cardsmith
Corrupted Cardsmith.author: Daman
Corrupted Cardsmith.description: A slum rat like Shouren doesn’t have much in life. He picks peaches to survive. Dreams of buying a [Common] Class Card one day. But even that hope is stolen from him. Broken, bleeding, and left for dead, Shouren crawls inside the dungeon—desperately reaching for the floating card in front of him.

Alpha LitRPG.title: The Crisis of Power
Alpha LitRPG.author: Arthur Stone
Alpha LitRPG.description: The enemy is strong. There are a lot of them, and they are pressing the attack forward. Me, I don't have enough supplies and weapons for my army. Heck, I don't even have an army to speak of.

Library System Reset.title: Citation: A Magical Library LitRPG Adventure
Library System Reset.author: K.T. Hanna
Library System Reset.description: A shadow of chaos lurks in the Library's foundational pillars, and treachery sneaks in through unseen cracks.

Dreamer's Throne.title: Dreamer's Throne 4
Dreamer's Throne.author: Seth Ring
Dreamer's Throne.description: Surviving a fight with an immortal necromancer should have bought Garrett some peace, but when the Princess he thought was dead shows up on his doorstep, any chance of an easy time slips away.

Apocalypse Core.title: Apocalypse Core
Apocalypse Core.author: Jack Porter
Apocalypse Core.description: One moment, everything was normal. Then the World Core woke up and slaughtered almost everything alive so it could harvest their Chi. After that, it rebuilt everything and put the survivors in a game-like environment, pitting them against monsters and each other.

Apocalypse Core.title: World Core
Apocalypse Core.author: Jack Porter
Apocalypse Core.description: The first of the trials was just the beginning. The next ones are just as dangerous, but they come with an opportunity as well. They’re all about leveling up, more than I ever thought possible. If I can help my women (and my monster dog) make it through, we'll unlock the keys to infinite Chi.

Towerbound.title: Towerbound Book 2: Scrapbound
Towerbound.author: Samson Chui
Towerbound.description: In Book 2 of the Towerbound series, the Scrap Rats finally have a home base—and a target on their back. Dungeon spawn are shifting, guilds are sending spies, and the in-game economy is breaking down.

Towerbound.title: Towerbound, Book 3: Super Ren
Towerbound.author: Samson Chui
Towerbound.description: Book 3 of Towerbound cranks everything up. The Scrap Rats are rising—and so is a world-ending dragon.

Towerbound.title: Towerbound, Book 3.1: Side Stories
Towerbound.author: Samson Chui
Towerbound.description: This is a collection of short stories written after each main Towerbound book was published—so for the best experience, listen to Books 1–3 of the Towerbound LitRPG series first.

Campfire Cooking in Another World with M.title: Red Meat Steak and the Creator God's Judgement
Campfire Cooking in Another World with M.series: Campfire Cooking in Another World with My Absurd Skill
Campfire Cooking in Another World with M.author: Ren Eguchi, Kevin Chen - translator
Campfire Cooking in Another World with M.description: With another dungeon behind them, Mukohda and party (and Elrand for some reason) take a well deserved rest to collect themselves before hitting the road again. And now, with many more levels, Mukohda has earned another new Tenant.

Campfire Cooking in Another World with M.title: Stone Oven-Baked Pizza and the Elixir of Life
Campfire Cooking in Another World with M.series: Campfire Cooking in Another World with My Absurd Skill
Campfire Cooking in Another World with M.author: Ren Eguchi, Kevin Chen - translator
Campfire Cooking in Another World with M.description: After conquering dungeons and finally getting some leverage over the gods ganging up on him, Mukohda sets his sights on the domestic life. With his new palatial manor fully staffed with trustworthy servants and guards, it seems like as good a time as any to focus on building up his...

Campfire Cooking in Another World with M.title: Grilled Entrails and the Festival of Gluttony
Campfire Cooking in Another World with M.series: Campfire Cooking in Another World with My Absurd Skill
Campfire Cooking in Another World with M.author: Ren Eguchi, Kevin Chen - translator
Campfire Cooking in Another World with M.description: When we last left Mukohda, an unfortunate salaryman who got accidentally summoned to another world from modern Japan, he had bought a house in Karelina and staffed it.

Campfire Cooking in Another World with M.title: Sukiyaki and the Blessings of Battle
Campfire Cooking in Another World with M.series: Campfire Cooking in Another World with My Absurd Skill
Campfire Cooking in Another World with M.author: Ren Eguchi, Tristan K. Hill - translator
Campfire Cooking in Another World with M.description: At long last, the time has come. Mukohda and his party of ever-ravenous familiars are finally ready to set foot in the Brixt dungeon, a notorious hellhole famed for being the hardest dungeon in the land!

Campfire Cooking in Another World with M.title: Karaage and the Mighty Dragon of Yore
Campfire Cooking in Another World with M.series: Campfire Cooking in Another World with My Absurd Skill
Campfire Cooking in Another World with M.author: Ren Eguchi, Tristan K. Hill - translator

The Warlock Breeder.title: The Next Conjurer
The Warlock Breeder.author: D.D Valo
The Warlock Breeder.description: Cairne Obstik thought being a Warlock would be a road traveled alone. He was wrong.

Book of the Dead.title: Book of the Dead 4: Vengeance
Book of the Dead.author: RinoZ
Book of the Dead.description: Tyron has bided his time and amassed his strength, but for how long will he be willing to wait for his vengeance? The rebellion grows stronger every passing day while the Noble houses attempt to purge the corruption of heresy from the people.

Warmaster.title: Warmaster 9: Stormwatch Citadel
Warmaster.author: Melissa McShane
Warmaster.description: In returning to the north, Aderyn leaves behind the horrors and personal nightmares she suffered in the Southlands. But going north has its own challenges, because the new Fated One’s Destiny quest says only that they must bring peace to the Northlands.

Level One God.title: Level One God 2
Level One God.author: Zachary Scott
Level One God.description: A quiet climb back to godhood was never in the cards. Word is spreading about a young man in a strange helmet. A Wood rank who punches above his weight. A nobody who keeps surviving things he shouldn't. In taverns, they tell stories of him.

Too Stubborn to Die.title: Too Stubborn to Die 1
Too Stubborn to Die.author: B. F. Huups, Sir Bedivere The Mad
Too Stubborn to Die.description: Fear of death never stopped Aaron from doing something dangerous. Now actual death can't either.

Cultist of Cerebon.title: Flesh and Secrets
Cultist of Cerebon.author: Fizzicks
Cultist of Cerebon.description: Greater political influence and power always comes at the cost of new enemies.

The Doorverse Chronicles.title: Death Under a Green Sun: A LitRPG Portal Fantasy
The Doorverse Chronicles.author: Kyle Johnson
The Doorverse Chronicles.description: Sheriffs on flying monsters. Marshals dueling with magic cards. Showdowns fought with creatures instead of pistols. Epic beasts destroying whole towns. And me, stuck in the middle once more....

From Chef To Crafter To Conqueror.title: Expansion
From Chef To Crafter To Conqueror.series: From Chef To Crafter To Conqueror
From Chef To Crafter To Conqueror.author: Gabriel Rathweg
From Chef To Crafter To Conqueror.description: Ryo was a chef, an extremely good one at that. That was until the entire universe as he knew it changed. After his spaceship is attacked and destroyed by an enemy armada, he finds himself in a situation he never could have imagined. Sent back in time and to an alternate reality, he has quite a...

System Reset.title: Reinitializing the Apocalypse: A LitRPG Adventure
System Reset.author: Timothy McGowen
System Reset.description: During the first Apocalypse, the System Lords forgot one tiny detail—they left William Ward out. While everyone else got classes and powers, he kept doing what he does best: working in the shadows as a legendary hitman.

Industrial Mage.title: Industrial Mage: A LitRPG Adventure
Industrial Mage.author: Nectar
Industrial Mage.description: Jump into a fast-paced new Isekai LitRPG Adventure featuring a rune-based magic system, dungeon delving, an intelligent MC, deep worldbuilding, unforgettable characters, kingdom-building, and so much more.

Merchant Crab.title: [Traveling] Merchant Crab (Book 2): A LitRPG Adventure
Merchant Crab.author: H0st
Merchant Crab.description: Continue following this unlikely merchant on his unexpected quest for riches, sweetness, and someone to fix his broken rock!

Havok Bringer.title: Survivor's Descent: A Sci-Fi LitRPG Adventure
Havok Bringer.author: T. A. L. Deason
Havok Bringer.description: Andrew was a 30-year-old engineer living his best life until millions of alien orbs fell from orbit and altered reality itself.

Exiled Ascendants.title: Slaughter-Fest
Exiled Ascendants.author: Ken Lange
Exiled Ascendants.description: Since the apocalypse kicked off with the System’s arrival, Iain Clark has done a lot of things—gathered up several of his friends and family, fought monsters and aliens alike, and thriving all the while.

The Last Paladin.title: The Last Paladin 3
The Last Paladin.author: John Cressman
The Last Paladin.description: Hunter sacrificed his powers to save the Czar’s daughter, but now the world teeters on the edge of annihilation. The Nightlord’s armies march unopposed, and Hunter’s only hope lies with the elusive elves, whose ancient magic can restore his core.

The Last Paladin.title: The Last Paladin #5
The Last Paladin.author: Roman Savarovsky, Julia Fouche - Translator - translator
The Last Paladin.description: The Empire's elite were finally beginning to face a hard truth: the age of impunity was ending. Every action—no matter how well hidden behind privilege or title—now carried consequences. Understanding that truth was one thing. Accepting it was another. For the most zealous Princes, power...

The Last Paladin.title: The Last Paladin #6
The Last Paladin.author: Roman Savarovsky, Julia Fouche - Translator - translator
The Last Paladin.description: War had been averted—but at what cost? The Empire stood fractured, exposed—and the scent of weakness drew predators who had waited years for this moment. One of them had already made his move, sinking his claws into the Empire's wounded body with a death grip—not to destroy, but to...

The Last Paladin.title: The Last Paladin #7
The Last Paladin.author: Roman Savarovsky, Julia Fouche - Translator - translator
The Last Paladin.description: The Empire is unraveling. Enemies inside and out claw for power while the throne sits empty. Greed plays its part—but it isn't the whole story. What happened in the Imperial Palace made one thing clear: this isn't just politics anymore. Something deeper is moving, hidden and coordinated, its...

Idle Village Hero.title: Idle Village Hero Omnibus, Books 1-4
Idle Village Hero.author: Leon West
Idle Village Hero.description: Harper thought retirement meant hanging up his glaive, but when the Dungeon Lord offers him something no adventurer has ever been given—a chance to build a sanctuary from the ground up—he can't resist. Finally, a quest where success means creation, not destruction.

Idle Village Hero.title: Idle Village Hero 3
Idle Village Hero.author: Leon West
Idle Village Hero.description: They wanted submission. They're getting revolution.

Idle Village Hero.title: Idle Village Hero 4
Idle Village Hero.author: Leon West
Idle Village Hero.description: The Nine Gods of Ionia have finally noticed what Harper's become: an isekai with the power of a Dungeon Lord, something that should be impossible. Something that threatens the very order they've maintained for so long. Their verdict is already decided. He must die.

Worth the Candle.title: Sound and Silence: A LitRPG Adventure
Worth the Candle.author: Alexander Wales
Worth the Candle.description: Juniper Smith always dreamed of attending a magic college. Now he's enrolled at the Athenaeum of Sound and Silence, where students learn to bend velocity and freeze motion itself. There's just one catch: he's there as a government operative, hunting threats that lurk in the shadows between lectures.

Azarinth Healer.title: Azarinth Healer, Book Six
Azarinth Healer.author: Rhaegar
Azarinth Healer.description: Ilea survived the eclipse on Erendar, and she didn’t return alone. With the Meadow settling in Hallowfort and her third class finally unlocked, Ilea finds herself looking for new ways to test and improve her powers.

The Stubborn Skill-Grinder in a Time Loo.title: The Stubborn Skill-Grinder in a Time Loop 3
The Stubborn Skill-Grinder in a Time Loo.series: The Stubborn Skill-Grinder in a Time Loop
The Stubborn Skill-Grinder in a Time Loo.author: X-RHODEN-X
The Stubborn Skill-Grinder in a Time Loo.description: Having awakened a ground-breaking Celestial-rarity skill at the climax of his fight against the Eldritch Avatar, Orodan's problems have suddenly grown bigger. Otherworldly attention. The champions of various worlds come seeking to capture him for their own factions.

The Grand Game.title: Dreams of Power
The Grand Game.author: Tom Elliot
The Grand Game.description: Michael has been playing the Game. Growing in strength. Slaying his foes. And avoiding entanglement with the Powers. But the time is fast coming when that will no longer be possible. Almost a Power himself, Michael must answer the question: is he ready? Are his people?

Oath of the Survivor.title: Oath of the Survivor 3
Oath of the Survivor.author: James Meyer
Oath of the Survivor.description: The Practicum. An exam where death is a reality, and failure can cost everything. Kyle and C.H.A.D.D. are no strangers to life and death situations, but will their experience be a blessing or a curse?

Oath of the Survivor.title: Oath of the Survivor 4
Oath of the Survivor.author: James Meyer
Oath of the Survivor.description: When Kyle and C.H.A.D.D. are approached with a job suited for their unique talents, they jump at the opportunity. However, all is not as it seems on the lush world of Er'Mithren.

Of Hunters and Immortals.title: Of Hunters and Immortals, Book 1
Of Hunters and Immortals.author: Shadowwing
Of Hunters and Immortals.description: The path of immortals is a long one. Jiang doesn't have time to take it slow. Jiang is a hunter in a quiet village far from the world of sects, spirits, and soaring swords. When powerful bandits destroy his village and steal his family, he resolves to do anything to get them back.

Reborn Healer.title: Reborn Healer
Reborn Healer.author: ghost flower
Reborn Healer.description: Legendary healers can save cities from the brink of death with a word, but warriors can destroy them just as quickly. Ren will become both.

Smith to the Small Gods.title: Smith to the Small Gods
Smith to the Small Gods.author: Max Vale
Smith to the Small Gods.description: After decades of bashing, slashing, and executing his way through the ranks of the evil tyrant king, Orin Ironfinger is… tired. Victorious and feared the world over, to be sure, but tired all the same.

Phoenix Healer.title: Phoenix Healer
Phoenix Healer.author: JM Jacobs
Phoenix Healer.description: Armed with legendary flames of life and destruction, mysterious fighting instincts, and the ability to resurrect, Monica is embroiled in a fight for survival while battling cultists, dungeons, and the Old Gods.

Start Menu.title: Start Menu 3: Quit Game?
Start Menu.author: Kos Play
Start Menu.description: After bringing Isa back and passing a series of trials, Alex has become the new King of Camelot. Now he must rescue his friends after a betrayal by Pi. To make matters worse, a dark entity is on the lose, hellbent on spreading darkness to the whole universe.

Andy in the Apocalypse.title: Andy in the Apocalypse
Andy in the Apocalypse.author: Plum Parrot
Andy in the Apocalypse.description: Andy wanted a quiet life—just his trailer, the Sonoran desert, and a job that didn’t ask much of him. Instead, he got a front-row seat to Tucson’s collapse. Magic rewrote the rules. Monsters stalked the streets. People mutated—or died.

Dao of Money.title: Dao of Money: A Xianxia Progression Fantasy
Dao of Money.author: Extra26, T.C. Liyanage
Dao of Money.description: Chen Ren is reincarnated into a realm of cultivation overrun by sects, beasts, and clans full of murderous people. Most would be terrified. He sees a new world of opportunity. Only problem. He's weighed down by his predecessor's mountain of debt.

Reborn as a Demon Hat.title: Reborn as a Demon Hat: A Monster Evolution Isekai LitRPG
Reborn as a Demon Hat.author: J. S. Boyd
Reborn as a Demon Hat.description: In the action-packed first book of this portal fantasy series, the monster messiah will rise—not the hero they need, but the hat they deserve....

Reborn as a Demon Hat.title: Reborn as a Demon Hat 2: A Monster Evolution Isekai LitRPG
Reborn as a Demon Hat.author: J. S. Boyd
Reborn as a Demon Hat.description: The forces of light and darkness have been locked in war for millennia, all in the name of the fierce god Kaedmon. And Ethan Graham, an average gamer turned all-powerful demon hat (yes, hat), is caught right in the middle of it.

Stormborn Ascendant.title: Stormborn Ascendant 2: A LitRPG Apocalypse Adventure
Stormborn Ascendant.author: K. H. Nulls
Stormborn Ascendant.description: Months have passed since Tyler’s battle in the Main Branch of the Stormchasers, and factions from all over the Flooded City swarm to the site of Tyler’s old home. A trio of Adepts—each more powerful than the last—have been sent to hunt him down, but they’re just the scouting party.

The Ruby Magician.title: The Ruby Magician: A Tower-Climbing LitRPG Adventure
The Ruby Magician.author: D. R. Hudgins
The Ruby Magician.description: An ex-soldier must climb a mysterious, treasure-filled tower to repay his family's debts in the first installment of this thrilling LitRPG fantasy series.

Settlement Stone.title: Settlement Stone 2
Settlement Stone.author: Rhea Zulu
Settlement Stone.description: Imani has managed to build a stable home for his people, keeping it safe and hidden in the mountains. Now he wishes to upgrade his growing settlement of Silverfall into a Dukedom by recruiting more people and amassing enough strength to defend them all.

Loopbreaker.title: Loopbreaker: Book 1
Loopbreaker.author: Shawn Wilson
Loopbreaker.description: The hardest part of being a noble’s first son? Nothing—you inherit most of it. Being the ninth son means you inherit war.

Dungeons & Deliveries.title: Dungeons & Deliveries: A Dungeon-Core LitRPG
Dungeons & Deliveries.author: A. P. Scribe
Dungeons & Deliveries.description: Broke and rejected by both the Adventurer and Courier Guilds, Alex doesn't slay monsters, but he does need a job before he hits rock bottom―and he'll take whatever he can get.

Octaeteris Cycle.title: The Affinity Collector
Octaeteris Cycle.author: Jonathan Brooks
Octaeteris Cycle.description: At only 8 years old, Weldin had just had his dual Affinities bestowed upon him by the Goddess Athera when he ended up in a Nexus Rift far exceeding his Level.

Path of the Deathless.title: Path of the Deathless, Book One
Path of the Deathless.author: OstensibleMammal
Path of the Deathless.description: Whatever kills Shiv only makes him stronger. An outcast without a Path, Shiv was never supposed to amount to anything. The System ignored him, and his town despised him. But when he is murdered defending his home, the universe makes a mistake: It gives him a second chance.

Apocalypse Breaker.title: Apocalypse BREAKER 3
Apocalypse Breaker.author: Aaron Renfroe, Sean Oswald
Apocalypse Breaker.description: Return to the gritty world of Apocalypse BREAKER, where the overpowered hero begins to see the true scale of the System.

Above the Drowning Light.title: Lamplighter Academy: A Post-Apocalyptic LitRPG Adventure
Above the Drowning Light.author: Kal Griffith
Above the Drowning Light.description: Sean died under a collapsing warehouse roof. Twenty years as a firefighter, and that was how it ended. Except it wasn't the end.

Chosen ArchMage.title: The Chosen ArchMage: A LitRPG Fantasy
Chosen ArchMage.author: Mark Alan
Chosen ArchMage.description: Ian Vale was never meant to be a hero. He was just a healer with a leaky mana pool and an academy that repeatedly rejected him.

The Bellum Existentiae.title: The Sword Saint and the Saintesses: A Second Chance LitRPG Progression Fantasy
The Bellum Existentiae.author: D STAHL
The Bellum Existentiae.description: Aaron Hueber witnessed the rise of demons from below and the invasion of horrors from beyond. He saw monarchs slain, champions betrayed, and worlds fall until reality itself was unmade.

A Breeder Apocalypse.title: Long Eared Farm
A Breeder Apocalypse.author: Mark Alan
A Breeder Apocalypse.description: Two thousand years after entering cryosleep to escape an alien invasion, Doctor Lance Winters awakens to a transformed Earth where humanity is an endangered species and survival is a game managed by a ruthless alien overlord.

Castle Core.title: Castle Core 5
Castle Core.author: Milo Storm
Castle Core.description: Now that his town is safe, Wyle moves to thwart the attack on Sparkling Bay. He hopes to destroy Captain Charles’s army and take Queenstown in one smooth stroke, but the Captain has a plan of his own.

Dear Spellbook Series.title: Dear Spellbook
Dear Spellbook Series.author: Peter J. Lee
Dear Spellbook Series.description: The complete Timeloop Progression Fantasy saga of Tal the Sorcerer and his mysteriously sentient spellbook. Join Tal as he battles monsters, hangovers, and time itself in this three-book box set, containing volumes 1-3 of Peter J. Lee’s Dear Spellbook trilogy.

Academy of Legends.title: Academy of Legends 2
Academy of Legends.author: Vic Void
Academy of Legends.description: War is coming. En Ward survived his first months at Ascension Academy, forming powerful bonds with beautiful Marked women and discovering abilities that shouldn't exist. But his enemies haven't been idle.

Magical Explorer (light novel).title: Magical Explorer, Vol. 3 (light novel)
Magical Explorer (light novel).author: Iris, Noboru Kannatuki, David Musto - translator
Magical Explorer (light novel).description: Still in his first year at Tsukuyomi Magic Academy, Kousuke Takioto continues his freewheeling routine of clearing dungeons with the heroines between bouts of training. However, his tendency to cut class isn’t lost on the other students, who now view him as a slacker. Despite this, Yukine...

I Got a Cheat Skill in Another World and.title: I Got a Cheat Skill in Another World and Became Unrivaled in the Real World, Too, Vol. 3 (light novel)
I Got a Cheat Skill in Another World and.series: I Got a Cheat Skill in Another World and Became Unrivaled in The Real World, Too
I Got a Cheat Skill in Another World and.author: Miku, Rein Kuwashima, Carley Radford - translator
I Got a Cheat Skill in Another World and.description: Next level up—become “god’s” pupil! Yuuya Tenjou has obtained all kinds of powerful skills and abilities and continues to live his new lifestyle in both the other world and his home world. In the Weald, he comes across a "divine beast" rabbit! "I'll train you. In exchange, teach me how...

Project Tartarus.title: Project Tartarus: Apeiron
Project Tartarus.author: Erebus Esprit
Project Tartarus.description: To rise, one must be prepared to fall. Reeling from the gulf between himself and the gods, Arche goes to greater lengths than ever before to close the gap. As time presses against him and more gods stir, he must look to the past in order to face the future.

Necromancer Supreme in Another World.title: Necromancer Supreme in Another World
Necromancer Supreme in Another World.author: N. Robert Cor
Necromancer Supreme in Another World.description: Jim has no life outside of gaming, spending years dedicated to a single VRMMO and maxing out one character to heights unachieved before: a Necromancer Supreme and his summons. Then, one day, he wakes up inside the same game he has spent thousands of hours playing.

Monster Tamer Academy.title: Monster Tamer Academy 4
Monster Tamer Academy.author: Robyn Wideman, Matt Herrmann
Monster Tamer Academy.description: Dirk and his friends are off to the South Capital where some of the Region’s strongest wild monsters await them, as well as answers, hopefully. While at the new tamer academy, Dirk will have to navigate his growing notoriety and help his friends deal with unexpected matters of their own.

Arcane Galaxy.title: Chaos Protocols
Arcane Galaxy.author: Troy Osgood, Jake Malory
Arcane Galaxy.description: When talented but trigger-happy SAS Operator Andrew Rivers takes one last, off-the-books job to clean his slate, everything changes. The mission fails violently, catapulting him and his volatile cargo into an alien galaxy complete with dwarves, orcs, elves, and the stuff of nightmares.

Tunnel Rat.title: Tunnel Rat 4
Tunnel Rat.author: Walrus King
Tunnel Rat.description: Milo is back again, causing trouble in the game world of Genesis. But, is it only a game? He has suspicions that things aren't so simple, and needs to dig deeper. And while he does that, he's slowly coming out of his shell.

Duskbound.title: Duskbound 3
Duskbound.author: D.E. Sherman
Duskbound.description: As Velik searches for new clues to unravel the mystery of the dungeon seeds, a divine beast stalks his path. Its mere presence violates the Compact between the gods, drawing them into the conflict and escalating it to the point where humanity’s existence is threatened.

Labyrinth of the Mad God.title: Labyrinth of the Mad God
Labyrinth of the Mad God.author: Magnus Grey
Labyrinth of the Mad God.description: Nick thought his dreams had come true when the System came to Earth. He watched his civilization burn to ash eleven minutes later. But as bad as the apocalypse was, the Mad God Taltos is worse.

Lightning Lancer.title: Path of Lightning
Lightning Lancer.author: Rhea Zulu
Lightning Lancer.description: The godly society, The Deiwos Clan, has obtained a Tower, and like all other gods across the multiverse, they are looking for exceptional players who will provide them with Karma.

Demon Roux.title: Mercenary Reincarnated as a Chef
Demon Roux.author: Gabriel Rathweg
Demon Roux.description: Diamond Lou was the best mercenary assassin the world had ever known. Even the best have to die sometimes. For Lou, that was okay. He tired of all the killing and death. Only, the end never came.

Obelisk: System Integration.title: Obelisk: System Integration 6
Obelisk: System Integration.author: Conor Malachi
Obelisk: System Integration.description: End game. This is it—everything the humans have been working on will either save them… or lead to every last human being dying. Warren's good with that. What he's not good with is Ani, Raven, Andy, Louise, and Buck dying. Warren is not good with that.

The Cloudfarers: A LitRPG Series.title: Thoroughly Fogged
The Cloudfarers: A LitRPG Series.author: H.C. Mills
The Cloudfarers: A LitRPG Series.description: Sick of toiling his life away on the Thistlethorn estate, Rylan tries everything he can think of to unlock his first Skill—from juggling, to sewing, to singing—until one day, he unexpectedly succeeds.

The Last Legend Reborn.title: The Last Legend Reborn, Book 1
The Last Legend Reborn.author: Borgy60
The Last Legend Reborn.description: Rodric Vale spent sixty years as the world's greatest hero. He answered every summons, fought every war, saved every kingdom that asked. He reached Level 100—the only person ever to do so—and became a legend.

Faceless Hunter.title: Faceless Hunter
Faceless Hunter.author: XKarnation
Faceless Hunter.description: Xen isn't your typical Hunter. In fact, he isn't human at all.

Apocalypse Healer.title: Apocalypse Healer 4
Apocalypse Healer.author: HideousGrain
Apocalypse Healer.description: After surviving the impossible, David returns to the Earthen Union forever changed. A god’s heart beats within his chest; an engine of power that no mortal body was meant to contain.

Summoner's Shadow Series.title: Summoner's Shadow 4
Summoner's Shadow Series.author: DB King
Summoner's Shadow Series.description: After defeating Volrath and saving the Mortal Realm from his rule, Bran decides to venture on a journey of his own and goes in search of his people. The Worldbreakers. This journey, however, is far more dangerous than he had ever expected.

The War Game: A LitRPG Space Adventure.title: The War Game: Mad Scientist
The War Game: A LitRPG Space Adventure.series: The War Game: A LitRPG Space Adventure
The War Game: A LitRPG Space Adventure.author: August Aird
The War Game: A LitRPG Space Adventure.description: One war is over—but more danger lurks in the galaxy.

Prime System Directive.title: Forgotten Summoner
Prime System Directive.author: Kurth Andrard
Prime System Directive.description: What would you do if the system you knew was out to kill you?

All Jobs and Classes! I Just Wanted One.title: All Jobs and Classes! I Just Wanted One Skill, Not Them All!
All Jobs and Classes! I Just Wanted One.series: All Jobs and Classes! I Just Wanted One Skill, Not Them All!
All Jobs and Classes! I Just Wanted One.author: Comedian0 L
All Jobs and Classes! I Just Wanted One.description: Ludger was supposed to be just another forgotten soul, reborn into a quiet life under the care of his young mother, Elaine. With nothing but a mysterious system in his vision and the faint promise of growth, he resigned himself to learning the humble trade of cooking.

Tower of Somnus.title: Evolution
Tower of Somnus.author: Cale Plamann
Tower of Somnus.description: Katherine Debs clawed her way up from the slums to the peak of the corporate world, a true rags to riches success story. Now her enemies can't show themselves publicly, banished as they are to the shadows by the monopoly she holds on advanced alien technology.

Bunny Girl Evolution.title: Bunny Girl Evolution 2
Bunny Girl Evolution.author: Sir Bedivere the Mad
Bunny Girl Evolution.description: Elise is finally back above ground; but she's not home free just yet. The Gray family is still missing, and their situation is a little more complicated than she first thought.
Bunny Girl Evolution.narrator: Dorrie Sacks, Justin Thomas James, Ryan H. Reid, Jeff Hays, Jack Fields, Tess Irondale, Jessica Threet

Rise of the Body Cultivator.title: Body Cultivation Hurts
Rise of the Body Cultivator.author: Apollos Thorne
Rise of the Body Cultivator.description: Nathanial Kane had read it all before. It said they had centuries. The demons arrived in ten years. He'd been counted among the strongest. It had all been for nothing. He'd witnessed Earth's end. While dying, Nathan reviewed the only unique spell he'd ever found in the tower. He cast Rebirth.

Wraithwood Botanist.title: Wraithwood Botanist 3
Wraithwood Botanist.author: Little Lynx
Wraithwood Botanist.description: To be accepted as a guardian, Mira embarks on a journey to Tranea Crypt, a dangerous location designed to teach visitors soulmancy.

Wraithwood Botanist.title: Wraithwood Botanist 4
Wraithwood Botanist.author: Little Lynx
Wraithwood Botanist.description: Mira has obtained the respect of the forest’s guardians. After vowing to protect Areswood Forest from an impending conquering attempt, she seeks answers and powers in Misty Row—the bramble that separates the Fourth and Fifth Domains.

Last Save Dave.title: Last Save Dave
Last Save Dave.author: Michael James Ploof
Last Save Dave.description: Dave Deranger, a middle-aged plumber, was the 1990 Nintendo Champion and an Olympic silver medalist in boxing. Since then, his greatest challenge has been trying to quit smoking and plunging toilets.

The Wolfbound Warrior.title: The Wolfbound Warrior: The Aetheris Legacy
The Wolfbound Warrior.author: Jay Redrick
The Wolfbound Warrior.description: If you’re looking for a gritty, immersive LitRPG adventure that doesn’t pull its punches, this book is exactly what you need. It’s packed with intense combat, real stakes, and a protagonist who doesn’t just survive, he fights, claws, and bleeds his way through the horrors that stand in his path.

Judicator Jane.title: Judicator Jane 7
Judicator Jane.author: Brian Rouleau
Judicator Jane.description: After a wild dash across the Mandalas on the continent of Kaldara, Jane is one step away from her goal. But the path ahead is perilous.

The Legend of Dark Heart.title: The Legend of Dark Heart 1
The Legend of Dark Heart.author: Alex Villavasso
The Legend of Dark Heart.description: Cursed with a dark power that threatens to slowly erode his humanity, Nolan Crest fights against the monsters and guilds that plague his world, even if that means he’ll one day become a monster, himself.

Galactic Merc.title: Level One
Galactic Merc.author: Chris Kennedy
Galactic Merc.description: I write romance novels. Or I did. Now I’m learning how to survive in a galaxy that treats combat like a game. After being snatched from Earth and rescued by mercenaries, I discover the universe runs on contracts, credits, and cold math. Stats decide who lives. Levels decide who dies.

Body Refinement in a Beast Tamer’s World.title: Body Refinement in a Beast Tamer’s World, Book 1
Body Refinement in a Beast Tamer’s World.series: Body Refinement in a Beast Tamer’s World
Body Refinement in a Beast Tamer’s World.author: Seth Ring
Body Refinement in a Beast Tamer’s World.description: Waking up in Borella, a world where mages and their mysterious pets rule everything, Magnus discovers that he is no longer a musician, but instead has become the Tower Master of the Crimson Flame Mage Tower. Some might call it an upgrade, but Magnus isn’t so sure.

Gunboat.title: Gunboat, Book 2
Gunboat.author: Dean Henegar
Gunboat.description: It’s time to expand the fleet. Captain Watkins must build a new, more powerful ship for his core if he wants to survive the kobold pirates, cannibalistic halflings, and the other deadly foes that await him in the void of space.

The Ultimate Passive Paradigm.title: Titan's Descendant
The Ultimate Passive Paradigm.author: Triopals
The Ultimate Passive Paradigm.description: For two years, Nathan has been a failure. Cursed with an abysmal energy absorption rate, he's the weakest disciple in the Verdant Spire Sect and faces certain expulsion.

Reluctant Dungeon.title: The Reluctant Dungeon 3
Reluctant Dungeon.author: L. Eclaire
Reluctant Dungeon.description: Theo had thought that after saving the city of Rosewind (again…) he would finally be done with all his adventuring nonsense. Sadly, the universe had a different opinion.

Knights Apocalyptica.title: Knights Apocalyptica 3
Knights Apocalyptica.author: Zach Skye
Knights Apocalyptica.description: The walls are opening. For the first time in three hundred years, the Kingdom of Cindrus will welcome outsiders, and with them, chaos.

Dungeon Apocalypse.title: Fear the Reaper
Dungeon Apocalypse.author: C.J. Carella
Dungeon Apocalypse.description: The System has arrived. Soon, magic will permeate the entire planet, society will be disrupted, and Dungeon-spawned monsters will walk the Earth.

Modern Magic.title: Modern Magic
Modern Magic.author: Beth Williams
Modern Magic.description: If the dragons don't kill you, the deadlines will. At the Tower of Jackdaw and Spittlelick, magic isn't wild or romantic. It's regulated, audited, and buried under paperwork. Ivy Armstride is a junior mage trying to survive a workplace where spells misfire, mentors are eccentric at best, and...

Path to Prosperity.title: Path to Prosperity 2
Path to Prosperity.author: HideousGrain
Path to Prosperity.description: Percy expected a new start at the illustrious Wintermoon Estate, but behind polished walls and noble splendor, he found only cold shoulders and quiet malice.

Accidental Champion.title: Accidental Champion 5
Accidental Champion.author: Todd Herzman
Accidental Champion.description: Xavier, having been unexpectedly thrust forward in the Tower of Champions, is not about to squander his time on the hundredth floor. There are still threats for him to face, still powerful enemies to defeat, and before he leaves, he will wring every ounce of power he can from this opportunity.

Wolfish.title: Wolfish: The Complete Collection
Wolfish.author: G.K. DeRosa
Wolfish.description: Fate has a wicked sense of humor. When I was sixteen, I met the love of my life in magic school. He'd appear exactly once a year at the annual masquerade ball, then vanish... Fast forward to the present: to the night I’m attacked and my hidden wolf emerges.

Persistent Assimilation.title: Enthralled Healer
Persistent Assimilation.author: Jonathan Brooks
Persistent Assimilation.description: After completing the developmental world of Tarth, the remaining Contenders and Humans from Earth are transported to the world of Plangea.
